abl-fa7d-7d46-9985-4d7a.name: The Warmaster
abl-fa7d-7d46-9985-4d7a.text: In your Command phase, select one Warmaster ability. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abl-c6c6-4956-b0e4-8e3c.name: Dark Destiny
abl-c6c6-4956-b0e4-8e3c.text: Each time this model makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting **leadership roll**, if the result of that roll was 7+, you gain 1CP.

abl-840f-5d08-8f3c-8d60.name: Leader
abl-840f-5d08-8f3c-8d60.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHAOS TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ CHOSEN

abl-2e37-6074-e784-7b4.name: Leader
abl-2e37-6074-e784-7b4.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ RAPTORS

abl-849-eef4-da9f-1f47.name: Head Taker
abl-849-eef4-da9f-1f47.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6 for each model in this model’s unit which is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-8033-5a4b-e17b-4658.name: Herald of the Apocalypse (Aura)
abl-8033-5a4b-e17b-4658.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if that enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test. This ability cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

abl-3c5d-5e9a-a996-7afc.name: Leader
abl-3c5d-5e9a-a996-7afc.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Chosen^^** 
- ^^**Chaos Terminator Squad^^** 
- ^^**Legionaries^^** 
- ^^**Masters of the Maelstrom^^** 
- ^^**Red Corsairs Raiders^^**

abl-f413-2b4f-85c8-7cd4.name: Lord of Badab (Aura)
abl-f413-2b4f-85c8-7cd4.text: While a friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Infantry**^^ unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and ^^**Damned**^^ units) is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-b66a-e8bd-9361-1c41.name: Hamadrya’s Knowledge (Psychic)
abl-b66a-e8bd-9361-1c41.text: Once per battle round, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model’s unit, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".

abl-f50a-4106-c634-4dfb.name: Dark Blessing (Aura)
abl-f50a-4106-c634-4dfb.text: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model in that unit, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-407-7706-8874-ca33.name: Ascended Daemon
abl-407-7706-8874-ca33.text: Each time this model shoot or fights, while resolving those attacks, you can re-roll one Hit roll and you can re-roll one Wound roll.

abl-4f55-12ef-83d4-4914.name: Lord of Chaos
abl-4f55-12ef-83d4-4914.text: While this model is within 3" of a friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Infantry^^** unit, this model has **Lone Operative**.

abl-8261-a286-b29a-da5d.name: Flying Horror
abl-8261-a286-b29a-da5d.text: Each time this model ends a Normal or Advance move, select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-3ab7-2651-6173-3298.name: Daemonic Destruction
abl-3ab7-2651-6173-3298.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each of this model’s remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abl-7680-73aa-dbc8-b009.name: Enhanced Warriors
abl-7680-73aa-dbc8-b009.text: If this unit is attached to a unit at the start of the battle, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by Bodyguard models in that unit and add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of Bodyguard models in that unit.

abl-1f0d-2787-4129-313e.name: Leader
abl-1f0d-2787-4129-313e.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CHOSEN
■ CULTIST MOB
■ LEGIONARIES

abl-3942-42f4-fc46-6b8e.name: Surgeon Acolyte
abl-3942-42f4-fc46-6b8e.text: Once per turn, when an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, if this unit contains ^^**Fabius Bile**^^, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abl-8f97-ea59-d469-e0bc.name: Chirurgeon
abl-8f97-ea59-d469-e0bc.text: The first time this unit’s ^^**Fabius Bile^^** model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set it back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, with its full wounds remaining.

abl-b637-21a9-85e9-61a0.name: Agent of Discord (Aura)
abl-b637-21a9-85e9-61a0.text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a **stratagem**, you can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that **stratagem** by 1CP.

abl-bcfc-a73a-79f9-3908.name: Guns Blazing
abl-bcfc-a73a-79f9-3908.text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attacks that targets a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

abl-638e-667a-a1c5-1135.name: Leader
abl-638e-667a-a1c5-1135.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES
■ POSSESSED

abl-9616-c3fc-712-a0ac.name: Daemonkin (Psychic)
abl-9616-c3fc-712-a0ac.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-9aca-bf2a-148d-b019.name: Sacrificial Dagger
abl-9aca-bf2a-148d-b019.text: Once per phase, when this model is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, this model’s unit suffers 1 mortal wound and, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-d0c2-c293-3921-2275.name: Leader
abl-d0c2-c293-3921-2275.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES

abl-65b0-1aae-9190-2d6e.name: Chance for Glory
abl-65b0-1aae-9190-2d6e.text:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength, Attacks, Armour
Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.

abl-d81c-7f34-f563-e11b.name: Leader
abl-d81c-7f34-f563-e11b.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHAOS TERMINATOR SQUAD

abl-ce67-fc39-8970-3137.name: Formidably Resilient
abl-ce67-fc39-8970-3137.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-8150-5c01-b83e-e182.name: Prescience (Psychic)
abl-8150-5c01-b83e-e182.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-7edb-b6b-ca54-43fe.name: Gift of Chaos (Psychic)
abl-7edb-b6b-ca54-43fe.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, after resolving its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that had the [PSYCHIC] ability. That unit must take a Leadership test: if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-a049-dda2-5463-aa67.name: Warptime (Psychic)
abl-a049-dda2-5463-aa67.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-bb67-4c61-3acb-3984.name: Death Hex (Psychic)
abl-bb67-4c61-3acb-3984.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, one PSYKER with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to that PSYKER and roll one D6: on a 1, that PSYKER's unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your next Movement phase, each time an attack targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration  characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-b308-936f-547b-e765.name: Chaos Familiar
abl-b308-936f-547b-e765.text: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic to 0.

abl-31b3-9fc9-8f5-b2f2.name: Corrupt Machine Spirits
abl-31b3-9fc9-8f5-b2f2.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one visible enemy ^^**Vehicle^^** unit within 12" of this model and roll one D6: on a 2‑3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4‑5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.’

abl-6e52-feca-f575-e5ae.name: Spirit Thief
abl-6e52-feca-f575-e5ae.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one visible enemy ^^**Vehicle^^** unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes^^** model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-9451-72d-3d9e-1287.name: Warpsmith
abl-9451-72d-3d9e-1287.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Vehicle**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-5cf1-da0b-da34-3342.name: Master of Mechanisms
abl-5cf1-da0b-da34-3342.text: In your Command phase, select one friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Vehicle**^^ model within 3" of this model. That **^^ Vehicle**^^ model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that **^^Vehicle**^^ makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

abl-bc89-81a3-34db-b283.name: Enrage Machine Spirits
abl-bc89-81a3-34db-b283.text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy ^^**Vehicle**^^ unit within 12" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-b5da-4ab-cfb5-4e4c.name: Leader
abl-b5da-4ab-cfb5-4e4c.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chosen, Havocs, Legionaires**^^

abl-8618-d29a-f66e-ade8.name: Support
abl-8618-d29a-f66e-ade8.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one other CHARACTER model has already been attached to it (a unit cannot have two EXALTED CHAMPIONS attached to it). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-fbbf-f5d2-d249-f3d9.name: Dark Champion
abl-fbbf-f5d2-d249-f3d9.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-bd10-21c8-3be1-2e74.name: Aspire to Glory
abl-bd10-21c8-3be1-2e74.text: Each time this model’s unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, add D3 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by this model.

abl-da55-1d58-dee4-d42.name: Dark Zealotry
abl-da55-1d58-dee4-d42.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a DARK APOSTLE model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-940f-5c2b-d7c8-6602.name: Demagogue
abl-940f-5c2b-d7c8-6602.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this unit’s DARK APOSTLE model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-abd8-fb73-ea72-d3fd.name: Malign Sacrifice
abl-abd8-fb73-ea72-d3fd.text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit contains one or more Dark Disciple models, you can select one of those models and one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit, then roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. That Dark Disciple model is then destroyed.

abl-98b1-c4d2-400d-f8c7.name: Leader
abl-98b1-c4d2-400d-f8c7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CULTIST MOB

abl-c3c5-ef85-8a70-20ed.name: Faithful Flock
abl-c3c5-ef85-8a70-20ed.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a CULT DEMAGOGUE model, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-800b-10bd-2823-8a38.name: Dark Ritual
abl-800b-10bd-2823-8a38.text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if this unit contains a CULT DEMAGOGUE model, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit can declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced and each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-efec-e7-c922-1489.name: Chaos icon
abl-efec-e7-c922-1489.text: Each time the bearer’s unit takes a Leadership test for the Dark Pacts ability, you can re-roll that test.

abl-f891-237b-ad65-8f4e.name: Veterans of the Long War
abl-f891-237b-ad65-8f4e.text: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-880b-cdab-a5ec-a1e7.name: For the Dark Gods
abl-880b-cdab-a5ec-a1e7.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-ac4f-3f3f-19b6-1f88.name: Howling Horde
abl-ac4f-3f3f-19b6-1f88.text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model from this unit was **destroyed** as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

abl-13a2-57cd-83ff-2127.name: Despoilers
abl-13a2-57cd-83ff-2127.text: Each time this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-e4c4-4418-a864-289b.name: Support
abl-e4c4-4418-a864-289b.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one other CHARACTER model has already been attached to it (a unit cannot have two MASTERS OF EXECUTIONS attached to it). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-2ffd-423f-c721-1b75.name: Warp-sighted Butcher
abl-2ffd-423f-c721-1b75.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If that unit is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

abl-4cfe-2041-4740-1f97.name: Trophy Taker
abl-4cfe-2041-4740-1f97.text: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

abl-3de3-728d-6264-1eb3.name: Unholy Bloodshed
abl-3de3-728d-6264-1eb3.text: Once per battle, when this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-bc5f-7db-8887-434.name: Chosen Marauders
abl-bc5f-7db-8887-434.text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abl-15bc-376d-3c82-73b2.name: Soul Eater
abl-15bc-376d-3c82-73b2.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if one or more attacks made by this model that phase destroyed one or more enemy units, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s weapons.

abl-adc9-df4f-74e6-1e15.name: Rapid Assault
abl-adc9-df4f-74e6-1e15.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-1184-e354-b2b2-6ad2.name: Fearsome (Aura)
abl-1184-e354-b2b2-6ad2.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

abl-5e34-e39b-f00f-37da.name: Terrifying Assault
abl-5e34-e39b-f00f-37da.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-5e3-b390-a556-823e.name: Warp Strike
abl-5e3-b390-a556-823e.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-c7e9-b44-ce90-7870.name: Stabilisation Talons
abl-c7e9-b44-ce90-7870.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a ranged weapon, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll and any or all modifiers to the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that weapon.

abl-1d0e-bd07-97ab-6322.name: Warp Rift Firepower
abl-1d0e-bd07-97ab-6322.text: (Once per battle, per unit): In your Shooting phase, when this unit is **selected to shoot**, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit's ranged attacks have **[INDIRECT FIRE]**.

abl-5705-83ba-9004-6b3c.name: Malevolent Locus (Aura)
abl-5705-83ba-9004-6b3c.text: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit is within 9" of this Fortification, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

abl-2728-2a25-69af-e7af.name: Malign Cover
abl-2728-2a25-69af-e7af.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-3a03-4856-4b7b-1500.name: Unholy Mechanisms (Aura)
abl-3a03-4856-4b7b-1500.text: While a friendly ^^**Daemon Vehicle^^** unit is within 6" of this model, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abl-197b-d89e-1c1-403e.name: Reorder Reality
abl-197b-d89e-1c1-403e.text: Each time an enemy unit within 18" of this model targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, until the end of the phase, that enemy unit’s ranged weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

abl-64ff-296e-1888-c965.name: Indentured Daemon Engines
abl-64ff-296e-1888-c965.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Daemon Vehicle^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-523c-b544-ceaa-d678.name: Twisted Defence Force
abl-523c-b544-ceaa-d678.text: While this unit is within range of an **objective**, this unit has +1 **Sv** against ranged attacks.

abl-ef6b-2cae-1cbb-d852.name: Bestial Raiders
abl-ef6b-2cae-1cbb-d852.text: If this unit begins the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting it up on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abl-dc1c-ffcb-1af3-f0ba.name: Leader
abl-dc1c-ffcb-1af3-f0ba.text:
This unit can be attached to the following unit:
■ TRAITOR GUARDSMAN SQUAD

abl-9790-a17e-ac54-32a5.name: Brutal Example
abl-9790-a17e-ac54-32a5.text: Once per turn, while this unit is leading a unit and contains a TRAITOR ENFORCER model, you can target that unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit from your army with that Stratagem this phase. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

abl-3a6a-659b-9b4f-9935.name: Mutated Bodyguard
abl-3a6a-659b-9b4f-9935.text: While this unit contains a Traitor Ogryn model, CHARACTER models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-4fb4-b526-6d97-590f.name: Assault Ramp
abl-4fb4-b526-6d97-590f.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abl-4c0f-1b93-e310-b2a8.name: Annihilator
abl-4c0f-1b93-e310-b2a8.text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** model, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abl-d19-9fc5-aa23-7917.name: Destructor
abl-d19-9fc5-aa23-7917.text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model targets an enemy INFANTRY unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-f6b2-f972-4ae4-64b8.name: Siege Shield
abl-f6b2-f972-4ae4-64b8.text: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abl-49a0-fe58-5293-bdc2.name: Daemonic Ordnance
abl-49a0-fe58-5293-bdc2.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, its ranged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities.

abl-babb-69e4-f411-e65a.name: Dark Ascension (Aura)
abl-babb-69e4-f411-e65a.text: While a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, its weapons gain both abilities conferred by that pact (instead of only one).

abl-2a50-924a-8b28-3d6c.name: Devoted to Destruction
abl-2a50-924a-8b28-3d6c.text: If this model is equipped with 2 melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristics of those 2 weapons.

abl-17bd-f4a1-e0a4-41ea.name: Airborne Predator
abl-17bd-f4a1-e0a4-41ea.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-a03e-2570-1658-1bc2.name: Siege Crawler
abl-a03e-2570-1658-1bc2.text: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this model's Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abl-a644-3be-2811-84d9.name: Self-repair
abl-a644-3be-2811-84d9.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abl-7969-df81-af2e-e24a.name: Plough Through the Enemy
abl-7969-df81-af2e-e24a.text: In the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, if this model destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-f539-f61e-3cd0-aaf4.name: Damaged: 1-8 wounds remaining
abl-f539-f61e-3cd0-aaf4.text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-4dbc-fdb1-8acf-8009.name: Mind-breaking Mutations (Aura)
abl-4dbc-fdb1-8acf-8009.text: While an enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

abl-f1b7-0b82-1c9a-41cf.name: Blood Surge
abl-f1b7-0b82-1c9a-41cf.text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

abl-e7b1-66a8-2f3e-eddc.name: Icon of Khorne
abl-e7b1-66a8-2f3e-eddc.text: Each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain one Bloodshed point. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6 for each Bloodshed point you have, after which, all your Bloodshed points are lost.

abl-e09b-489-1a91-ec60.name: Bringers of Change
abl-e09b-489-1a91-ec60.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-34b5-faea-6f0b-f390.name: Icon of Flame
abl-34b5-faea-6f0b-f390.text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit (excluding ^^**Characters^^**) have the [Ignores Cover] ability.

abl-3dbe-cb64-74a8-e8c8.name: Infused with the Blessings of Nurgle
abl-3dbe-cb64-74a8-e8c8.text: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is Afflicted.

abl-3ae3-84a6-7d88-ef2a.name: Icon of Despair
abl-3ae3-84a6-7d88-ef2a.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abl-8bd6-39f6-fb5e-5a64.name: Bomb Rack
abl-8bd6-39f6-fb5e-5a64.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-ba2d-d63f-9419-8c2b.name: Interceptor
abl-ba2d-d63f-9419-8c2b.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-2308-68c1-23e7-d03e.name: Leader
abl-2308-68c1-23e7-d03e.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- RUBRIC MARINES

abl-2aca-579b-16a9-8d17.name: Flames of Change (Psychic)
abl-2aca-579b-16a9-8d17.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-9260-be63-1022-bb17.name: Altered Reality (Psychic)
abl-9260-be63-1022-bb17.text: Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw is made for this model, you can change the result of that roll to a 6.

abl-67a8-8a91-4d6e-b60.name: Leader
abl-67a8-8a91-4d6e-b60.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ PLAGUE MARINES

abl-e07-9b91-761a-7525.name: Gift of Poxes (Psychic)
abl-e07-9b91-761a-7525.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-69df-ae7-45f0-7e09.name: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)
abl-69df-ae7-45f0-7e09.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.

abl-257a-37b6-4155-9e35.name: Leader
abl-257a-37b6-4155-9e35.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES
■ PLAGUE MARINES

abl-f6e0-919a-edb9-cf88.name: Revolting Regeneration
abl-f6e0-919a-edb9-cf88.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abl-d341-9ddf-6c27-7710.name: Leader
abl-d341-9ddf-6c27-7710.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ CHOSEN
■ LEGIONARIES
■ RUBRIC MARINES

abl-90fa-2921-2676-8ef2.name: Lord of Fate
abl-90fa-2921-2676-8ef2.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

abl-a95e-1bbe-8a69-fb65.name: Leader
abl-a95e-1bbe-8a69-fb65.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ CHAOS BIKERS
■ KHORNE BERZERKERS

abl-31a3-c206-25b0-1bdd.name: Bloody Stampede
abl-31a3-c206-25b0-1bdd.text: Each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-53e6-26a4-2db4-2769.name: Leader
abl-53e6-26a4-2db4-2769.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ CHAOS BIKERS

abl-9b52-dd5f-4634-cd81.name: Cut Off Their Escape
abl-9b52-dd5f-4634-cd81.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of this model’s unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abl-605f-d148-e8cf-47c4.name: Leader
abl-605f-d148-e8cf-47c4.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- CHAOS BIKERS

abl-cddc-6f53-8567-915b.name: Infernal Speed
abl-cddc-6f53-8567-915b.text: While this model is leading a unit, change the Move characteristic of models in that unit to 14".

abl-c2f-9287-6547-ba56.name: Dark Favour (Psychic)
abl-c2f-9287-6547-ba56.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-cee6-b256-80d9-9a79.name: Mischief Makers (Aura)
abl-cee6-b256-80d9-9a79.text: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-6c0e-1986-f874-6303.name: Brutal Example
abl-6c0e-1986-f874-6303.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can target that unit with the Insane Bravery Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase. Each time you use this ability, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

abl-67a7-ec29-b386-dbdc.name: Enforcer
abl-67a7-ec29-b386-dbdc.text: This model's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-cf8c-292d-1477-cc54.name: Leader
abl-cf8c-292d-1477-cc54.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ TRAITOR GUARDSMEN SQUAD
■ RENEGADE HEAVY WEAPONS SQUAD

abl-a9fb-fba8-1ef8-d7d6.name: Covering Fire
abl-a9fb-fba8-1ef8-d7d6.text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

abl-9435-655b-7c9-bbf0.name: Wall of Muscle
abl-9435-655b-7c9-bbf0.text: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-28fc-aa8-d207-225b.name: Crushing Charge
abl-28fc-aa8-d207-225b.text: You can re-roll charge rolls made for this unit, and each time this unit makes a Charge move, select one enemy unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-3a6c-9596-4911-4869.name: Ogryn Combat Stimms
abl-3a6c-9596-4911-4869.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-278a-3fda-28cf-bbf1.name: Leader
abl-278a-3fda-28cf-bbf1.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ACCURSED CULTISTS
■ CULTIST MOB
■ NEGAVOLT CULTISTS

abl-23f5-de7-b1f3-e52f.name: Cursed Wardings (Psychic)
abl-23f5-de7-b1f3-e52f.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abl-67c4-ee1f-58d4-1782.name: Psychic Barrier (Psychic)
abl-67c4-ee1f-58d4-1782.text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this PSYKER’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-d7bc-d135-1105-a2cb.name: Voltagheist Field
abl-d7bc-d135-1105-a2cb.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-c802-4983-f7fc-7d80.name: Servants of the Abyss
abl-c802-4983-f7fc-7d80.text: If a unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a CULTIST MOB, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-f03b-e2f1-818e-c766.name: Prescience (Psychic)
abl-f03b-e2f1-818e-c766.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-b767-e5f2-4f28-f881.name: Unholy Power
abl-b767-e5f2-4f28-f881.text: Each time this model's unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-d4ac-24b9-1b80-6768.name: Beastmaster
abl-d4ac-24b9-1b80-6768.text: While this unit contains an Ogryn Pack Master model, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and each time a Chaos Mauler Hound model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-82e1-6f7d-bf8f-3b9d.name: Swift Assault
abl-82e1-6f7d-bf8f-3b9d.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abl-6b52-8588-e3f-addc.name: Armoured Spearhead
abl-6b52-8588-e3f-addc.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-c7c1-daef-4791-caed.name: Cruel Hunter
abl-c7c1-daef-4791-caed.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit Piles In or Consolidates, each model in that unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

abl-ef41-acac-e863-bf71.name: Fiery Faith
abl-ef41-acac-e863-bf71.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Leadership tests taken for that unit.

abl-61f0-2fd7-148c-9f4f.name: Cursed Flames
abl-61f0-2fd7-148c-9f4f.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must make a Battle-shock test.

abl-6cf0-eb72-a1de-8b9b.name: For the Dark Gods
abl-6cf0-eb72-a1de-8b9b.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker  you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-cb72-1c0b-76ff-5950.name: Visions of Suffering (Psychic)
abl-cb72-1c0b-76ff-5950.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abl-91c7-ded2-ebcb-c423.name: Attached Unit
abl-91c7-ded2-ebcb-c423.text: If a CHARACTER UNIT unit from your army with the Leader ability (excluding EPIC HEROES) can be attached to a LEGIONARIES unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-3b70-a446-b26a-d12a.name: Voice eater
abl-3b70-a446-b26a-d12a.text: Enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) cannot be targeted with Stratagems while they are within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit.

abl-5061-a5fe-a681-8170.name: Terrifying Crescendo
abl-5061-a5fe-a681-8170.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

abl-6f1a-2bf4-afbe-9f4d.name: Fleet Command
abl-6f1a-2bf4-afbe-9f4d.text: After both players have deployed their armies, if this unit is on the battlefield (or any ^^**Transport**^^ it is embarked within is on the battlefield) select up to three ^^**Heretic Astartes**^^ units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-16e3-f135-7928-7da5.name: Plunder
abl-16e3-f135-7928-7da5.text: Once per battle, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of it and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

abl-e9ae-9319-b5a5-5e5b.name: Masters of the Maelstrom
abl-e9ae-9319-b5a5-5e5b.text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one of the following units. This unit then counts as part of that unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.
- ^^**Chosen, Legionaries, Red Corsairs Raiders**^^


This unit cannot join an Attached unit, and only ^^**Huron Blackheart**^^ can join a unit this unit has joined.

abl-59fa-760d-d41c-7d60.name: Choice Samples
abl-59fa-760d-d41c-7d60.text: While this unit's Garreon the Corpsemaster model is on the battlefield, in your Command phase, select one of the following: you can return one destroyed model (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to this unit, or, if one or more ^^**Heretic Astartes Infantry**^^ units from your army are below Starting Strength and within 3" of this unit, you gain 1CP.

abl-58c4-0050-c6ad-41f0.name: Trophy Takers
abl-58c4-0050-c6ad-41f0.text: The first time this unit destroys an enemy unit, until the end of the battle, while this unit is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

abl-4307-c259-a951-a974.name: Attached Unit
abl-4307-c259-a951-a974.text: If a ^^**Character**^^ unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Legionaries**^^ unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-5676-8bc3-fdc1-cd3c.name: Brutal Raider
abl-5676-8bc3-fdc1-cd3c.text: Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abl-40da-ec25-a606-f6d6.name: Raider's Due
abl-40da-ec25-a606-f6d6.text: Each time this unit declares a Charge that targets one or more units that are within range of one or more objective markers, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

abl-312d-b603-949a-e8dd.name: Leader
abl-312d-b603-949a-e8dd.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chosen, Legionaries, Red Corsairs Raiders**^^

abl-458a-f7f3-eafd-2ff8.name: Leader
abl-458a-f7f3-eafd-2ff8.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chosen, Havocs, Legionaries, Nemesis Claw, Raiders**^^

abl-a19f-21a9-4bec-2ddd.name: Marked by the Dark Gods
abl-a19f-21a9-4bec-2ddd.text: Each time this model makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abl-1f87-b4f7-73b2-0e2b.name: Gift of Chaos (Psychic)
abl-1f87-b4f7-73b2-0e2b.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, after resolving its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that had the [^^PSYCHIC^^} ability. That unit must take a Leadership test. If it fails, it suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-f709-520f-163e-cbcf.name: Skulking Nightmare
abl-f709-520f-163e-cbcf.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Heretic Astartes Infantry**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-6050-f4cc-b075-e5cf.name: Scuttling Walker
abl-6050-f4cc-b075-e5cf.text: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding ^^**Titanic**^^ models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abl-68ed-ed87-1f92-c6e6.name: Daemonforge
abl-68ed-ed87-1f92-c6e6.text:
Each time this unit makes a Dark Pact, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. In addition, once per battle, when this unit makes a Dark Pact, before making the resulting Leadership test, you can declare it will overcharge its daemonforge. If it does: 
- If the resulting Leadership test is failed, this model suffers 3 mortal wounds instead of D3 mortal wounds.
- Until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-dd97-3f1f-328b-3e82.name: Headlong Destruction
abl-dd97-3f1f-328b-3e82.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-ef2f-d232-e25b-83a0.name: Architect of Ruin
abl-ef2f-d232-e25b-83a0.text: At the start of the battle, select one unit in your opponent’s army to be this model’s hated foe. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its hated foe, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s hated foe is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its hated foe.

abl-f2db-ce7a-312b-bdb2.name: Leader
abl-f2db-ce7a-312b-bdb2.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Chaos Terminator Squad, Mutilators, Obliterators.**^^

abl-a62-2152-78a8-d7c8.name: Death Guard Defenders
abl-a62-2152-78a8-d7c8.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-0f8a-2008-862e-8af6.name: Fevered Strategist
abl-0f8a-2008-862e-8af6.text: Once per Battle Round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-0c92-aa1c-c7e5-a527.name: Miasma of Pestilence (Aura)
abl-0c92-aa1c-c7e5-a527.text: While a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-8ce2-6dec-6caf-3777.name: Horrifying Visage
abl-8ce2-6dec-6caf-3777.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abl-e98-fdf-85f6-5c44.name: Enfeebling Miasma (Aura)
abl-e98-fdf-85f6-5c44.text: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^*Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abl-77d-6b50-56be-1c71.name: Leader
abl-77d-6b50-56be-1c71.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ ^^**Blightlord Terminators^^**
■ ^^**Deathshroud Terminators^^**
■ ^^**Poxwalkers^^**

abl-e1de-40a6-c9a9-7316.name: The Destroyer Hive
abl-e1de-40a6-c9a9-7316.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-595f-4a7d-3845-2131.name: Eater Plague (Psychic)
abl-595f-4a7d-3845-2131.text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this ^^**Psyker^^** (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this ^^**Psyker^^** and roll one D6: on a 1, this ^^**Psyker^^**'s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-90a2-1895-2e96-d987.name: Leader
abl-90a2-1895-2e96-d987.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ BLIGHTLORD TERMINATORS
■ DEATHSHROUD TERMINATORS

abl-c011-8b42-c9f3-e3cc.name: Virulent Aura
abl-c011-8b42-c9f3-e3cc.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-b-b5eb-2ac6-b6df.name: Blight Bombardment
abl-b-b5eb-2ac6-b6df.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 (if that attack is made with a Blast weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead).

abl-e778-6ccb-2016-6cb5.name: Leader
abl-e778-6ccb-2016-6cb5.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Blightlord Terminators^^**
- ^^**Deathshroud Terminators^^**

abl-df3c-ad72-1ad5-4d0d.name: Vector of Disease
abl-df3c-ad72-1ad5-4d0d.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[Sustained Hits 1]** and **[Lance]** abilties.

abl-e96b-953c-dbe9-f622.name: Unholy Resilience
abl-e96b-953c-dbe9-f622.text: The first time a model with this ability is destroyed in a battle round, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining. Each model can only be set up in this way once per battle.

abl-c9ea-1d59-9bf-bb00.name: Putrescent Vitality (Psychic)
abl-c9ea-1d59-9bf-bb00.text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in this PSYKER’s unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-6dc6-e465-e8ff-a4eb.name: Pestilent Familiar (Psychic)
abl-6dc6-e465-e8ff-a4eb.text: Once per battle, after selecting targets for a Psychic weapon equipped by this model, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 2.

abl-20c4-9b25-4f77-852e.name: Gift of Contagion (Psychic)
abl-20c4-9b25-4f77-852e.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack which targets a unit which is Afflicted, that attack has the [Sustained Hits 1] ability.

abl-4108-2036-c473-aa46.name: Pestilent Fallout (Psychic)
abl-4108-2036-c473-aa46.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Plague Wind. Until the end of your opponent's next turn, that unit is enfeebled. While a unit is enfeebled, subtract 2" from the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-290-e59f-d3bd-9a68.name: Leader
abl-290-e59f-d3bd-9a68.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
^^**Plague Marines^^**, ^^**Poxwalkers^^**

abl-7f4f-bece-9a6f-8b55.name: Icon of Despair (Aura)
abl-7f4f-bece-9a6f-8b55.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abl-ad92-6478-18b8-6222.name: Curse of the Walking Pox
abl-ad92-6478-18b8-6222.text:
Each time a ^^**Poxwalker^^** model in this unit makes an attack that destroys an enemy model (excluding ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models), after this unit has resolved its attacks, you can return one destroyed ^^**Poxwalker^^** model to this unit.

While ^^**Typhus^^** is leading this unit, enemy models destroyed as a result of ^^**Typhus^^**’ Eater Plague ability count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a ^^**Poxwalker^^** model in this unit for the purposes of this ability.

abl-67fb-5245-68ef-56de.name: Sickening Vitality
abl-67fb-5245-68ef-56de.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-617e-b283-8a90-df5a.name: Tocsin of Misery (Aura)
abl-617e-b283-8a90-df5a.text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a ^^**Psyker^^** unit.

abl-5df1-a522-e690-dddc.name: Leader
abl-5df1-a522-e690-dddc.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Plague Marines^^**, ^^**Poxwalkers^^**
*You can attach this model to a ^^**Plague Marines^^** or ^^**Poxwalkers^^** unit, even if one other Leader unit has already been attached to it (you cannot attach more than one of the same Leader to the same unit). If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

abl-f33c-eeb8-429d-2a2f.name: Putrefying Stink
abl-f33c-eeb8-429d-2a2f.text: Enemy models cannot start or end an Advance move within 9" of this model.

abl-be78-8c3d-c31a-67f5.name: Blinding Spray
abl-be78-8c3d-c31a-67f5.text: In the Fight phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability to use this ability. If you do, until the end of that phase, that model's unit has the Fights First ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per battle.

abl-ebdf-6359-5f8e-4079.name: Extraction of Fresh Disease
abl-ebdf-6359-5f8e-4079.text: The first time this model's unit destroys an enemy unit as a result of a melee attack, until the end of the battle, add 6 to the Objective Control characteristic of this model.

abl-a1e3-4ac3-299c-1417.name: Foul Infusion
abl-a1e3-4ac3-299c-1417.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only on a 6.

abl-4b43-4623-e0e1-f159.name: Malicious Calculations
abl-4b43-4623-e0e1-f159.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abl-a8a2-18de-801d-6470.name: Seven-fold Chant
abl-a8a2-18de-801d-6470.text: In your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, roll 2D6: on a 7+, you gain 1CP.

abl-61c7-91ec-614-fa78.name: Tainted Narthecium
abl-61c7-91ec-614-fa78.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abl-96ee-97c4-3b67-e45.name: Inflamed Infections
abl-96ee-97c4-3b67-e45.text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. If that unit is below Half-strength, an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit instead.

abl-a4ac-68a4-3849-3695.name: Silent Bodyguard
abl-a4ac-68a4-3849-3695.text: While a ^^**Character^^** model is leading this unit, that ^^**Character^^** model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-4245-0a58-3995-1671.name: Death Approaches
abl-4245-0a58-3995-1671.text: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all Afflicted enemy units, and more than 8" horizontally away from any other enemy units.

abl-39dd-f8e7-418a-a141.name: Diseased Malice
abl-39dd-f8e7-418a-a141.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an Afflicted unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-af7f-a1a3-d20e-9c.name: Froth-spattered Frenzy
abl-af7f-a1a3-d20e-9c.text: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

abl-c485-d6a6-8913-c29a.name: Blistering Fusillade
abl-c485-d6a6-8913-c29a.text: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 5 or more, or if a ^^**Character^^** is leading this unit, then each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

abl-345b-e060-85c4-3a04.name: Lethal Ichor
abl-345b-e060-85c4-3a04.text: Each time a melee attack is allocated to a model in this unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-e47-254c-cdf9-7c5e.name: Tank Hunters
abl-e47-254c-cdf9-7c5e.text: In your Shooting phase, each time a model in this unit makes a attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-b2e1-4694-48b-7f46.name: Hovering Death
abl-b2e1-4694-48b-7f46.text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-51dd-7b91-7f32-bd8f.name: Spore-laced Shock Waves
abl-51dd-7b91-7f32-bd8f.text: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model's Plagueburst mortar, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit, adding 1 to that roll if the unit being rolled for is Afflicted. On a 6+, the unit being rolled for is struck by spores; after resolving all of this model's attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by spores suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-a5c8-bcd-15d5-32ae.name: Metalophagic Infection
abl-a5c8-bcd-15d5-32ae.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 5+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-d42e-f8ea-a29a-2766.name: Hail of Corrosive Disease
abl-d42e-f8ea-a29a-2766.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friending ^^**Death Guard^^** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

abl-c0c9-74ff-68a4-bbec.name: Fire Support
abl-c0c9-74ff-68a4-bbec.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport**^^ this turn makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-f80d-c92e-8aa-d3d1.name: Host of Plagues
abl-f80d-c92e-8aa-d3d1.text: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-5ab4-d691-93a8-3d21.name: Lord of the Death Guard
abl-5ab4-d691-93a8-3d21.text: Once per turn, this model can use one of the Lord of the Death Guard abilties.

abl-518f-419c-f428-4fb9.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abl-518f-419c-f428-4fb9.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-b063-b5e6-8bb1-83ab.name: Unclean Icon
abl-b063-b5e6-8bb1-83ab.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-57f2-2abe-dcb7-2355.name: Blessed Icon of Disease
abl-57f2-2abe-dcb7-2355.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-f006-4a66-c5fb-edcd.name: Putrescent Fog (Aura)
abl-f006-4a66-c5fb-edcd.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abl-7d03-829f-56a1-940d.name: Diseased Cover
abl-7d03-829f-56a1-940d.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this **^^Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-2e2d-33de-e666-96f9.name: Deployment
abl-2e2d-33de-e666-96f9.text: Both parts of this ^^**Fortification**^^ must be deployed within 1" of each other. Both parts are then treated as a single model for all rules purposes.

abl-afa3-246b-8181-9a00.name: Lord of Chaos
abl-afa3-246b-8181-9a00.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-b147-cef6-450f-b85e.name: Infectious Bloodshed
abl-b147-cef6-450f-b85e.text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-22b2-d9d0-69ed-4540.name: Diseased icon
abl-22b2-d9d0-69ed-4540.text: Melee weapons in the bearer's unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-f412-30f2-fadf-2a88.name: Leader
abl-f412-30f2-fadf-2a88.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Plague Marines^^**

abl-fdc4-152d-ed64-4ff7.name: Gift of Poxes
abl-fdc4-152d-ed64-4ff7.text: Add 3" to the range of this model's Contagion Range.

abl-4acf-b450-25c4-fe66.name: Shroud of Disease
abl-4acf-b450-25c4-fe66.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking unit is within 18".

abl-5bca-e25c-b5a7-0670.name: Daemon Lord of Nurgle (Aura)
abl-5bca-e25c-b5a7-0670.text: While a friendly ^^Plague Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-dbf3-eb68-32ee-5cac.name: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)
abl-dbf3-eb68-32ee-5cac.text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that unit is rotted. While a unit is rotted, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-dad6-3637-d427-efee.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abl-dad6-3637-d427-efee.text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-2179-a9f0-2bbf-85a5.name: Virulent Blessing (Psychic)
abl-2179-a9f0-2bbf-85a5.text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a ^^**Plague Legions^^** model is allocated to a model in that unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-feaf-5fb0-18a5-2834.name: Deluge of Nurgle (Aura)
abl-feaf-5fb0-18a5-2834.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, subtract 2 from the Move characteristic and subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-96e0-4568-6c3f-47dc.name: Infected Outbreak
abl-96e0-4568-6c3f-47dc.text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-700d-3310-5e09-f754.name: Daemonic Icon
abl-700d-3310-5e09-f754.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

abl-051c-0336-f156-ca63.name: Instrument of Chaos
abl-051c-0336-f156-ca63.text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abl-8da3-6aff-8906-96b2.name: Death’s Heads
abl-8da3-6aff-8906-96b2.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-fc0f-94b2-caf8-5c06.name: Grotesque Regeneration
abl-fc0f-94b2-caf8-5c06.text: At the end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost any wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all of its lost wounds.

abl-d2a9-5017-31c5-378e.name: Mischief Makers (Aura)
abl-d2a9-5017-31c5-378e.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^Titanic^^ units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-2f84-c15e-e6e9-b7f8.name: Explosive Blight
abl-2f84-c15e-e6e9-b7f8.text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that destroys an enemy unit, before removing the last model in that unit from play, roll a D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 5+, each enemy unit within 6" of that model is Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

abl-b3d3-39f2-9432-a856.name: Gift of Contagion (Psychic)
abl-b3d3-39f2-9432-a856.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Afflicted, that attack has the [Sustained Hits 1] ability.

abl-78e7-f41c-53c5-0b6f.name: Leader
abl-78e7-f41c-53c5-0b6f.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Plague Marines, Poxwalkers**^^

abl-fc56-6b18-1238-54b3.name: Leader
abl-fc56-6b18-1238-54b3.text: This unit can be attached to the following units: ^^**Plague Marines, Poxwalkers**^^

abl-4aeb-d675-b699-1130.name: Barrage of Filth
abl-4aeb-d675-b699-1130.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-68a4-911a-c03c-2cf4.name: Leader
abl-68a4-911a-c03c-2cf4.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Flawless Blades^^**

abl-5909-fd1b-aabd-8cf6.name: Duellist’s Hubris
abl-5909-fd1b-aabd-8cf6.text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

abl-01a5-5e86-b905-a68c.name: A Challenge Worthy of Skill
abl-01a5-5e86-b905-a68c.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Character, Monster^^** or **^^Walker^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-444e-1e09-a6c8-f8ec.name: Daemonic Poisons
abl-444e-1e09-a6c8-f8ec.text: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player's Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-ca20-91b8-b9e8-c14d.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh
abl-ca20-91b8-b9e8-c14d.text: At the start of your opponent's Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Daemon Prince of Slaanesh section. Until the start of your opponent's next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abl-af1c-9f7a-30bf-7eb0.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abl-af1c-9f7a-30bf-7eb0.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-498c-ad14-6e2b-bbfb.name: Supreme Commander
abl-498c-ad14-6e2b-bbfb.text: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abl-9842-31b9-4cb1-d821.name: Serpentine
abl-9842-31b9-4cb1-d821.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

abl-197e-a2ea-b468-48d9.name: Perfectionists
abl-197e-a2ea-b468-48d9.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **^^[LETHAL HITS]^^** ability.

abl-828a-cdf4-e64a-cf75.name: Euphoric Strikes
abl-828a-cdf4-e64a-cf75.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does so, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abl-3cf5-ff3c-e78d-51c8.name: Lord of the Host
abl-3cf5-ff3c-e78d-51c8.text: If this model is attached to an **^^Emperor's Children Battleline^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" ability.

abl-8799-26c2-ca52-3969.name: Leader
abl-8799-26c2-ca52-3969.text: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Tormentors^^**

abl-7e47-d44e-0c0d-86d4.name: Leader
abl-7e47-d44e-0c0d-86d4.text: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Emperor's Children Terminator Squad; Noise Marines^^**

abl-8fdb-0d21-37f4-ecca.name: Obsessive Annunciation
abl-8fdb-0d21-37f4-ecca.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-f8bf-39ff-4779-40f2.name: Doom Siren
abl-f8bf-39ff-4779-40f2.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-3d6e-dbc8-ccd2-cb3d.name: Leader
abl-3d6e-dbc8-ccd2-cb3d.text: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Noise Marines; Tormentors^^**

abl-cefa-0b6a-caf2-7790.name: Warped Interference (Psychic)
abl-cefa-0b6a-caf2-7790.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-7485-ffb5-b729-f8b2.name: Wracking Agonies (Psychic)
abl-7485-ffb5-b729-f8b2.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from charge rolls made for it.

abl-e6ea-7b81-ac62-18b5.name: Lord of Excess
abl-e6ea-7b81-ac62-18b5.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Slaanesh Infantry^^**, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-222f-a01c-620b-a089.name: Excessive Vigour (Aura)
abl-222f-a01c-620b-a089.text: While a friendly **^^Slaanesh^^** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that unit by 1.

abl-9a99-ab28-dcc6-bc4c.name: Ecstatic Death
abl-9a99-ab28-dcc6-bc4c.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-33de-9a37-baa6-5a99.name: Daemonic Destruction
abl-33de-9a37-baa6-5a99.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6 for each of this model's remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

abl-913e-136d-35d5-5c63.name: Stimulated by Pain
abl-913e-136d-35d5-5c63.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-b7d5-8896-8643-e2a9.name: Objective Defiled
abl-b7d5-8896-8643-e2a9.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abl-54b6-52b7-2959-e73b.name: Icon of Excess
abl-54b6-52b7-2959-e73b.text: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

abl-c48a-62e2-8628-b37d.name: Excessive Assault
abl-c48a-62e2-8628-b37d.text: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-49c8-2d8a-5a03-49bb.name: Daemonic Patrons
abl-49c8-2d8a-5a03-49bb.text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack. an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound. At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

abl-9123-44f5-7680-f937.name: Lethal Obsession
abl-9123-44f5-7680-f937.text:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, you can use this ability. If you do, select one enemy unit hit by those ranged attacks. Until the end of the turn, when this unit **declares a charge**: 
- This unit can re-roll that **charge roll**. 
- This unit must end that **charge move engaged** with that enemy unit.

abl-d63b-edb5-4839-ab4f.name: Scuttling Horrors
abl-d63b-edb5-4839-ab4f.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6”.

abl-b146-5f0b-e066-d4c4.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abl-b146-5f0b-e066-d4c4.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-fce6-a633-eb26-3405.name: Airborne Predator
abl-fce6-a633-eb26-3405.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll two D6, adding 1 to each result if that enemy unit can ^^FLY^^: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-c3f4-464b-3d82-f42f.name: Glutton for Punishment
abl-c3f4-464b-3d82-f42f.text: Each time this model makes an attack, if it is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If this model is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abl-629b-52e7-f21d-1c5f.name: Assault Vehicle
abl-629b-52e7-f21d-1c5f.text: Units can disembark from this **^^Vehicle**^^ after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

abl-3b35-7ada-515d-bafb.name: No Prey Can Evade
abl-3b35-7ada-515d-bafb.text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

abl-712d-b14d-a795-ba99.name: Monarch of the Hunt
abl-712d-b14d-a795-ba99.text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model's quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's quarry.

abl-30a1-8f15-f406-fa7b.name: Daemon Lord of Slaanesh (Aura)
abl-30a1-8f15-f406-fa7b.text: While a friendly ^^**Legions of Excess**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration of melee weapons in that unit by 1.

abl-6b94-cd14-0032-418a.name: Mesmerising Form
abl-6b94-cd14-0032-418a.text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-7c36-30a7-b3c1-e8a8.name: Shining aegis
abl-7c36-30a7-b3c1-e8a8.text: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.

abl-b21d-e2b2-9f2e-080f.name: Horrifying Beauty
abl-b21d-e2b2-9f2e-080f.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit in Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-dacf-941e-a9f5-1af2.name: Daemonic Icon
abl-dacf-941e-a9f5-1af2.text: Models in the bearer's unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

abl-8432-21e4-e194-f594.name: Instrument of Chaos
abl-8432-21e4-e194-f594.text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

abl-a4c2-5801-31fa-8504.name: Soporific Musk
abl-a4c2-5801-31fa-8504.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and **^^Vehicles**^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abl-19ac-8b47-64c3-5543.name: Unholy Speed
abl-19ac-8b47-64c3-5543.text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abl-ee60-c75c-21c7-cb6f.name: Leader
abl-ee60-c75c-21c7-cb6f.text: This unit can be attached to the following units: ^^**Infractors, Noise Marines, Tormentors**^^

abl-2474-128e-5834-0962.name: Warped Invigoration (Psychic)
abl-2474-128e-5834-0962.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of the turn, add 1 to Charge rolls made for this unit.

abl-ce51-709e-a750-e68e.name: Euphoric Strikes
abl-ce51-709e-a750-e68e.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

abl-d326-df2a-80de-e788.name: Leader
abl-d326-df2a-80de-e788.text: This unit can be attached to the following units: ^^**Flawless Blades**^^

abl-7abf-3fe8-dc7d-1522.name: Obsessive Huntsman
abl-7abf-3fe8-dc7d-1522.text: Melee weapons equipped by this model have the [Precision] ability.

abl-bc7f-0ec2-0362-718e.name: Revel in Desecration
abl-bc7f-0ec2-0362-718e.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is not below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-8f1d-56cb-a37f-2a5e.name: Scryer of Fates (Psychic)
abl-8f1d-56cb-a37f-2a5e.text: if your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to 3 ^^**Thousand Sons^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-e117-9164-7606-ef92.name: Arch-Sorcerer of Tzeentch (Psychic)
abl-e117-9164-7606-ef92.text: Each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

abl-e029-9e54-4a48-28ce.name: Leader
abl-e029-9e54-4a48-28ce.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines, Tzaangor Enlightened, Tzaangor Enlightened with Fatecaster Greatbows^^**

abl-0886-6e3f-6dbb-714a.name: Assault Ramp
abl-0886-6e3f-6dbb-714a.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this ^^**Transport^^** after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abl-efa5-c1d9-a512-e566.name: Ensorcelled Annihilation
abl-efa5-c1d9-a512-e566.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit that was hit by one or more Psychic attacks made by a ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** unit from your army this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abl-7391-4352-7193-9a16.name: Ensorcelled Destruction
abl-7391-4352-7193-9a16.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more Psychic attacks made by a ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** unit from your army this turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-f4bb-1a4c-7d23-cc29.name: Sorcerous Support
abl-f4bb-1a4c-7d23-cc29.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport^^** this turn makes a Psychic attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-a5f9-99af-66fe-6d3e.name: Regenerating Monstrosities
abl-a5f9-99af-66fe-6d3e.text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, one model in this unit regains up to 3 lost wounds.

abl-36f6-15a1-62fa-112b.name: Arcane Shield (Psychic)
abl-36f6-15a1-62fa-112b.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-c0cb-da23-5ff0-80d5.name: Rebind Rubricae (Psychic)
abl-c0cb-da23-5ff0-80d5.text: In your Command phase, if this model is leading a unit, you can roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit; on a 6, you can return up to 2 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

abl-da97-ede2-a5bc-461d.name: Leader
abl-da97-ede2-a5bc-461d.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines^^**

abl-b7bd-2ab0-8ca3-2791.name: Arcane Shield (Psychic)
abl-b7bd-2ab0-8ca3-2791.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abl-f261-3205-ade9-f73f.name: Binding Tendrils (Psychic)
abl-f261-3205-ade9-f73f.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with Arcane Fire. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is ensnared. While a unit is ensnared, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abl-7343-a940-ca1d-83f4.name: Leader
abl-7343-a940-ca1d-83f4.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines, Tzaangor Enlightened^^**

abl-8239-ce8a-d631-2641.name: Blazing Salvos
abl-8239-ce8a-d631-2641.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

abl-a1c6-3496-6fe0-35b0.name: Terrifying Assault
abl-a1c6-3496-6fe0-35b0.text: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 if that unit is within 9" of one or more ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** units from your army.

abl-d704-4523-7eed-b79c.name: Devoted to Destruction
abl-d704-4523-7eed-b79c.text: If this model is equipped with 2 melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

abl-9220-7fa3-aa90-ce25.name: Flame-wreathed
abl-9220-7fa3-aa90-ce25.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-1ddc-603c-d82f-9ff1.name: Malefic Maelstrom (Psychic)
abl-1ddc-603c-d82f-9ff1.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-dd43-4cf0-2cac-a361.name: Glimpse of Eternity (Psychic)
abl-dd43-4cf0-2cac-a361.text: Once per turn, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

abl-5a62-494d-e767-a4ea.name: Unearthly Power
abl-5a62-494d-e767-a4ea.text: At the start of the battle round, select one of the abilities in the Crimson King section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

abl-fa66-e8ff-f857-f176.name: Lord of the Planet of the Sorcerers (Psychic)
abl-fa66-e8ff-f857-f176.text: This model can attempt up to 2 Rituals per turn instead of one, and each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 2 to the Psychic test result.

abl-3a97-0252-dc9f-86ed.name: Snarling Protector
abl-3a97-0252-dc9f-86ed.text:
You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do: 
- That use is ‑1 CP. 
- That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.
- When this unit **declares a charge**, if a friendly **engaged PSYKER** unit is within 12" of this unit, you can use this part of this ability. 
If you do: 
- This unit can re‑roll that **charge roll**. 
- This unit must end that **charge move engaged** with an enemy unit **engaged** with that friendly PSYKER unit.

abl-6ed0-e576-e445-2539.name: Mutating Vortex (Aura)
abl-6ed0-e576-e445-2539.text: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds. Each enemy unit within range of this ability must then take a Battle-shock test.

abl-4b6d-e4b8-2cfa-42a6.name: Immaterial Flare (Aura)
