abl-4b6d-e4b8-2cfa-42a6.text: While a friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** model is within 6" of this model, each time that model Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result. This is not cumulative with any other modifiers to the Psychic test result.

abl-9b81-e167-c93c-61d4.name: Bringers of Change
abl-9b81-e167-c93c-61d4.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the attack targets a unit within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-73ca-d5c2-f38-6dbf.name: Icon of Flame
abl-73ca-d5c2-f38-6dbf.text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit (excluding ^^**Characters^^**) have the [Ignores Cover] ability.

abl-c2fe-faec-47bc-82e8.name: Rites of Coalescence
abl-c2fe-faec-47bc-82e8.text:
While this unit contains one or more ^^**Psyker^^** models, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the
Wound roll.

abl-3f72-d7a7-dce1-8da4.name: Twisted Sorceries (Psychic)
abl-3f72-d7a7-dce1-8da4.text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by this model by 3.

abl-f69f-b275-2ada-7881.name: Leader
abl-f69f-b275-2ada-7881.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Scarab Occult Terminators^^**

abl-8c56-bbd9-5aa5-21f0.name: Marked by Fate (Psychic)
abl-8c56-bbd9-5aa5-21f0.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit that is visible to this ^^**Psyker^^** model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-f7ea-e27e-52cc-8dd2.name: Spirit Snare
abl-f7ea-e27e-52cc-8dd2.text: Each time a friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker^^** model with the Cabal of Sorcerers ability is destroyed while within 9" of one or more models with this ability, select one of those models with this ability: until the end of the battle, each time the selected model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result (to a maximum of +2).

abl-aa29-af55-b319-e4d6.name: Servile Pawns
abl-aa29-af55-b319-e4d6.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-1bf0-2da1-b7fb-6fea.name: Glamour of Tzeentch (Aura, Psychic)
abl-1bf0-2da1-b7fb-6fea.text: While a friendly ^^**Thousand Sons Infantry^^** unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

abl-d2ea-4457-7ac2-7173.name: Aetherstride (Psychic)
abl-d2ea-4457-7ac2-7173.text:
In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an aetherstride. If it does:
- It can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
- Until the end of the turn, its Dark Blessing has the [Sustained Hits D3] ability.
- Until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-fee5-696a-3638-597a.name: Hunter of Souls
abl-fee5-696a-3638-597a.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1 (if that attack targets a ^^**Psyker Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll instead). Each time this model destroys a ^^**Character^^** unit, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds (if that ^^**Character^^** unit was a ^^**Psyker^^**, this model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead).

abl-87ae-4eaa-f9b8-465.name: Prophesied Doom
abl-87ae-4eaa-f9b8-465.text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-3988-e8af-dc19-633d.name: Sacrificial Blessing
abl-3988-e8af-dc19-633d.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, select one Bodyguard model in that unit; that Bodyguard model is destroyed and, until the end of the phase, add D3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by this model.

abl-e6fd-1844-f9b2-6f07.name: Bestial Prophet
abl-e6fd-1844-f9b2-6f07.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-e1d-5767-7ee4-befb.name: Leader
abl-e1d-5767-7ee4-befb.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Tzaangor Enlightened, Tzaangors^^**

abl-e13e-5ca3-104a-e002.name: Ambushing Hunters
abl-e13e-5ca3-104a-e002.text: At the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-346-999f-b6cd-5017.name: Brayhorn
abl-346-999f-b6cd-5017.text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

abl-d021-a400-9df6-2f4c.name: Herd banner
abl-d021-a400-9df6-2f4c.text: While the bearer's unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1.

abl-7d35-679f-6f0c-409c.name: Prophetic Sentinels
abl-7d35-679f-6f0c-409c.text: Once per turn, when you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch/ Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is ‑1 CP.

abl-8ed2-2c9a-0583-bef8.name: Malign Trickery
abl-8ed2-2c9a-0583-bef8.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abl-f742-c180-96c5-62d2.name: One Head Looks Forward
abl-f742-c180-96c5-62d2.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

abl-8d3c-9693-c0c1-e0a3.name: One Head Looks Back (Aura)
abl-8d3c-9693-c0c1-e0a3.text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-12f3-b721-1932-8ee5.name: Daemon Lord of Tzeentch (Aura)
abl-12f3-b721-1932-8ee5.text: While a friendly ^^**Scintillating Legions^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

abl-7f56-a990-4975-a998.name: Master of Magicks (Aura)
abl-7f56-a990-4975-a998.text: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities: [Ignores Cover], [Lethal Hits], [Sustained Hits D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model's Bolt of Change has that ability.

abl-9efd-122e-423a-7896.name: Bounding Leaps
abl-9efd-122e-423a-7896.text: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-e8a7-8852-d2e8-5bc2.name: Slashing Dive
abl-e8a7-8852-d2e8-5bc2.text: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-832f-23d6-7457-47af.name: Split
abl-832f-23d6-7457-47af.text: Each time a ^^**Pink Horror^^** or ^^**Blue Horror^^** model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a ^^**Pink Horror^^**, add 2 ^^**Blue Horror^^** models to this unit and if it was a ^^**Blue Horror^^**, add one ^^**Brimstone Horror^^** model to this unit.

abl-60d3-99c0-d375-b816.name: Horrors are Pink. Horrors are Blue. Where once there was one, now there are two.
abl-60d3-99c0-d375-b816.text:
If, at any point, this unit contains no ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, use the ^^Blue Horrors^^ datasheet for this unit. 

_Designer’s Note: While this unit contains one or more ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, the Sullen Malevolence and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit._

abl-6220-ee55-4d6e-9945.name: Daemonic Icon
abl-6220-ee55-4d6e-9945.text: Models in the bearer's unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+

abl-7436-510d-00ad-b01d.name: Split
abl-7436-510d-00ad-b01d.text: Each time a ^^Blue Horror^^ model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, add one ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model to this unit.

abl-bae3-531a-f3d0-7301.name: Sullen Malevolence (Aura)
abl-bae3-531a-f3d0-7301.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, if this unit contains one or more ^^**Blue Horror^^** models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

abl-d214-12b7-8993-e6f7.name: Exploding Horrors
abl-d214-12b7-8993-e6f7.text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one or more ^^**Brimstone Horror^^** models in this unit. For each ^^**Brimstone Horror^^** model you select, roll one D6: on a 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-94bd-5ae8-9743-dc80.name: Rebinding (Psychic)
abl-94bd-5ae8-9743-dc80.text: In your Command phase, if this model is leading a unit, you can roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, on a 2+, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abl-ea79-1a54-105c-e1cb.name: Leader
abl-ea79-1a54-105c-e1cb.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Rubric Marines**^^

abl-1933-fd17-ffe6-27c6.name: Leader
abl-1933-fd17-ffe6-27c6.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Tzaangors**^^

abl-5ff6-dbb7-2882-ff9e.name: Fate's Guide
abl-5ff6-dbb7-2882-ff9e.text: If this unit starts the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third turn, regardless of any mission rules. If this unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up this unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abl-4a4f-35c6-b9ee-b9f0.name: Destroyer of Futures
abl-4a4f-35c6-b9ee-b9f0.text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem. For each of those attacks that targets an enemy unit within 9" of one or more ^^**Thousand Sons Psyker**^^ units from your army, a hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ instead.

abl-c119-e343-c7ef-bd4c.name: Reborn in Blood
abl-c119-e343-c7ef-bd4c.text: At the start of the battle round, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is destroyed, you can use a triple 6 from that roll to use this ability instead of activating any Blessings of Khorne at the start of that battle round. If you do, this model is no longer destroyed and in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, it is set up anywhere on the battlefield using its Deep Strike ability, with 8 wounds remaining.

abl-0d65-4434-1179-25f7.name: Wrathful Presence
abl-0d65-4434-1179-25f7.text: At the start of the battle round, select one Wrathful Presence ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

abl-e84c-e5e3-3819-db1e.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abl-e84c-e5e3-3819-db1e.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-bf3d-552f-3273-5bad.name: Legendary Killer
abl-bf3d-552f-3273-5bad.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-f98c-6c6c-2f6b-4626.name: The Betrayer
abl-f98c-6c6c-2f6b-4626.text: At the end of your Charge phase, if this model is leading a unit and that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you must take a Leadership test for this model. If that test is failed, one Bodyguard model of your choice in that unit is destroyed.

abl-72fe-bca8-a252-eeb2.name: Berserker Frenzy
abl-72fe-bca8-a252-eeb2.text: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

abl-dbdd-7b38-8b6c-6969.name: Leader
abl-dbdd-7b38-8b6c-6969.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abl-06e3-9b06-7daf-0eb6.name: Leader
abl-06e3-9b06-7daf-0eb6.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abl-fdff-0173-0b41-c91e.name: Fire Riders
abl-fdff-0173-0b41-c91e.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When making a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abl-70d2-b9ab-32e6-5cc1.name: Bloody Stampede
abl-70d2-b9ab-32e6-5cc1.text: Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model, then roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-cc39-46f4-3101-c4f0.name: Lord of Murder
abl-cc39-46f4-3101-c4f0.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-9fd3-61f8-95ae-118a.name: Devastating Assault
abl-9fd3-61f8-95ae-118a.text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its hellforged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-e9b7-b101-3b05-2a0e.name: Direct the Slaughter
abl-e9b7-b101-3b05-2a0e.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-ef20-bc48-20c9-6af6.name: Bloodied Terror
abl-ef20-bc48-20c9-6af6.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-8d55-b620-1f13-577b.name: Swooping Predator
abl-8d55-b620-1f13-577b.text: Each time this model ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll 6 D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-b991-fcac-8127-89f9.name: Aggressive Advance
abl-b991-fcac-8127-89f9.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 10" and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally though terrain features.

abl-4bcb-02c4-0b6c-f6b9.name: Crush All Who Stand Before Us
abl-4bcb-02c4-0b6c-f6b9.text: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. When determining which models in this unit are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

abl-c217-2971-b9ed-1cb1.name: Leader
abl-c217-2971-b9ed-1cb1.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers^^**

abl-4f7f-4559-76e4-b73a.name: A Worthy Skull
abl-4f7f-4559-76e4-b73a.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's unit destroys a ^^**Character^^** model, you gain 1CP.

abl-22df-03a4-7b94-437f.name: Forwards, For Blood!
abl-22df-03a4-7b94-437f.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit and each time that unit makes a Blood Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 used to determine how far models in that unit move.

abl-98dc-e20d-8ee7-882c.name: Blood Surge
abl-98dc-e20d-8ee7-882c.text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+2".

abl-355d-5150-1982-17b2.name: Icon of Khorne
abl-355d-5150-1982-17b2.text: If the bearer's unit contains 1 or more Icons of Khorne, each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain one Bloodshed point. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6 for each Bloodshed point you have, after which, all your Bloodshed points are lost.

abl-cabc-c518-5262-d65e.name: Bloody Fury
abl-cabc-c518-5262-d65e.text:
- This unit’s ranged attacks that target the closest eligible target can re-roll **hit rolls**.
- When this unit **declares a charge**, you can use this part of this ability. 
If you do: 
-- This unit can re-roll that **charge roll**.
-- This unit must end that **charge move engaged** with the closest **charge target**.

abl-d6c1-e4e6-d70f-7ee7.name: Objective Ravaged
abl-d6c1-e4e6-d70f-7ee7.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abl-3070-b510-7093-db8f.name: Beacons of Rage (Aura)
abl-3070-b510-7093-db8f.text: While a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**), add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abl-6dfe-fb8a-bb6b-fd88.name: Rend and Tear
abl-6dfe-fb8a-bb6b-fd88.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Damage characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-b946-1c12-5192-5d2f.name: Blood-hungry Annihilator
abl-b946-1c12-5192-5d2f.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** target within 18", you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abl-307f-af7c-e7b6-a4b0.name: Punishing Suppression
abl-307f-af7c-e7b6-a4b0.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^*). Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-fbcf-c249-3a65-1b3e.name: Unleash Wrath
abl-fbcf-c249-3a65-1b3e.text:
At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up on the battlefield within 12" of this model; this model can then either:
- Shoot at that unit, but only if it is an eligible target.
- Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, this model does not receive any Charge bonus this turn).

abl-d4f7-face-042b-a10d.name: Furious Onslaught
abl-d4f7-face-042b-a10d.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-2f94-5892-1327-89f6.name: Frenzy
abl-2f94-5892-1327-89f6.text: (Once per turn, per unit) In the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets this unit, after that unit has resolved its attacks, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit is **eligible to fight** (even if it has already fought this phase) and must be **selected to fight** next.

abl-3ebe-135b-8cb0-76f5.name: Airborne Predator
abl-3ebe-135b-8cb0-76f5.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-8084-c2ca-004e-c463.name: The Scent of Blood
abl-8084-c2ca-004e-c463.text:
In the Charge phase, when this unit **declares a charge**: 
- If an enemy unit **below starting strength** is within 9" of this unit, this unit has +1 to **charge rolls**. 
- Or: If an enemy unit **below half strength** is within 9" of this unit, this unit has +2 to **charge rolls**.

abl-3799-e03b-fda9-e8e9.name: Savage Exaltation
abl-3799-e03b-fda9-e8e9.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and, if that attack targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abl-d170-6fa7-f88c-f888.name: Meet Any Challenge
abl-d170-6fa7-f88c-f888.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, any units embarked within it can disembark.

abl-912b-28b7-8f46-10a6.name: To Slake Its Rage
abl-912b-28b7-8f46-10a6.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-1273-7c5a-b059-a2ba.name: Idol of Blessed Blood
abl-1273-7c5a-b059-a2ba.text: At the start of the battle round, if this unit is on the battlefield, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6.

abl-a1d9-75ac-7b5d-1623.name: Loping Speed
abl-a1d9-75ac-7b5d-1623.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abl-2aff-9d8c-86e6-b870.name: Rage Eternal
abl-2aff-9d8c-86e6-b870.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abl-7e37-cdf1-4e74-6525.name: Possessed Lord
abl-7e37-cdf1-4e74-6525.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abl-eb42-46e1-1077-9a53.name: Leader
abl-eb42-46e1-1077-9a53.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**

abl-3ecd-3f32-c13a-52fe.name: Lord of the Eightbound
abl-3ecd-3f32-c13a-52fe.text: If this model is attached to a ^^**World Eaters Possessed^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Deep Strike and Scouts 6" abilities.

abl-727c-b62e-0603-2f54.name: Rage Embodied (Aura)
abl-727c-b62e-0603-2f54.text: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abl-7ea2-91f0-ede9-7063.name: Murderlust
abl-7ea2-91f0-ede9-7063.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-221f-b271-5cd0-32fe.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abl-221f-b271-5cd0-32fe.text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Slaughter and Carnage.

abl-03a9-d9fd-9407-779c.name: Daemon Lord of Khorne (Aura)
abl-03a9-d9fd-9407-779c.text: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-8ead-9c6b-6fa8-c6f9.name: Relentless Carnage
abl-8ead-9c6b-6fa8-c6f9.text: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-9f2d-5953-7896-cab2.name: Bane of Cowards
abl-9f2d-5953-7896-cab2.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abl-7120-6873-f064-09df.name: Brass Stampede
abl-7120-6873-f064-09df.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-3a6e-bf45-e5bf-39e6.name: Hunters from the Warp
abl-3a6e-bf45-e5bf-39e6.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-a6ef-af24-771a-5e48.name: Collar of Khorne
abl-a6ef-af24-771a-5e48.text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abl-3678-899b-23ea-fd19.name: Endless Hatred
abl-3678-899b-23ea-fd19.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this model's unit.

abl-3ca3-5bc4-50e2-2b8f.name: Leader
abl-3ca3-5bc4-50e2-2b8f.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berzerkers**^^

abl-8a7e-63e1-7c48-c65e.name: Bloodthirst
abl-8a7e-63e1-7c48-c65e.text: Add 2 to Charge rolls made for this unit.

abl-c273-c398-fdc2-c2d5.name: Aura of Dark Glory
abl-c273-c398-fdc2-c2d5.text: Models in this unit have an invulnerable save characteristic of 5+.

abl-a460-4326-5d55-5edf.name: Leader
abl-a460-4326-5d55-5edf.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Jakhals**^^

abl-cc70-2470-1cb3-952c.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abl-cc70-2470-1cb3-952c.text: This unit has a 5+ Feel No Pain

abl-ae25-dce3-9c2e-2e38.name: Hulking Bodyguards
abl-ae25-dce3-9c2e-2e38.text: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-8030-1b98-3c3c-4afb.name: Feel No Pain 5+
abl-8030-1b98-3c3c-4afb.text: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain

abl-48f2-fdac-e0bf-b520.name: The Chosen One
abl-48f2-fdac-e0bf-b520.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+ do not remove the destroyed model from play, it can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making it's attacks and is then removed from play.

abl-c0d7-d922-8f79-8fca.name: Regenerating Gene-mass
abl-c0d7-d922-8f79-8fca.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abl-672c-fcd1-2183-179c.name: Crossfire
abl-672c-fcd1-2183-179c.text: in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abl-c727-a3d8-fceb-6ebd.name: Flare Launcher
abl-c727-a3d8-fceb-6ebd.text: The bearer’s unit has the SMOKE keyword and you can target it with the Smokescreen Stratagem for 0CP.

abl-8fb4-84bc-9a15-e4f4.name: Spotter
abl-8fb4-84bc-9a15-e4f4.text: The bearer’s ranged weapons have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+.

abl-2e08-718b-1740-8ca4.name: Survey Augur
abl-2e08-718b-1740-8ca4.text: Each time the bearer’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more attacks made by the bearer this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS model makes an attack against that unit, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-847c-923b-69ef-55ac.name: Nexus of Devotion
abl-847c-923b-69ef-55ac.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If that unit has the HYBRID METAMORPHS keyword, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

abl-2099-bcaf-e5f1-ebcf.name: Summon the Cult
abl-2099-bcaf-e5f1-ebcf.text: Once per battle, when you have to remove a Cult Ambush marker because your opponent has moved too close to it, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can use this ability. If you do, instead of removing that marker, you can place it anywhere on the battlefield that is within 12" of a model from your army with this ability and more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, this ability is not considered to have been used and that marker is removed as normal).

abl-1245-caf-5f2d-9ef7.name: Leader
abl-1245-caf-5f2d-9ef7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids^^**
- **^^Hybrid Metamorphs^^**
- **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^**

abl-1537-7cfd-9fd9-f69d.name: Outrider Gangs
abl-1537-7cfd-9fd9-f69d.text: Each time you use the Cult Ambush ability to set this unit back up on the battlefield, in addition to the normal rules, all of its models must be set up wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and at least one of its models must be touching one of your Cult Ambush markers (that marker is then removed from the battlefield). If this cannot be done, this unit cannot be set back up.

abl-a1b0-4124-e468-17a3.name: Demolition Run
abl-a1b0-4124-e468-17a3.text: Once per battle round, in your Movement phase, when this unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each ATALAN JACKALS model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds.)

abl-34ba-2f78-5a6c-efcf.name: Twisted Science
abl-34ba-2f78-5a6c-efcf.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-5f87-984b-e0e0-2125.name: Biological Warfare
abl-5f87-984b-e0e0-2125.text: Once per battle, when this model’s unit is selected to fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Damage characteristics of its injector goad by 3.

abl-cb83-5005-32d4-8f79.name: Leader
abl-cb83-5005-32d4-8f79.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ABERRANTS

- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS WITH AUTOPISTOLS
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS WITH HANDFLAMERS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS

You can attach this model to an ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit, even if a PRIMUS, MAGUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-dd6f-370e-baf4-2c5f.name: Alchemicus Familiar
abl-dd6f-370e-baf4-2c5f.text: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to fight, the bearer can use its alchemicus familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an INFANTRY unit, add 1 to the Wound roll

abl-ebfc-acb-d5c5-a4c4.name: Voice of New Truths
abl-ebfc-acb-d5c5-a4c4.text: In your Command phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it, if it does, select one enemy unit with 18" of it, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-d109-cec8-e513-fab1.name: Scrambler Array
abl-d109-cec8-e513-fab1.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abl-d56a-1384-fab3-2f3d.name: Leader
abl-d56a-1384-fab3-2f3d.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ACOLYTE HYBRIDS
- HYBRID METAMORPHS
- NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS
You can attach this model to an ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRID unit, even if a PRIMUS, MAGUS, or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-71f5-5ca9-3279-9545.name: Grinding Line-breaker
abl-71f5-5ca9-3279-9545.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of this model Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abl-2db9-a2a5-7c0d-4600.name: Fire Support
abl-2db9-a2a5-7c0d-4600.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-1d1-7a6-c41f-1e86.name: Brood Surge
abl-1d1-7a6-c41f-1e86.text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was **destroyed** as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

abl-22c6-be05-5fd4-ebc8.name: Cult Icon
abl-22c6-be05-5fd4-ebc8.text: In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

abl-40f3-ad42-a70c-c4db.name: Priority Target
abl-40f3-ad42-a70c-c4db.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **^^Genestealer Cults^^** model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-db66-29d9-d077-57d3.name: Master Outrider
abl-db66-29d9-d077-57d3.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-f872-566b-d324-828f.name: Hypersensory Abilities
abl-f872-566b-d324-828f.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can shoot at that unit as if it were your Shooting phase and then make a Normal move of up to D6" (it cannot embark within a Transport as part of this move).

abl-38a1-4506-e19e-bdf7.name: Heroic Fusillade
abl-38a1-4506-e19e-bdf7.text: Once per turn, after one model from your army with this ability has shot, you can select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-2636-f3df-1f73-f2d0.name: Sudden Assault
abl-2636-f3df-1f73-f2d0.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability

abl-afa4-c009-a8fa-5484.name: Bodyguard
abl-afa4-c009-a8fa-5484.text: While this model is leading a unit, other Character models attached to that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability

abl-019b-ee79-bb93-84da.name: Leader
abl-019b-ee79-bb93-84da.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids^^**
- **^^Hybrid Metamorphs^^**
- **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^**
You can attach this model to an **^^Acolyte Hybrids^^** or **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^** unit, even if a **^^Primus^^**, **^^Magus^^**, or **^^Acolyte Iconward^^** model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-6032-de57-f8f6-e3d8.name: Psychic Familiar
abl-6032-de57-f8f6-e3d8.text: Once per battle, at the start of any of your opponent’s Shooting phases, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the range of its Mind Control ability.

abl-72c3-6768-b2e4-cbcc.name: Mind Control (Psychic)
abl-72c3-6768-b2e4-cbcc.text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one PSYKER model from your army with this ability can use it. If used, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that PSYKER model and roll one D6: on a 1, that PSYKER model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound Roll.

abl-6861-b91-d08f-8f28.name: Spiritual Leader
abl-6861-b91-d08f-8f28.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly GENESTELERS CULTS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-12fe-1624-b6ac-9f68.name: A Plan Generations in the Making
abl-12fe-1624-b6ac-9f68.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-4ed9-34a-7356-a80c.name: Cult Icon
abl-4ed9-34a-7356-a80c.text: In your Command phase, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped with by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

abl-968c-f493-12fa-f01e.name: Battlefield Analysis
abl-968c-f493-12fa-f01e.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-7d54-f68a-b935-acd3.name: Cult Infiltration
abl-7d54-f68a-b935-acd3.text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one of your Cult Ambush markers that is on the battlefield and has not been moved this turn and move it up to 6"

abl-2ce2-73a5-1981-bdb2.name: Might From Beyond
abl-2ce2-73a5-1981-bdb2.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-bef7-52f2-442f-210e.name: Cosmic Horror (Psychic)
abl-bef7-52f2-442f-210e.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-7174-ac6-70bb-b118.name: Psychic Familiar
abl-7174-ac6-70bb-b118.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the range of its Cosmic Horror ability.

abl-228c-28c8-6317-1332.name: Supreme Commander
abl-228c-28c8-6317-1332.text:
- You cannot include more than one **^^Patriarch^^** model in your army.
- If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abl-6a64-5c0f-6b5f-15e2.name: Cult Demagogue
abl-6a64-5c0f-6b5f-15e2.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-769-3c2c-947e-3320.name: Decoys and Misdirection
abl-769-3c2c-947e-3320.text: If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-fc5c-3afb-c339-8f9c.name: Swift and Deadly
abl-fc5c-3afb-c339-8f9c.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-aeea-7c47-8219-2ff6.name: Primed and Ready
abl-aeea-7c47-8219-2ff6.text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability as the target of the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, provided that model has not already been the target of that Stratagem this phase.

abl-bb22-5863-886b-44a4.name: Planted Explosives
abl-bb22-5863-886b-44a4.text: Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model, this model can use its Reductus mine. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. Only one model from your army with this ability can use it in the same battle round.

abl-1df6-fdd-a680-5df9.name: Creeping Shadow
abl-1df6-fdd-a680-5df9.text: If this model is equipped with a Cult Sniper Rifle, In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6”.

abl-bf22-284-978-cf1a.name: Psychic Spoor
abl-bf22-284-978-cf1a.text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-df3b-ad7f-4065-3cf7.name: Cloaked Assassin
abl-df3b-ad7f-4065-3cf7.text: If this model is equipped with a Sanctus Bio-dagger, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this model. Enemy units cannot target this unit with **snap shooting** attacks.

abl-439c-779d-72b2-ec8e.name: Tectonic Fragdrill
abl-439c-779d-72b2-ec8e.text: Friendly **^^Genestealer Cult Infantry^^** models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this **^^Fortification^^**.

abl-f0da-56d5-172e-d9e2.name: Underground Egress
abl-f0da-56d5-172e-d9e2.text: Each time one of your Cult Ambush markers is removed as the result of an enemy unit ending any kind of move within 8" of it, you can instead move that marker so that it is wholly within 8" of this **^^Fortification^^** and more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, that marker is removed as normal).

abl-3e27-a26c-5625-4074.name: Manufactorum Cover
abl-3e27-a26c-5625-4074.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-1a45-e2e6-ef40-b0c5.name: Fortification
abl-1a45-e2e6-ef40-b0c5.text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more FORTIFICATION from your army:
■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abl-fca1-d488-3625-d230.name: Bio-horror Disruption (Psychic)
abl-fca1-d488-3625-d230.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-5847-7994-39c6-20a2.name: Psionic Shield (Psychic)
abl-5847-7994-39c6-20a2.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-2b0d-53da-81d7-5f40.name: Cult Demagogue
abl-2b0d-53da-81d7-5f40.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-a6fb-ac76-99a4-1b6a.name: Leader
abl-a6fb-ac76-99a4-1b6a.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids with Hand Flamers^^**
- **^^Acolyte Hybrids with Autopistols^^**
- **^^Hybrid Metamorphs^^**
- **^^Neophyte Hybrids^^**

abl-069d-e104-b41e-91ff.name: Battlefield Analysis
abl-069d-e104-b41e-91ff.text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-3541-c1ee-4233-00d0.name: Biohorror Disruption (Psychic)
abl-3541-c1ee-4233-00d0.text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abl-4ced-f030-661-af4c.name: Auto-Tapestry of the Emperor's Judgement
abl-4ced-f030-661-af4c.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains an Aestred Thurga model, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abl-aa7c-b9b-2657-ddbd.name: Recount the Deeds of the Saints
abl-aa7c-b9b-2657-ddbd.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains and Agathae Dolan model, each time that unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Miracle dice. When that Agathae Dolan model is destroyed, you gain D3 Miracle dice.

abl-b91b-e2eb-4678-72c7.name: Extremis Trigger Word
abl-b91b-e2eb-4678-72c7.text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can choose to invoke its extremis trigger word. If you do, then until the end of the phase, arco-flails equipped by models in this unit have an Attacks characteristic of 6 and the HAZARDOUS ability.

abl-603-dd8e-d3f3-6dc0.name: The Emperor's Grace
abl-603-dd8e-d3f3-6dc0.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abl-77ff-2463-354-23fd.name: Null Rod
abl-77ff-2463-354-23fd.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abl-4dce-d8aa-02ec-abef.name: Rod of Office
abl-4dce-d8aa-02ec-abef.text: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-56dc-ead8-d1a8-9d4.name: Rites of Castigation
abl-56dc-ead8-d1a8-9d4.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abl-888-b727-daf1-e113.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abl-888-b727-daf1-e113.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-4851-2e87-7de3-f265.name: Holy Judgement
abl-4851-2e87-7de3-f265.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this unit's Ephrael Stern model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is a Chaos unit. If the test is failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-6a83-9f06-f020-25bf.name: Mysterious Saviours
abl-6a83-9f06-f020-25bf.text:
You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do: 
- That use is ‑1 **CP**. 
- That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.'

abl-857a-682e-d2bd-5943.name: Laud Hailer
abl-857a-682e-d2bd-5943.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Adepta Sororitas unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-c7dc-3ddb-ce59-3c1e.name: Stirring Rhetoric
abl-c7dc-3ddb-ce59-3c1e.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit performs an Act of Faith, the value of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first changed to a 6.

abl-e5c8-ff8c-ad6a-1a31.name: Support
abl-e5c8-ff8c-ad6a-1a31.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Battle Sisters Squad
■ Celestian Sacresants
■ Dominion Squad
■ Retributor Squad
■ Sisters Novitiate Squad
This model can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, even if one Canoness, Palatine, Junith Eruita, or Aestred Thurga unit has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-c25b-5648-cc0e-6916.name: Executioner of Heretics (Aura)
abl-c25b-5648-cc0e-6916.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abl-a7f7-40f-4d82-235d.name: Unflinching Determination
abl-a7f7-40f-4d82-235d.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-8665-1f52-179d-38e9.name: Support
abl-8665-1f52-179d-38e9.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Battle Sisters Squad
■ Celestian Sacresants
■ Dominion Squad
■ Retributor Squad
This model can be attached to a Battle Sisters Squad, even if one Canoness, Palatine, Junith Eruita, or Aestred Thurga unit has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-62d8-4f1-3996-bcb9.name: Devastating Refrain
abl-62d8-4f1-3996-bcb9.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time such an attack destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, the model's Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of a 6.

abl-2ad4-2722-1059-760c.name: Medicus Ministorum
abl-2ad4-2722-1059-760c.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-acf-9a6a-c5b4-93fe.name: Sacred Healing
abl-acf-9a6a-c5b4-93fe.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to that unit. If you wish, you first discard 1 Miracle dice; if you do, you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding Character models) to that unit instead.

abl-72b8-e076-cff5-2e74.name: Litany of Deeds
abl-72b8-e076-cff5-2e74.text: Each time you gain a Miracle dice as the result of a friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS unit or model being destroyed, if that unit or model was destroyed within 12" of this model, you can re-roll the result of that Miracle dice before adding it to your Miracle dice pool.

abl-ecf0-4fea-74c7-1091.name: Stanchion of Holy Martyrs
abl-ecf0-4fea-74c7-1091.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Save characteristic of 2+ and a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-cf41-7ae4-6a73-5490.name: Transport
abl-cf41-7ae4-6a73-5490.text:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one BATTLE SISTERS SQUAD, DOMINION SQUAD or SISTERS NOVITIATE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that has the Cherub ability, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

abl-5def-c759-39f-94ca.name: Purge and Cleanse
abl-5def-c759-39f-94ca.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-e5c9-ce74-717b-4504.name: The Pulpit of Saint Holline’s Basilica
abl-e5c9-ce74-717b-4504.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-588a-b45-3f30-e6c8.name: Fiery Conviction
abl-588a-b45-3f30-e6c8.text:
If this model is on the battlefield at the start
of your Command phase, you can choose one of the following:
■ Discard 1 Miracle dice and gain 1CP.
■ Take a Leadership test for this model, if that test is passed, gain 1CP.

abl-b337-3b2d-d22b-9ca9.name: Anguish of the Unredeemed
abl-b337-3b2d-d22b-9ca9.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-e650-bbf0-a74f-44c0.name: Anchorite Sarcophagus
abl-e650-bbf0-a74f-44c0.text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 7" and a Save Characteristic of 3+.

abl-5e86-cb68-9205-16c4.name: Abbess Sanctorum
abl-5e86-cb68-9205-16c4.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-83e4-fab8-e77c-b285.name: Righteous Repugnance
abl-83e4-fab8-e77c-b285.text: Each time this model's unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of Fidelis and the Lance of Illumination. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed by this model, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abl-7cb-2ac3-fef5-f533.name: Fury of the Righteous
abl-7cb-2ac3-fef5-f533.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-d505-3475-8bdc-a018.name: Rapturous Blows
abl-d505-3475-8bdc-a018.text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can discard 1 Miracle dice. If you do, then until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack made by this model scores a wound, the target of that attack suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abl-4a86-1713-528f-cf2a.name: Righteous Paragons
abl-4a86-1713-528f-cf2a.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-9b50-efe0-5300-a956.name: Endless Suffering
abl-9b50-efe0-5300-a956.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abl-58d7-8724-689e-61f3.name: Righteous Smiting
abl-58d7-8724-689e-61f3.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-cf7e-519e-c4e1-5abc.name: Zealot
abl-cf7e-519e-c4e1-5abc.text: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

abl-672b-2d5c-38af-1861.name: Holy Mission
abl-672b-2d5c-38af-1861.text: If this model is attached to a Dominion Squad during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Scouts 6" ability. If this model is attached to a Sisters Novitiate Squad during the Declare Battle Formations step, it gains the Infiltrators ability.

abl-e9c6-6fd8-b88e-39d1.name: Cherubs
abl-e9c6-6fd8-b88e-39d1.text: Twice per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abl-8eef-f65c-7895-183f.name: Storm of Retribution
abl-8eef-f65c-7895-183f.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If such an attack targets an enemy unit that has destroyed one or more ^^**Adepta Sororitas^^** units from your army during the battle, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abl-2f-70aa-d0e5-a709.name: Healing Tears
abl-2f-70aa-d0e5-a709.text: While this unit contains a Celestine model, in your Command phase, if this unit is below its Starting Strength, either one destroyed Geminae Superia model or up to D3 other Bodyguard models are returned to this unit.

abl-c06a-41c6-5749-25c0.name: Lifewards
abl-c06a-41c6-5749-25c0.text: While this unit contains one or more Geminae Superia models, Celestine has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-eee9-b689-1a73-742b.name: Miraculous Intervention
abl-eee9-b689-1a73-742b.text: The first time this unit’s Celestine model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that Celestine model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abl-fb9d-4606-f887-5967.name: Transport
abl-fb9d-4606-f887-5967.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the TRIUMPH OF SAINT KATHERINE.

abl-e94b-d5c8-fb33-4f99.name: Self Repair
abl-e94b-d5c8-fb33-4f99.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abl-c785-9209-5db8-d5e7.name: Damaged: 1-6 Wounds Remaining
abl-c785-9209-5db8-d5e7.text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, the Attacks characteristics of all of its weapons are halved, and you can only select one ability when using its Relics of the Matriarchs ability, instead of up to two.

abl-a09c-e5cb-4ad9-8630.name: Relics of the Matriarchs
abl-a09c-e5cb-4ad9-8630.text: At the start of the battle round, select up to two of the abilities in the Relics of the Matriarchs section. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has those abilities.

abl-af36-63c-5792-332d.name: Relic of the Matriarch - The Fiery Heart (Aura)
abl-af36-63c-5792-332d.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, add 2" to that unit's Move characteristic and add 1 to the Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-bc2a-1efd-5bf1-16c7.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Censer of the Sacred Rose (Aura)
abl-bc2a-1efd-5bf1-16c7.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll all Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

abl-7dfb-33ee-debe-bc02.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Simulacrum of the Ebon Chalice (Aura)
abl-7dfb-33ee-debe-bc02.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, that unit can perform up to two Acts of Faith per phase, instead of only one.

abl-ba51-e749-8362-b9af.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Simulacrum of the Argent Shroud (Aura)
abl-ba51-e749-8362-b9af.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-79b6-f74e-253c-153f.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Icon of the Valorous Heart (Aura)
abl-79b6-f74e-253c-153f.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abl-ee9f-15cc-2a69-8a31.name: Relic of the Matriarch - Petals of the Bloody Rose (Aura)
abl-ee9f-15cc-2a69-8a31.text: While a friendly Adepta Sororitas unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by model in that unit by 1.

abl-3d31-2f99-c625-f047.name: Solemn Procession
abl-3d31-2f99-c625-f047.text: Each time you gain 1 Miracle dice at the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, do not roll one D6 to determine the value of that Miracle dice; it has a value of 6.’

abl-9627-db7d-202c-4bfb.name: Transport
abl-9627-db7d-202c-4bfb.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models or the Triumph of Saint Katherine.

abl-2ef3-61bf-fe5-434c.name: Emergency Combat Embarkation
abl-2ef3-61bf-fe5-434c.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this TRANSPORT, it can embark within this TRANSPORT.

abl-d29e-6553-723c-5067.name: Divine Deliverance
abl-d29e-6553-723c-5067.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability

abl-e082-93e0-86d5-1129.name: Consecrated Ground
abl-e082-93e0-86d5-1129.text: When this FORTIFICATION is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1" of another part. Friendly ADEPTA SORORITAS INFANTRY models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this FORTIFICATION. While an ADEPTA SORORITAS unit from your army is within 1" of this FORTIFICATION, that unit can perform one additional Act of Faith per phase.

abl-1e64-6be4-df39-120c.name: Holy Cover
abl-1e64-6be4-df39-120c.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-946d-6991-50ea-72c1.name: Instrument of the Emperor's Wrath
abl-946d-6991-50ea-72c1.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-758b-f18b-98a9-0fe4.name: Daemonbreaker
abl-758b-f18b-98a9-0fe4.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a DAEMON unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-8a3c-df78-6d77-f5e2.name: Ministorum Sermon
abl-8a3c-df78-6d77-f5e2.text: While this unit contains a **^^Ministorum Priest**^^, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-297a-b626-a0c5-a84b.name: Cherub
abl-297a-b626-a0c5-a84b.text: Once per battle, after this unit has performed an Act of Faith, you gain 1 Miracle dice.

abl-3907-15ad-c461-6590.name: Attached Unit
abl-3907-15ad-c461-6590.text: If a ^^**Ministorum Priest^^** model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Battle Sisters Squad^^**, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a ^^**Ministorum Priest^^** model from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

abl-733c-91f4-956f-310b.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abl-733c-91f4-956f-310b.text: At the end of your Command phase, for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 Miracle dice showing a value equal to that result.

abl-a83b-6c57-683f-57ea.name: Salvationist Medikit
abl-a83b-6c57-683f-57ea.text: In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding ^^**Character models^^**) to this unit.

abl-26d9-e27b-c1cb-8ecb.name: Rituale Nullificatus
abl-26d9-e27b-c1cb-8ecb.text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abl-76e2-fa16-cbc9-d420.name: Virtue of Intolerance
abl-76e2-fa16-cbc9-d420.text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets its quarry, that attack has the ^^**[Precision]^^** ability and you can re‑roll the Hit roll. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a ^^**Transport**^^.

abl-d4e9-0707-582f-0385.name: Attached Unit
abl-d4e9-0707-582f-0385.text: If a ^^**Character^^** unit from your army can be attached to a ^^**Dominion Squad^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-0d79-8c08-81a5-8b90.name: Denuncia Oratory
abl-0d79-8c08-81a5-8b90.text: Each time the bearer’s unit’s quarry is destroyed, you can select a new unit from your opponent’s army to be its quarry.

abl-e2df-1161-191f-1b8a.name: Sacred Command
abl-e2df-1161-191f-1b8a.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with the ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

abl-3c7a-adb8-5b32-b1ed.name: Leader
abl-3c7a-adb8-5b32-b1ed.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Battle Sisters Squad, Celestian Sacresants, Dominion Squad, Retributor Squad, Sisters Novitiate Squad**^^

abl-2f80-e086-3894-06bd.name: Sacred Devotions
abl-2f80-e086-3894-06bd.text: Each time this unit performs an Act of Faith, the value of one of the Miracle dice used in that Act of Faith is first changed to a 4.

abl-30eb-e98b-93b3-29ab.name: Adamant Wrath
abl-30eb-e98b-93b3-29ab.text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abl-0097-9664-c0ac-ed29.name: Leader
abl-0097-9664-c0ac-ed29.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Paragon Warsuits**^^

abl-c898-5167-e688-8d81.name: Righteous Denunciation
abl-c898-5167-e688-8d81.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abl-795c-9a7f-fc73-3380.name: Judged for Execution
abl-795c-9a7f-fc73-3380.text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a friendly ^^**Adepta Sororitas**^^ model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-c081-8ea9-eb18-0bff.name: Tactical Perception
abl-c081-8ea9-eb18-0bff.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

abl-48d0-0d0f-c9b6-5b34.name: Tenacious Spirit
abl-48d0-0d0f-c9b6-5b34.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-a7f1-e106-1e30-3452.name: Leader
abl-a7f1-e106-1e30-3452.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Prosecutors
■ Vigilators
■ Witchseekers

abl-d569-61db-406d-1d42.name: Slayers of Tyrants
abl-d569-61db-406d-1d42.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a ^^Character, Monster^^ or ^^Vehicle^^ unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-0a36-c494-baad-91db.name: From Golden Light
abl-0a36-c494-baad-91db.text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-0ad3-82b1-9962-2f29.name: Self Repair
abl-0ad3-82b1-9962-2f29.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abl-1a70-8702-4179-b711.name: Leader
abl-1a70-8702-4179-b711.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Custodian Guard
■ Custodian Wardens

abl-be52-2414-896d-55fc.name: Martial Inspiration
abl-be52-2414-896d-55fc.text: Once per battle, in your Charge phase, this model's unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-31ef-fcd4-c165-a95d.name: Swift Onslaught
abl-31ef-fcd4-c165-a95d.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-07c7-730f-5219-ef8f.name: Stand Vigil
abl-07c7-730f-5219-ef8f.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-9c46-e189-463c-266e.name: Sentinel Storm
abl-9c46-e189-463c-266e.text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after the unit has shot, it can shoot again.

abl-8792-7fc7-692e-9a57.name: Resolute Will
abl-8792-7fc7-692e-9a57.text: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-a696-cfc6-e27a-97ce.name: Living Fortress
abl-a696-cfc6-e27a-97ce.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-957b-3814-759a-a6f9.name: Vexilla
abl-957b-3814-759a-a6f9.text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

abl-dea5-7d20-9057-895b.name: Seeker's Instincts
abl-dea5-7d20-9057-895b.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-ffb8-5424-36a5-f9da.name: Corner the Quarry
abl-ffb8-5424-36a5-f9da.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of this model’s unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abl-34ce-359c-4fc1-da0b.name: Purity of Execution
abl-34ce-359c-4fc1-da0b.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Psyker unit, that attack has the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

abl-e6a6-1d13-3027-3fce.name: Master of the Stances
abl-e6a6-1d13-3027-3fce.text: Once per battle, when this model's unit is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until that fight is resolved, both Ka'tah Stances are active for that unit, instead of only one.

abl-4e62-8c6f-2631-373c.name: Leader
abl-4e62-8c6f-2631-373c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Allarus Custodians

abl-ec4f-845a-63a9-62fb.name: Auramite and Adamantite
abl-ec4f-845a-63a9-62fb.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1.

abl-d569-255b-ad41-d354.name: Leader
abl-d569-255b-ad41-d354.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Vertus Praetors

abl-df6a-c9a7-bfc1-5cf9.name: Sweeping Advance
abl-df6a-c9a7-bfc1-5cf9.text: Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if this model's unit fought this phase, if it is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move or, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move.

abl-7797-8174-31bb-6e9f.name: Captain-General
abl-7797-8174-31bb-6e9f.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abl-0d01-a562-a398-9775.name: Moment Shackle
abl-0d01-a562-a398-9775.text:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following to take effect until the end of the phase:
■ This model's Watcher's Axe melee weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 12.
■ This model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abl-2397-a41d-fe9e-ed6d.name: Golden Laurels
abl-2397-a41d-fe9e-ed6d.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, worsen that Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-f775-c5a7-e958-0496.name: Hero of Lion's Gate
abl-f775-c5a7-e958-0496.text: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll, Wound roll or saving throw for this model, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

abl-afc2-2959-a417-e071.name: Unyielding Ancient
abl-afc2-2959-a417-e071.text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

abl-7ab4-e69c-6d26-8827.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds remaining
abl-7ab4-e69c-6d26-8827.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-1203-8d21-0ebf-b3da.name: Turbo Boost
abl-1203-8d21-0ebf-b3da.text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abl-9896-b356-2ad8-2fb9.name: Quicksilver Execution
abl-9896-b356-2ad8-2fb9.text: Once per battle, after this unit ends a normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit; for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

abl-ba73-e7d0-22ea-1c8f.name: Deft Parry
abl-ba73-e7d0-22ea-1c8f.text: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-6449-d735-2ac6-02b1.name: Sanctified Flames
abl-6449-d735-2ac6-02b1.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-8b43-d041-22ff-b0a5.name: No Foe Shall Stand
abl-8b43-d041-22ff-b0a5.text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER abilities].

abl-85d7-f209-acae-3353.name: Disintegration Beams
abl-85d7-f209-acae-3353.text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the Devastating Wounds ability.

abl-9ce3-c1f0-ec93-d409.name: Saturation Volleys
abl-9ce3-c1f0-ec93-d409.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield. that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

abl-1d2c-eda9-a400-f075.name: Heavy Assault Infantry
abl-1d2c-eda9-a400-f075.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-cf57-6e91-6435-b3fd.name: From Golden Light
abl-cf57-6e91-6435-b3fd.text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is not whithin Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abl-8733-1b5b-a5b8-deaf.name: Implacable Vanguard
abl-8733-1b5b-a5b8-deaf.text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not elgibile to declare a charge.

abl-fd11-6ea5-03cc-0fa7.name: Strike from the Skies
abl-fd11-6ea5-03cc-0fa7.text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-95ed-fba0-2edf-540c.name: Swooping Dive
abl-95ed-fba0-2edf-540c.text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0 CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem that phase.

abl-cfa9-7475-9b27-f8f7.name: Tarsis Buckler
abl-cfa9-7475-9b27-f8f7.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

abl-50d4-136a-4e2a-d234.name: Galatus Shield
abl-50d4-136a-4e2a-d234.text: Each time a melee attack targets this model subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-b63c-74b0-7099-b509.name: Dread Foe
abl-b63c-74b0-7099-b509.text: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-7636-6089-5b7c-d80a.name: Merciless Hunter
abl-7636-6089-5b7c-d80a.text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-60a4-507e-da36-683c.name: Advanced Firepower
abl-60a4-507e-da36-683c.text: Each time this model makes an attack with its Twin iliastus accelerator cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time this model makes an attack with its Twin arachnus heavy blaze cannon that targets an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-47d3-771a-7668-fd15.name: Guardian Eternal
abl-47d3-771a-7668-fd15.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-c0e2-de2c-19fb-6a94.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abl-c0e2-de2c-19fb-6a94.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-a331-3792-d689-fd1b.name: Fire Support
abl-a331-3792-d689-fd1b.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^Transport^^ this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-44e8-6759-a126-ec2a.name: Assault Dropship
abl-44e8-6759-a126-ec2a.text: If a unit disembarks from this TRANSPORT before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligibile to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-24b5-43b5-1537-2bd2.name: Infernus Firebomb
abl-24b5-43b5-1537-2bd2.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-65fe-04e0-3ac3-20a6.name: Leader
abl-65fe-04e0-3ac3-20a6.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Custodian Guard, Custodian Wardens**^^

abl-a5fc-ae22-d48f-7687.name: Ka'tah Master
abl-a5fc-ae22-d48f-7687.text: Once per phase, you can re-roll one Hit roll or one Wound roll for an attack made by this model.

abl-3f1a-b564-1d03-65a6.name: Leader
abl-3f1a-b564-1d03-65a6.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Prosecutors, Vigilators, Witchseekers**^^

abl-8c41-4545-b762-7031.name: Daughter of the Abyss
abl-8c41-4545-b762-7031.text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abl-2677-a0ba-bd72-73ac.name: Leader
abl-2677-a0ba-bd72-73ac.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Vertus Praetors**^^

abl-f8ed-1216-e13d-3fdd.name: Fiend Slayer
abl-f8ed-1216-e13d-3fdd.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Monster**^^ or ^^**Vehicle**^^ unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-42dc-6183-5dd1-29cf.name: Bomb Rack
abl-42dc-6183-5dd1-29cf.text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, select one visible enemy unit (excluding Lone Operative units) within 24" of this unit, and roll six D6 for that unit: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-d2a1-8e6f-a969-19fb.name: Chaff Launcher
abl-d2a1-8e6f-a969-19fb.text: The bearer has the Smoke keyword.
