abl-cf82-0b93-d441-d3cd.name: Command Uplink
abl-cf82-0b93-d441-d3cd.text: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-e589-6b4b-708c-0a93.name: Strafing Run
abl-e589-6b4b-708c-0a93.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding units that can Fly), add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-bd10-f2a9-9e2e-b9cb.name: Chaff Launcher
abl-bd10-f2a9-9e2e-b9cb.text: The bearer has the Smoke keyword.�

abl-5949-42f6-2d23-07f5.name: Aerial Deployment
abl-5949-42f6-2d23-07f5.text: In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.

abl-9e99-0aa1-2c11-33ca.name: Canticles of the Omnissiah
abl-9e99-0aa1-2c11-33ca.text:
At the start of your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Canticles of the Omnissiah section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

Invocation of Machine Vengeance (Aura): At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Machine Vengeance target. Each time a model in a friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus^^** unit makes an attack that targets your Machine Vengeance target, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

Mantra of Discipline:  This model has the ^^**Battleline**^^ keyword and has the following ability:
**Binharic Courage (Aura)**: While a friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit and each time you take a Battle-shock or Leadership test for that unit, add 1 to that test.’

Shroudpsalm (Aura): While a friendly **^^Adeptus Mechanicus**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, that unit has the Stealth ability.

abl-f172-384f-e1fa-d656.name: Mechanicus Bodyguard
abl-f172-384f-e1fa-d656.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-26a7-711f-28f6-7044.name: Self-repair Mechanisms
abl-26a7-711f-28f6-7044.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abl-03d0-228a-7b7f-9ba4.name: Electro-shock
abl-03d0-228a-7b7f-9ba4.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shocked. While a unit is shocked, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abl-0d92-84dc-f7da-1aa0.name: Electro-Infusion
abl-0d92-84dc-f7da-1aa0.text: While a ^^**Character^^** model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-6482-3035-fed5-27d0.name: Robotic Bodyguard
abl-6482-3035-fed5-27d0.text: While a ^^**Cybernetica Datasmith^^** model is leading this unit, that model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-e6fd-24cc-9af1-16b6.name: Repulsor Grid
abl-e6fd-24cc-9af1-16b6.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** model in this unit, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks.

abl-2621-1ced-08ff-1612.name: Breaching Command
abl-2621-1ced-08ff-1612.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. While this unit is within 6” of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** units, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-c5be-9cdf-008d-3b05.name: Sentinel Directive
abl-c5be-9cdf-008d-3b05.text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abl-cc62-f70a-74d5-53a3.name: Emanatus Forcefield (Aura)
abl-cc62-f70a-74d5-53a3.text: While a friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** model is wholly within 6" of this model, that ^^**Battleline^^** model has a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abl-021a-c246-5697-b311.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abl-021a-c246-5697-b311.text: While this mdel has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-49d6-a6a3-fafb-53e4.name: Scuttling Walker
abl-49d6-a6a3-fafb-53e4.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through friendly ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

abl-433b-7ef2-d37c-a472.name: Broad spectrum data-tether
abl-433b-7ef2-d37c-a472.text: The bearer loses the SMOKE keyword, but each time you target the bearer with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-b4a6-337b-294d-a4d3.name: Ride the Thermals
abl-b4a6-337b-294d-a4d3.text:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can do one of the following:
- Make a Normal move of up to 6".
- Make a Normal move of up to 12", provided every model in this unit ends that move wholly within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** units.

In either case, if it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-d087-cfde-e93a-f603.name: Searing Conflagaration
abl-d087-cfde-e93a-f603.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a phosphor torch that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If this unit is also within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** units, each time such an attack targets such a unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-818e-4451-e543-0907.name: Tactica Obliqua
abl-818e-4451-e543-0907.text:
In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can do one of the following:
- Make a Normal move of up to D6".
- Make a Normal move of up to 6", provided every model in this unit ends that move wholly within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** units.

abl-6fc7-1534-89fe-ac99.name: Enhanced data-tether
abl-6fc7-1534-89fe-ac99.text: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-f9b6-c1a2-52ac-92e2.name: Line-breakers
abl-f9b6-c1a2-52ac-92e2.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, adding 2 to the result if this unit started its Charge move within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units. For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-4244-286c-66da-c199.name: Neurostatic Interference (Aura)
abl-4244-286c-66da-c199.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that unit, subtract 1 from that test. While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** units, subtract 2 from that test instead.

abl-2c22-e802-cfdb-cf3f.name: Optimised Gait
abl-2c22-e802-cfdb-cf3f.text: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit. While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline^^** units, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit instead.

abl-b89e-0cbb-251a-793c.name: Support
abl-b89e-0cbb-251a-793c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- ^^**Skitarii Rangers^^**
- ^^**Skitarii Vanguard^^**

abl-46d1-a9f3-efe5-b4a9.name: Control Edict
abl-46d1-a9f3-efe5-b4a9.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-3afd-1276-beb2-adf7.name: Servo-skull Uplink
abl-3afd-1276-beb2-adf7.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Skitarii^^** unit that is Battle-shocked and within 6" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-3d74-3888-b3ba-d044.name: Objective Scouted
abl-3d74-3888-b3ba-d044.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-3c76-db6d-2b-29bd.name: Enhanced data-tether
abl-3c76-db6d-2b-29bd.text:
Each time you select the bearer’s unit
as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-fd15-1322-c1a8-9568.name: Omnispex
abl-fd15-1322-c1a8-9568.text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the IGNORES COVER ability.

abl-a266-2033-d72e-eddd.name: Rad-saturation (Aura)
abl-a266-2033-d72e-eddd.text: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Vehicle^^** units) is within 3" of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-1533-6fbb-c18b-7c86.name: Broad spectrum data-tether
abl-1533-6fbb-c18b-7c86.text: Each time you select the bearer as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-995c-124a-0d6b-f011.name: Blistering Salvoes
abl-995c-124a-0d6b-f011.text: Each time this model makes an attack with a belleros energy cannon that targets an ^^**Infantry^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each time this model makes an attack with a ferrumite cannon that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-28eb-c1af-6634-4b08.name: Fire Support
abl-28eb-c1af-6634-4b08.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport^^** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-2780-1325-2e20-c29b.name: Dynamic Efficiency
abl-2780-1325-2e20-c29b.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and you can re-roll Desperate Escape tests taken for models in this unit.

abl-2361-39d9-6fbe-27e2.name: Broad Spectrum Data-tether
abl-2361-39d9-6fbe-27e2.text: Each time you select the bearer as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-4fe6-68c7-06d7-e127.name: Leader
abl-4fe6-68c7-06d7-e127.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corpuscarii Electro-Priests
■ Fulgurite Electro-Priests
■ Kataphron Breachers
■ Kataphron Destroyers
■ Skitarii Rangers
■ Skitarii Vanguard

abl-2d2c-3eb8-963e-c75a.name: Lord of the Machine Cult
abl-2d2c-3eb8-963e-c75a.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If that unit has the ^^**Electro-Priests^^** keyword, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead

abl-01b2-8ea8-4fc1-dbe7.name: Data-spike
abl-01b2-8ea8-4fc1-dbe7.text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy ^^**Vehicle^^** unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds and, until the end of the phase, the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that enemy unit is worsened by 1.

abl-3325-e5c9-4448-7650.name: Enginseer
abl-3325-e5c9-4448-7650.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle^^** units, unless it is leading a unit, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-0b5b-a6e8-c618-7ea8.name: Omnissiah's Blessing
abl-0b5b-a6e8-c618-7ea8.text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Adeptus Mechanicus model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, if it is a Vehicle model, until the start of your next Command phase, that model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase

abl-2aab-7d64-4e7c-6899.name: Vengeance for the Omnissiah
abl-2aab-7d64-4e7c-6899.text: If a friendly ^^**Adeptus Mechanicus Vehicle^^** model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Omnissian axe has an Attacks characteristic of 6.

abl-caa6-2932-0474-188f.name: Leader
abl-caa6-2932-0474-188f.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corpuscarii Electro-Priests
■ Fulgurite Electro-Priests
■ Kataphron Breachers
■ Kataphron Destroyers
■ Servitors
■ Skitarii Rangers
■ Skitarii Vanguard

abl-0572-a04a-1973-cbab.name: Galvanic Field
abl-0572-a04a-1973-cbab.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

abl-fda2-046d-2f2f-a407.name: Defend the Divine Work
abl-fda2-046d-2f2f-a407.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the  end of the phase, all models in this model’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-c6a9-d89f-8266-8300.name: Seekers of Divine Arcana
abl-c6a9-d89f-8266-8300.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-a7f5-2184-53d9-7724.name: Cogitative Instincts
abl-a7f5-2184-53d9-7724.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of this model.

abl-637e-1885-2f50-3afc.name: Support
abl-637e-1885-2f50-3afc.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Corpuscarii Electro-Priests
■ Fulgurite Electro-Priests
■ Kataphron Breachers
■ Kataphron Destroyers
■ Skitarii Rangers
■ Skitarii Vanguard

abl-dba5-946a-cd1c-0845.name: Support
abl-dba5-946a-cd1c-0845.text:
This model must be attached to the following unit:
■ ^^**Kastelan Robots^^**

You must attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, even if one or more other Cybernetica Datasmith models havealready been attached to it. In such cases, if that bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths. If you cannot attach this model to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model cannot be deployed and counts as having been destroyed during the first battle round. While attached to a Kastelan Robots unit, this model loses the INFANTRY keyword.

abl-4016-04e6-9751-89e3.name: Battle Protocols
abl-4016-04e6-9751-89e3.text:
At the start of the battle, if this model is leading a ^^**Kastelan Robots^^** unit, that unit enters Aegis Protocols (see below). In your Command phase, if this model is leading a ^^**Kastelan Robots^^** unit, you can select one protocol from those listed below for that unit to enter. Once a unit enters a protocol, it remains in that protocol until it enters a different one
- Protector Protocol: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
- Conqueror Protocol: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.
- Aegis Protocol: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of ^^**Kastelan Robot^^** models in that unit.

abl-2110-dbf4-c012-f1aa.name: Titan Guard
abl-2110-dbf4-c012-f1aa.text: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase. When oing so, if there are one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Titanicus^^** units on the battlefield, you can re-roll the subsequent charge roll.

abl-b1bf-46f8-3c71-c201.name: Secutarii
abl-b1bf-46f8-3c71-c201.text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Skitarii Vanguard^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-9686-67e4-3987-8d53.name: Blind Barrage
abl-9686-67e4-3987-8d53.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the  battlefield, that enemy unit is blinded. While a unit is blinded, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-72f0-1c3a-5baf-6a65.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abl-72f0-1c3a-5baf-6a65.text: While this mdel has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-870b-9bd7-ebff-9190.name: Termite Assault
abl-870b-9bd7-ebff-9190.text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

abl-daae-3991-9097-425a.name: Dread Snipers
abl-daae-3991-9097-425a.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-5045-41f8-b903-6332.name: Achillan Eye
abl-5045-41f8-b903-6332.text: Each time this model makes an attack with a radium jezzail that targets an Infantry unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model makes an attack with a Skatros transuranic arquebus that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-ed3e-cbe0-ab7f-285e.name: Focused Hunters
abl-ed3e-cbe0-ab7f-285e.text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the end of the battle, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-9cf3-5565-3b5f-3d9d.name: Mindlock
abl-9cf3-5565-3b5f-3d9d.text: While a TECH-PRIEST model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by SERVITOR models in this unit by 1.

abl-66a1-be14-f858-31de.name: Servitor Retinue
abl-66a1-be14-f858-31de.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER model (a unit cannot have more than one SERVITORS unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abl-73ce-3c28-92c5-2fc9.name: Network Override
abl-73ce-3c28-92c5-2fc9.text:
While this unit contains one or more ^^**Tech-Priest^^** models, this unit is: 
- Eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced. 
- Eligible to shoot in a turn in which it started an Action.

abl-982c-2104-e70c-f9e4.name: Attached Unit
abl-982c-2104-e70c-f9e4.text: If a ^^**Character^^** unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Kataphron Breachers^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-71f7-5e5a-7c31-7a43.name: Leader
abl-71f7-5e5a-7c31-7a43.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Electro-Priests, Kataphrons, Skitarii Rangers, Skitarii Vanguard**^^

abl-fadc-ce51-120c-6c9c.name: Technoarcane Zealotry
abl-fadc-ce51-120c-6c9c.text: While this model's unit is in range of one or more objective markers, improve this model's Leadership characteristic by 1.

abl-a70b-76a4-1413-55d2.name: Leader
abl-a70b-76a4-1413-55d2.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Skitarii Rangers, Skitarii Vanguard**^^

abl-6252-81ce-8997-74f3.name: Prioritisation Protocol
abl-6252-81ce-8997-74f3.text: Melee weapons equipped by this model have [^^Precision^^].

abl-cee0-3f7a-fe80-e1fd.name: Leader
abl-cee0-3f7a-fe80-e1fd.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Ironstrider Ballistarii, Sydonian Dragoons with Taser Lances, Sydonian Dragoons with Radium Jezzails**^^

abl-b041-0c01-ff9f-6a19.name: Vector of the Omnissiah's Wrath
abl-b041-0c01-ff9f-6a19.text: Ranged weapons equipped by this model have [^^Ignores Cover^^].

abl-93af-4f1d-63c7-7a5b.name: Icon of War
abl-93af-4f1d-63c7-7a5b.text:
**Fanatical Devotion:** You can select one friendly **^^Skitarii^^** or **^^Thulia Ghuld^^** unit within 6" of this model; until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

**Adaptive Tactics:** You can select one friendly **^^Skitarii^^** or **^^Thulia Ghuld^^** unit within 6" of this model; until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

**The Fires of Mars:** You can select one friendly **^^Skitarii^^** or **^^Thulia Ghuld^^** unit within 6" of this model; until the start of your next Command phase, the Conqueror Imperative and Protector Imperative are both active for that unit.

abl-0522-5848-c9d5-32ab.name: Secutor of Olympus
abl-0522-5848-c9d5-32ab.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy **^^Vehicle^^** unit within 12" of this model and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

abl-0f4e-20ed-4571-80f9.name: Rod of the War Forge
abl-0f4e-20ed-4571-80f9.text: In your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Icon of War section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abl-0072-1d19-367d-60bd.name: Cybernetic Augmentation
abl-0072-1d19-367d-60bd.text: This model can move through terrain features, but cannot end a move within a wall, a floor, etc. This model can be set up or end a move on any floor level of **^^Ruins^^**, but if that level is not the ground floor, it can only do so if its base does not overhang the floor at that level.

abl-1c70-93a9-743e-6e5a.name: Attached Unit
abl-1c70-93a9-743e-6e5a.text: If a **^^Character^^** unit from your army can be attached to a **^^Skitarii Rangers^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead

abl-5c9c-f3c4-d572-aa74.name: Broad‑spectrum Targeting Augurs
abl-5c9c-f3c4-d572-aa74.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with an eradication caster that targets a unit (excluding **^^Monster^^** and **^^Vehicle^^** units), that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

abl-ccc1-44e6-b5f3-e432.name: Monocular Targeting Helms
abl-ccc1-44e6-b5f3-e432.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a neutron fusil against a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

abl-d610-cc24-7aba-b494.name: Shieldbreaker
abl-d610-cc24-7aba-b494.text: Once per battle, when selecting targets for this model’s exitus rifle, it can fire a shieldbreaker round. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack with that weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll and any successful Wound roll scores a Critical Wound.

abl-27d2-74da-5c1-a8e.name: Dead-shot
abl-27d2-74da-5c1-a8e.text:
When this unit is **selected to shoot**, until this unit has shot: 
- Enemy units do not have Lone Operative. 
- Hidden enemy units have +15" detection range.'

abl-6d9c-8c60-33e1-8eef.name: Abomination
abl-6d9c-8c60-33e1-8eef.text: This model has the Feel No Pain 2+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abl-f716-1f40-4abf-3110.name: Soulless Horror
abl-f716-1f40-4abf-3110.text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, each enemy unit within 9" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test (or subtracting 2 if that unit is a PSYKER).

abl-8dfe-385f-1253-ad19.name: Etheric Emergence
abl-8dfe-385f-1253-ad19.text: In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an etheric emergence. If it does, this model can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-3450-19d9-c7de-c1e0.name: Frenzon
abl-3450-19d9-c7de-c1e0.text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-24ff-2511-1349-6dc8.name: Overkill
abl-24ff-2511-1349-6dc8.text: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, this model can use this ability before it makes a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, add 6" to this model's Movement characteristic and add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's melee weapons.

abl-d262-7a63-4838-828a.name: Reign of Confusion
abl-d262-7a63-4838-828a.text: Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a **stratagem**, this model can use this ability. If you do increase the CP cost of that use of that **stratagem** by 1CP.

abl-812f-ed2e-6abf-35be.name: Acrobatic Escape
abl-812f-ed2e-6abf-35be.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Fall Back move of up to D6". In addition, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this model is not within 3" of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this model is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

abl-90cb-3f1a-16ca-f36.name: Backroom Deals
abl-90cb-3f1a-16ca-f36.text: If your army contains one or more units with this ability, during the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of those units. While the selected unit is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

abl-fe01-ec6f-615f-3e1.name: Leader
abl-fe01-ec6f-615f-3e1.text: This model can be attached to the following units: IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, VOIDSMEN-AT-ARMS

abl-9389-142f-1ba0-7d6f.name: Warrant of Trade
abl-9389-142f-1ba0-7d6f.text: If your army contains one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to D3 IMPERIUM BATTLELINE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserve, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserve.

abl-8f9e-b2c-581b-ec15.name: Healing Serum
abl-8f9e-b2c-581b-ec15.text: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTERS) to the bearer's unit.

abl-b63b-a0eb-d7c-89be.name: Masters of Close Confines
abl-b63b-a0eb-d7c-89be.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-06ef-9a1f-72c7-c2ef.name: Navy Bodyguards
abl-06ef-9a1f-72c7-c2ef.text: If your Army Faction is not AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then for each VOIDFARERS CHARACTER unit you include in your army, you can include one VOIDSMEN-AT-ARMS unit in your army that does not count towards the number of RETINUE units your army can include.

abl-6998-4242-8a2c-5b47.name: Dedication to Duty
abl-6998-4242-8a2c-5b47.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-99a5-4a2e-fa5-765d.name: Nuncio-aquila
abl-99a5-4a2e-fa5-765d.text: Once per battle, at the start of any Command phase, you can select one objective marker within 6" of the bearer. All enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Each objective marker can only be targeted by this ability once per turn.

abl-a8c6-6db8-cabd-6683.name: Imperial Law
abl-a8c6-6db8-cabd-6683.text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [Lethal Hits] and [Precision] abilities.

abl-f416-3d00-9cce-33a3.name: Arbites medi-kit
abl-f416-3d00-9cce-33a3.text: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer's unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Exaction Vigilants to this unit.

abl-2f11-3bd0-4e01-4ed4.name: Soulguilt scanner
abl-2f11-3bd0-4e01-4ed4.text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-f978-a7d6-d772-e43d.name: Merciless Judgement
abl-f978-a7d6-d772-e43d.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-dee0-6a07-757-2bb2.name: Xenos Hunter
abl-dee0-6a07-757-2bb2.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-2368-91f8-2bf5-6059.name: Psychic Veil (Psychic)
abl-2368-91f8-2bf5-6059.text: In your Command phase, this PSYKER can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your next Command phase, this PSYKER’s unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abl-4492-7bc1-b22a-ce09.name: Leader
abl-4492-7bc1-b22a-ce09.text: This model can be attached to the following units: AQUILA KILL TEAM,  BATTLELINE IMPERIUM INFANTRY, EXACTION SQUAD, IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS, SUBDUCTOR SQUAD, VIGILANT SQUAD

abl-3236-3866-ec87-2be6.name: Malefic Wardings (Psychic)
abl-3236-3866-ec87-2be6.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save, and 4+ invulnerable save against Psychic Attacks and attacks made by DAEMON models.

abl-19cd-fd4e-a442-e532.name: Spy Network
abl-19cd-fd4e-a442-e532.text: Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP.

abl-fb10-be00-0ae5-af5b.name: Leader
abl-fb10-be00-0ae5-af5b.text: This model can be attached to the following units: BATTLELIINE IMPERIUM INFANTRY, EXACTION SQUAD, GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD, IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS, SUBDUCTOR SQUAD, VIGILANT SQUAD

abl-6c59-e8ed-fb44-3ac2.name: Glovodan Psyber-eagle
abl-6c59-e8ed-fb44-3ac2.text: In your Command phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-335-9406-8606-6855.name: Psyoculum
abl-335-9406-8606-6855.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ANTI-PSYKER 4+] ability.

abl-1fbb-5352-7e95-368c.name: No Mercy
abl-1fbb-5352-7e95-368c.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-78d8-31a4-437b-e717.name: Leader
abl-78d8-31a4-437b-e717.text: This model can be attached to the following units: EXACTION SQUAD, IMPERIUM BATTLELINE INFANTRY, IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS, SISTERS OF BATTLE SQUAD, SUBDUCTOR SQUAD, VIGILANT SQUAD

abl-df6b-51ed-415c-5e5f.name: Unsubtle Crusader
abl-df6b-51ed-415c-5e5f.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to 3 ^^**Agents of the Imperium Infantry^^** units from your army, or one ^^**Imperium Battleline^^** unit from your army - those units gain the Scouts 6" ability.

abl-ecfc-f79d-869b-ba13.name: Throne of Judgement (Aura)
abl-ecfc-f79d-869b-ba13.text: While a friendly unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abl-5121-f15b-7863-647d.name: Leader
abl-5121-f15b-7863-647d.text: This model can be attached to the following units: AQUILA KILL TEAM, BATTLELINE IMPERIUM INFANTRY, EXACTION SQUAD, GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD, IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, INQUISITORIAL AGENTS, SANCTIFIERS, SISTERS OF BATTLE SQUAD, SUBDUCTOR SQUAD, VIGILANT SQUAD

abl-3ae5-52a5-65d0-fef8.name: Blessed Wardings
abl-3ae5-52a5-65d0-fef8.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

abl-a223-6a80-963d-f5ca.name: Psychic gifts
abl-a223-6a80-963d-f5ca.text: The bearer has the PSYKER keyword.

abl-8611-4228-ef56-ce00.name: Leader
abl-8611-4228-ef56-ce00.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
■ DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM (including FORTIS KILL TEAM, INDOMITOR KILL TEAM, PROTEUS KILL TEAM and SPECTRUS KILL TEAM) 
■ DAEMONHOST
■ EXACTION SQUAD 
■ IMPERIUM BATTLELINE INFANTRY 
■ IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS
■ INQUISITORIAL AGENTS
■ SUBDUCTOR SQUAD
■ VIGILANT SQUAD

abl-3aa6-2e1e-cf55-6803.name: Malus Codicium
abl-3aa6-2e1e-cf55-6803.text: While this model is leading a unit, double the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by Daemonhost models in that unit.

abl-3a2c-ca3d-1282-c6aa.name: Dominate Will (Psychic)
abl-3a2c-ca3d-1282-c6aa.text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy INFANTRY unit that is within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, until the end of the phase, that unit is not eligible to shoot.

abl-72a6-898-ae8c-5dbb.name: Evade and Survive
abl-72a6-898-ae8c-5dbb.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move.

abl-df3e-9e08-d754-cbbe.name: Leader
abl-df3e-9e08-d754-cbbe.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS
■ VOIDSMEN-AT-ARMS

abl-7fdc-db34-e195-b807.name: Grim Spectres
abl-7fdc-db34-e195-b807.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result when doing so.

abl-1822-763e-13b4-2cca.name: Leader
abl-1822-763e-13b4-2cca.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
■ DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM (including FORTIS KILL TEAM, INDOMITOR KILL TEAM, PROTEUS KILL TEAM and SPECTRUS KILL TEAM) 
■ DEATHWATCH TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ EXACTION SQUAD 

■ GREY KNIGHTS TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ IMPERIUM BATTLELINE INFANTRY 
■ IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS
■ INQUISITORIAL AGENTS
■ SISTERS OF BATTLE SQUAD
■ SUBDUCTOR SQUAD
■ VIGILANT SQUAD

abl-3d7c-d9c2-2269-6b9b.name: Psychic Gifts
abl-3d7c-d9c2-2269-6b9b.text: The bearer has the PSYKER keyword.

abl-0995-098b-6cd1-63aa.name: Third Eye (Psychic)
abl-0995-098b-6cd1-63aa.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 2 from the result if it is an INFANTRY unit; if the test is failed, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-5ca2-9f19-aa99-c21d.name: Gaze into the Empyrean (Psychic)
abl-5ca2-9f19-aa99-c21d.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abl-946f-0b3a-1e17-7be8.name: Leader
abl-946f-0b3a-1e17-7be8.text: This model can be attached to the following units: IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, VOIDSMEN-AT-ARMS

abl-3eab-db6a-2f7f-e2df.name: Holy Hatred
abl-3eab-db6a-2f7f-e2df.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-af86-3df0-97e2-9c6a.name: Support
abl-af86-3df0-97e2-9c6a.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: INQUISITORIAL AGENTS, IMPERIAL NAVY BREACHERS, SUBDUCTOR SQUAD, EXACTION SQUAD, VIGILANT SQUAD, SISTERS OF BATTLE SQUAD.


*You can attach this model to an INQUISITORIAL AGENTS unit, even if one INQUISITOR unit has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strength.*

abl-8880-6ed8-900d-b348.name: Loyal Henchmen
abl-8880-6ed8-900d-b348.text: While an INQUISITOR model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-0e46-e68b-8ade-cf66.name: Inquisitorial Henchmen
abl-0e46-e68b-8ade-cf66.text: If your Army Faction is not AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then for each INQUISITOR unit you include in your army, you can include one INQUISITORIAL AGENTS unit in your army that does not count towards the number of RETINUE units your army can include.

abl-65d4-a918-be0a-9c78.name: Tome-skull
abl-65d4-a918-be0a-9c78.text: Once per battle for each Tome-skull this unit is equipped with, at the start of any phase, you can select one other friendly AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM unit that is Battle-shocked and within 6" of this unit or one enemy unit within 6" of this unit. If you select a friendly unit, that unit is no longer Battle-shocked. If you select an enemy unit, it must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-5238-b380-59cf-2782.name: Rites of Teleportation
abl-5238-b380-59cf-2782.text: If one or more INQUISITOR units are attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, models in those units have the Deep Strike ability.

abl-c37b-09fa-19f6-3e9b.name: Hammerhand (Psychic)
abl-c37b-09fa-19f6-3e9b.text: Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-8e06-67f1-2c4a-f73a.name: Ancient's Banner
abl-8e06-67f1-2c4a-f73a.text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

abl-d7a4-aa32-4039-2e3c.name: Narthecium
abl-d7a4-aa32-4039-2e3c.text: In your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding CHARACTERS) to the bearer's unit.

abl-9638-a14f-e640-cf61.name: Rapid Deployment
abl-9638-a14f-e640-cf61.text: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

abl-6d66-4563-4a27-0a79.name: Defenders of the Faith
abl-6d66-4563-4a27-0a79.text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models in range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-1499-da67-d675-dba5.name: Incensor Cherub
abl-1499-da67-d675-dba5.text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP and can do so if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abl-5000-04c7-36a4-2a95.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abl-5000-04c7-36a4-2a95.text: Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer's unit by 1.

abl-7f12-782b-ccb8-c711.name: Transport
abl-7f12-782b-ccb8-c711.text:
This model has a transport capacity of 6 ORDO HERETICUS INFANTRY models.

At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one SISTERS OF BATTLE SQUAD from your army. If you do, that unit is split into two units, each containing as equal a number of models as possible (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units). One of these units must start the battle embarked within this TRANSPORT; the other can start the battle embarked within another TRANSPORT, or it can be deployed as a separate unit.

abl-63f5-e162-abaf-9a62.name: Purge and Cleanse
abl-63f5-e162-abaf-9a62.text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-bb60-f780-ef5f-7987.name: Malefic Warding
abl-bb60-f780-ef5f-7987.text: While an INQUISITOR model is leading a unit that contains one or more DAEMONHOST models, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-8b06-5f1e-5f34-ca2a.name: Bound Daemon
abl-8b06-5f1e-5f34-ca2a.text: While an INQUISITOR model is leading a unit that includes one or more DAEMONHOST models, the Objective Control characteristic of DAEMONHOST models in that unit is 1.

abl-b101-9bad-78b9-f996.name: Inquisitorial Retinue
abl-b101-9bad-78b9-f996.text: If your Army Faction is not AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then for each unique pairing of 1 INQUISITORIAL AGENTS unit and 1 DAEMONHOST unit occuring in your army, increase the maximum number of RETINUE units permitted in your army by 1. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one INQUISITORIAL AGENTS unit from your army that is being led by an INQUISITOR model (a unit cannot have more than one DAEMONHOST unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abl-da04-98f6-a254-edae.name: Inconceivable Augmentation
abl-da04-98f6-a254-edae.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-6dec-3f3f-834e-29cc.name: Leader
abl-6dec-3f3f-834e-29cc.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
■ Inquisitorial Agents

*You can attach this model to an INQUISITORIAL AGENTS unit, even if one INQUISITOR unit has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

abl-7d7c-3a51-e693-0672.name: Inquisitorial Agent
abl-7d7c-3a51-e693-0672.text: If your Army Faction is not AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM, then for each unique pairing of 1 INQUISITORIAL AGENTS unit and 1 JOKAERO WEAPONSMITH unit occuring in your army, increase the maximum number of CHARACTER units permitted in your army by 1.

abl-4ce7-15a8-4958-3b4e.name: A Weaponsmith, Not a Warlord
abl-4ce7-15a8-4958-3b4e.text: This model cannot be selected to be your Warlord. While an INQUISITOR model is leading a unit that includes one or more JOKAERO WEAPONSMITH models, the Objective Control characteristic of JOKAERO WEAPONSMITH models in that unit is 1.

abl-bdc3-5be2-5891-987b.name: Blackstar Cluster Launcher
abl-bdc3-5be2-5891-987b.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-b96c-8339-3322-a92e.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abl-b96c-8339-3322-a92e.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-8caa-45ec-02cc-cb5e.name: Transport
abl-8caa-45ec-02cc-cb5e.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 DEATHWATCH INFANTRY models.

abl-d65f-02cb-036a-f6b3.name: Auspex Array
abl-d65f-02cb-036a-f6b3.text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-ebc9-d057-a4d2-2301.name: Infernum Halo-launcher
abl-ebc9-d057-a4d2-2301.text: The bearer has the SMOKE keyword.

abl-a864-3776-d243-adcd.name: Fortis Doctrines
abl-a864-3776-d243-adcd.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-e9e3-81ec-087c-b8bf.name: Attached Unit
abl-e9e3-81ec-087c-b8bf.text: If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-26bd-b08b-4012-387f.name: Transport
abl-26bd-b08b-4012-387f.text: This unit cannot embark within an IMPERIAL RHINO.

abl-58e9-0f61-d97e-78ad.name: Indomitor Doctrines
abl-58e9-0f61-d97e-78ad.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-50d2-fa59-670d-516a.name: Attached Unit
abl-50d2-fa59-670d-516a.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army can be attached to a DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-362c-6893-6779-6259.name: Jump pack
abl-362c-6893-6779-6259.text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 10" and can move over models and terrain features as if they were not there.

abl-209d-da09-990b-aacd.name: Catechism of Death
abl-209d-da09-990b-aacd.text: While this unit contains Chaplain Cassius, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-a629-8789-1049-a8b1.name: Unflinching
abl-a629-8789-1049-a8b1.text: You can re-roll Battle-shock tests for this unit.

abl-592d-5ba3-6def-04bf.name: Jump Pack
abl-592d-5ba3-6def-04bf.text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain as if they were not there.

abl-3672-ce89-5d2d-d000.name: Psychic Hood
abl-3672-ce89-5d2d-d000.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abl-983b-3e69-e5a5-3ccd.name: Proteus Doctrines
abl-983b-3e69-e5a5-3ccd.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-d21b-63c6-4e69-7350.name: Attached Unit
abl-d21b-63c6-4e69-7350.text: If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-428b-7e29-91fd-2f82.name: Storm shield
abl-428b-7e29-91fd-2f82.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

abl-0748-8435-1f34-5b57.name: Jump Pack
abl-0748-8435-1f34-5b57.text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain features as if they were not there.

abl-3fda-fc6d-db15-78d2.name: Astartes shield
abl-3fda-fc6d-db15-78d2.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-0dd1-84cf-f0b9-5f2f.name: Spectrus Doctrines
abl-0dd1-84cf-f0b9-5f2f.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase.

abl-5525-ea73-2154-123b.name: Helix Gauntlet
abl-5525-ea73-2154-123b.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abl-269d-4ece-1814-dfae.name: Infiltrator Comms Array
abl-269d-4ece-1814-dfae.text: Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-9ade-4a2b-d826-e42a.name: Jump pack
abl-9ade-4a2b-d826-e42a.text: The bearer has a Move characteristic of 12" and can move over models and terrain features as if they were not there.

abl-85a2-03bc-8619-4c87.name: Turbo-boost
abl-85a2-03bc-8619-4c87.text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abl-8ae2-0f9c-05f1-da94.name: Astartes Shield
abl-8ae2-0f9c-05f1-da94.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-031c-1efa-dd80-b157.name: Tactical Instinct
abl-031c-1efa-dd80-b157.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-cb52-8ace-307f-c163.name: Unstoppable Champion
abl-cb52-8ace-307f-c163.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 1 wound remaining.

abl-d5b5-ce50-fdad-3a41.name: Leader
abl-d5b5-ce50-fdad-3a41.text: This model can be attached to the following units: AQUILA KILL TEAM, DEATHWATCH KILL TEAM

abl-bb75-0aef-e9ae-3fb6.name: Strategic Knowledge
abl-bb75-0aef-e9ae-3fb6.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abl-08a0-d7b9-c806-9a9c.name: Rites of Battle
abl-08a0-d7b9-c806-9a9c.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-076f-bb1f-48be-9b3d.name: Ministorum Sermon
abl-076f-bb1f-48be-9b3d.text: While this unit contains a **^^Ministorum Priest**^^, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-68be-e62c-f245-c857.name: Cherub
abl-68be-e62c-f245-c857.text: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abl-154c-dd68-8c6f-2483.name: Attached Unit
abl-154c-dd68-8c6f-2483.text: If a ^^**Ministorum Priest^^** or ^^**Inquisitor^^** model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Sisters of Battle Squad^^**, it can be attached to this unit instead. If a ^^**Ministorum Priest^^** or ^^**Inquisitor^^** model from your army is attached to this unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, that model gains the Scouts 6" ability.

abl-8fe3-58e0-69ad-30d2.name: Simulacrum Imperialis
abl-8fe3-58e0-69ad-30d2.text: Improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

abl-0aad-6917-8a35-facb.name: Ward Against the Malefic Arts
abl-0aad-6917-8a35-facb.text: While this unit is leading a unit, each time a Psychic Attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-a0bb-2f75-d3f5-d444.name: Vox‑cast Proclamations (Aura)
abl-a0bb-2f75-d3f5-d444.text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this unit’s Inquisitor Ostromandeus model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-a5b6-7563-3cba-8fff.name: Vox-skull
abl-a5b6-7563-3cba-8fff.text:
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) within 12" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, until the end of your next turn, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. 
**Designer’s Note**: *Place a vox‑skull token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

abl-e97c-a4cc-83c5-5a60.name: Moment of Glory
abl-e97c-a4cc-83c5-5a60.text: Once per battle, in the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model by 3.

abl-8574-0af7-a693-a12f.name: High-handed Authority
abl-8574-0af7-a693-a12f.text: While this model is leading a unit, it can embark within any ^^**Transport**^^ that its Bodyguard unit can embark within.

abl-609c-9739-e398-121c.name: Your Vigil is Not Yet Ended
abl-609c-9739-e398-121c.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can returned 1 destroyed model (excluding ^^**Character**^^ models) to that unit.

abl-18c7-6e45-7c8b-ddbd.name: Leader
abl-18c7-6e45-7c8b-ddbd.text: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Deathwatch Kill Team^^**

abl-bfdd-ffaa-bc5c-1c6e.name: Towering Reputation (Aura)
abl-bfdd-ffaa-bc5c-1c6e.text: While a friendly unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abl-b015-c548-af7c-69f1.name: On My Signal, Fire!
abl-b015-c548-af7c-69f1.text: After this unit has shot, you can select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time an ^^**Agents of the Imperium^^** or ^^**Imperium Infantry Battleline^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

abl-ad6b-ebb2-a929-8c9a.name: Tox‑cycler
abl-ad6b-ebb2-a929-8c9a.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if this model scored a hit with its Jindarii tox‑cycler, until the end of the battle, add 2 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of that weapon (to a maximum Damage characteristic of 6).

abl-a5bc-5224-a2e5-6173.name: Litanies of the Devout
abl-a5bc-5224-a2e5-6173.text: While this unit is leading a unit and contains a Chaplain Grimaldus model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-2e00-2ac9-9892-856.name: Temple Relics
abl-2e00-2ac9-9892-856.text:
In your Command phase, if this unit contains one or more Cenobyte Servitor models, select one Temple Relics ability (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this unit’s Chaplain Grimaldus model has that ability.


Banner of the Emperor Victorious: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls for this unit


Column of the Major Alter: Add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in this unit


Water from the Stoup of Elucidation: Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.

abl-77d4-dfb9-b00-6384.name: Leader
abl-77d4-dfb9-b00-6384.text:
This unit can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Crusader Squad
■ Sword Brethren

abl-89a6-52b4-cba8-4f11.name: Crusade of Wrath
abl-89a6-52b4-cba8-4f11.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abl-6e7f-e156-fc38-c2a4.name: High Marshal
abl-6e7f-e156-fc38-c2a4.text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for every five models in this model's unit: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-298-2fa3-345c-5083.name: Leader
abl-298-2fa3-345c-5083.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Crusader Squad
■ Sword Brethren

abl-de7b-731d-90db-dfd9.name: Exploit Their Cowardice
abl-de7b-731d-90db-dfd9.text: Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit is selected to Fall Back, after it ends that Fall Back move, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move.

abl-5fd9-3afc-fe70-7413.name: Armour of Faith
abl-5fd9-3afc-fe70-7413.text: Once per phase, when an attack is allocated to this model and the saving throw is failed, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abl-fe37-8476-e585-39ac.name: Sigismund's Heir
abl-fe37-8476-e585-39ac.text:
▪ When this unit declares a charge, If an enemy CHARACTER unit is within 12" of this unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do:
      ▫ This unit can re-roll that charge roll.
      ▫ This unit must end that charge move engaged with one or more of those enemy CHARACTER units.


▪ (Once per battle, per army) In the Fight phase, when this unit is selected to fight, if this unit is engaged with a CHARACTER unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do, this unit's melee attacks have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

abl-bf68-f429-d743-b6eb.name: Leader
abl-bf68-f429-d743-b6eb.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Crusader Squad
■ Sword Brethren
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad

abl-4c58-d25d-01ac-87e2.name: Chosen of the Emperor
abl-4c58-d25d-01ac-87e2.text: You cannot include more than one **^^Emperor's Champion^^** model in your army.

abl-6e41-bf9f-317c-e83f.name: Aquilon Optics
abl-6e41-bf9f-317c-e83f.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks

abl-5fba-bcd5-68e4-d3d8.name: Rotating Death
abl-5fba-bcd5-68e4-d3d8.text: This model’s twin heavy onslaught gatling cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability when targeting Infantry units.

abl-5a51-6971-8406-6bd7.name: Ferocious Assault
abl-5a51-6971-8406-6bd7.text: Each time this model makes an attack with its twin las-talon that targets the closest eligible Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll

abl-81d0-6092-93e0-d602.name: Transport
abl-81d0-6092-93e0-d602.text: This model has a transport capacity of 7 TACTICUS or PHOBOS INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models.

abl-5acc-d822-413-23b4.name: Assault Vehicle
abl-5acc-d822-413-23b4.text: Units can disembark from this Transport after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move, and cannot declare a charge that turn.

abl-bff6-bd1-230f-5cb0.name: Orbital Comms Array [Aura]
abl-bff6-bd1-230f-5cb0.text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP

abl-32cb-25c5-f0e7-9a98.name: Shield Dome
abl-32cb-25c5-f0e7-9a98.text: The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-30b7-f838-af91-b9ee.name: Transport
abl-30b7-f838-af91-b9ee.text: This model has a transport capacity of 14 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-302a-8708-2da5-e44.name: Stabilised Disembarkation
abl-302a-8708-2da5-e44.text: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time and enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any of those attacks targeted this TRANSPORT, it can use this ability. If it does, any units embarked within it can disembark. When doing so, models in those units can be set up wholly within 6" of this TRANSPORT and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abl-fb6-c336-8334-c5ae.name: Transport
abl-fb6-c336-8334-c5ae.text: This model has a transport capacity of 7 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-7d94-8e40-fde1-8179.name: Interception Strike
abl-7d94-8e40-fde1-8179.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is within 12" of one or more ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-460a-dc67-e3db-b6a6.name: Support
abl-460a-dc67-e3db-b6a6.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Crusader Squad
■ Sword Brethren
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-9359-87bf-5148-e6d2.name: Vehement Aggression
abl-9359-87bf-5148-e6d2.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is selected to fight, take a Leadership test for that unit: if passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll; if failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1

abl-1a65-fdc4-d7f2-6673.name: Prioritised Eradication
abl-1a65-fdc4-d7f2-6673.text: Each time a model in this model's unit makes a melee attack that destroys one or more enemy units, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1 CP

abl-7985-3a9a-2b9e-6c17.name: Leader
abl-7985-3a9a-2b9e-6c17.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Crusader Squad
■ Sword Brethren
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad

abl-33d5-9c8e-db2f-63b5.name: Inspirational Exemplar
abl-33d5-9c8e-db2f-63b5.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abl-ae8f-82c1-8730-21fa.name: Pious Fervour
abl-ae8f-82c1-8730-21fa.text: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model's Master-Crafted Power Weapon for each enemy unit within 6" of this model (to a maximum of +3)

abl-5556-141d-0859-95c1.name: Leader
abl-5556-141d-0859-95c1.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Crusader Squad
■ Sword Brethren

abl-0021-dd8f-9cd5-4221.name: Remorseless Persecution
abl-0021-dd8f-9cd5-4221.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abl-ac40-1010-2b03-450d.name: Condemnatory Annihilation
abl-ac40-1010-2b03-450d.text: Each time this model's unit has fought, if one or more enemy units were destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test

abl-a4e2-cedf-8dfb-5139.name: Vitruous Onslaught
abl-a4e2-cedf-8dfb-5139.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target, you can re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-468e-20f0-e3bb-3190.name: Teleport Homer
abl-468e-20f0-e3bb-3190.text: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 8" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

abl-f2bd-5f63-d647-6f4c.name: Judgement of the Weak
abl-f2bd-5f63-d647-6f4c.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within engagement range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abl-ef4e-2f51-9a93-0283.name: Sigismund's Heir
abl-ef4e-2f51-9a93-0283.text: Each time this model's unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge have the CHARACTER keyword, add 2 to the Charge roll. Once per battle, when this model's unit is selected to fight, if that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy CHARACTER units, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by this model have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-c5e1-99a6-a51e-251e.name: Redeemer of the Lost
abl-c5e1-99a6-a51e-251e.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-2cc0-3a51-cd4f-429e.name: Mass of Doom
abl-2cc0-3a51-cd4f-429e.text: Each time this model’s unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-7ee0-8183-ece2-25c9.name: Leader
abl-7ee0-8183-ece2-25c9.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Death Company Marines with Jump Packs

abl-acf-498-6031-bf2f.name: Overcharged Engines
abl-acf-498-6031-bf2f.text: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for this model.

abl-997a-75ae-da4b-a534.name: Sanguinary Priest
abl-997a-75ae-da4b-a534.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-ba5c-785b-b694-3943.name: The Red Grail
abl-ba5c-785b-b694-3943.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abl-1a2a-a768-270-a49b.name: Leader
abl-1a2a-a768-270-a49b.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad
■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Devastator Squad
■ Tactical Squad
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad

abl-f81-2576-e3dd-1a7.name: Gifted Commander
abl-f81-2576-e3dd-1a7.text:
While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities to apply to ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit until the end of the phase:


■ [ASSAULT]
■ [HEAVY]
■ [RAPID FIRE 1]

abl-4941-ff7-a233-6730.name: Embittered
abl-4941-ff7-a233-6730.text: The first time an attack is allocated to this model, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, until the end of the battle, change the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Dead Man’s Hand to 12

abl-9a2c-4043-5435-40ea.name: Leader
abl-9a2c-4043-5435-40ea.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad
■ Command Squad
■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Company Heroes
■ Tactical Squad
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad

abl-a116-17c9-deb4-9f1d.name: Tycho
abl-a116-17c9-deb4-9f1d.text: Your army cannot contain both Captain Tycho and Tycho the Lost.

abl-5fd1-7d5a-c19a-64db.name: Forlorn Hero
abl-5fd1-7d5a-c19a-64db.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is  eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abl-6d90-b55-d2b0-6522.name: Death Visions of Sanguinius
abl-6d90-b55-d2b0-6522.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the attacking unit contains the enemy Warlord: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D6+3 mortal wounds.

abl-a92c-5b74-19ab-ab59.name: Leader
abl-a92c-5b74-19ab-ab59.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Death Company Marines

abl-f775-5667-be0b-35bc.name: The Quickening [Psychic]
abl-f775-5667-be0b-35bc.text: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn which it Advanced.

abl-b48f-aef0-7aa9-3500.name: Transfixing Gaze [Aura, Psychic]
abl-b48f-aef0-7aa9-3500.text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

abl-edcb-c05a-9bcb-12c7.name: Death Mask of Sanguinius
abl-edcb-c05a-9bcb-12c7.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test when they do

abl-56e5-d5ec-38c6-e113.name: Lord Regent of the Imperium Nihilus
abl-56e5-d5ec-38c6-e113.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit and each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-b139-df4f-7162-cce8.name: Leader
abl-b139-df4f-7162-cce8.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad with Jump Packs
■ Sanguinary Guard
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad with Jump Packs
■ Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs

abl-2933-487d-d513-21d9.name: Frenzied Reprisal
abl-2933-487d-d513-21d9.text: Each time an enemy unit targets this model, after that unit has finished making its attacks, this model can either shoot as if it were your Shooting phase or fight as if it were the Fight phase.

abl-bdca-ea55-dd4a-8d3f.name: Magna-grapple
abl-bdca-ea55-dd4a-8d3f.text: Add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer if one or more of the targets of that charge is a MOSNTER or VEHICLE unit.

abl-5b90-43fc-7d4c-513e.name: An Honourable Death in Combat
abl-5b90-43fc-7d4c-513e.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if this unit is below its Starting Strength, or the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability if this unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-40bf-8f05-f081-8fe0.name: Attached Leader
abl-40bf-8f05-f081-8fe0.text:
If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Tactical Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.


If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Death Company Marines unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-6353-b576-82ad-a3fb.name: Savage Fury
abl-6353-b576-82ad-a3fb.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

abl-fa3d-61ea-538d-3a98.name: Attached Unit
abl-fa3d-61ea-538d-3a98.text: If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs, it can be attached to this unit instead

abl-8cf6-e018-6131-88d1.name: Wrathful Rampage
abl-8cf6-e018-6131-88d1.text: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range  of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-c5b0-88dc-12d1-c106.name: Magna-grapple
abl-c5b0-88dc-12d1-c106.text: The bearer loses the Smoke keyword, but  add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer if one or more of the targets of that charge is a Monster or Vehicle unit

abl-82e7-b329-1f35-91e7.name: Lord of Slaughter
abl-82e7-b329-1f35-91e7.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abl-6ff5-66f5-8a9f-2834.name: Whirlwind of Rage
abl-6ff5-66f5-8a9f-2834.text: Each time this model fights, until that fight is resolved, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Blood Reaver for every 5 enemy models within 6" of this model.

abl-4be3-3742-bb89-5787.name: Leader
abl-4be3-3742-bb89-5787.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad
■ Command Squad
■ Tactical Squad
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad
■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Company Heroes
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad

abl-e07d-ca56-c77-2dce.name: Guardian of the Lost
abl-e07d-ca56-c77-2dce.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-3863-f078-be63-9230.name: Fury Unbound
abl-3863-f078-be63-9230.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-701b-9655-4af1-e452.name: Shield of Sanguinius (Aura, Psychic)
abl-701b-9655-4af1-e452.text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abl-78af-53ce-b84c-2b1e.name: Wings of Sanguinius (Psychic)
abl-78af-53ce-b84c-2b1e.text:
Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one Psyker from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that Psyker suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit within 12" of that Psyker and remove the selected unit from the battlefield, then set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9"
horizontally away from all enemy models.

abl-5a4f-9341-88c9-9038.name: Angelic Visage
abl-5a4f-9341-88c9-9038.text: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll

abl-48cf-9858-89c4-f598.name: Heirs of Azkaellon
abl-48cf-9858-89c4-f598.text: While a Character model is leading this unit, each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-62ff-e5e0-9783-7024.name: Attached Unit
abl-62ff-e5e0-9783-7024.text: If a Captain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-a344-31d1-3cec-1aa4.name: Sanguinary Banner
abl-a344-31d1-3cec-1aa4.text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

abl-bb06-73be-d05e-4541.name: Sanguinary Priest
abl-bb06-73be-d05e-4541.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability

abl-2271-e1ab-2fb9-93c5.name: Blood Chalice
abl-2271-e1ab-2fb9-93c5.text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abl-5d3b-5258-5aad-75ca.name: Support
abl-5d3b-5258-5aad-75ca.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
- **^^Assault Intercessor Squad^^**
- **^^Bladeguard Veteran Squad^^**
- **^^Desolation Squad^^**
- **^^Devastator Squad^^**
- **^^Hellblaster Squad^^**
- **^^Infernus Squad^^**
- **^^Intercessor Squad^^**
- **^^Tactical Squad^^**
- **^^Sternguard Veteran Squad^^**


You can attach this model to one of the above units, even if one **^^Captain, Chapter Master^^** or **^^Lieutenant**^^ model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths

abl-a3b2-4a68-fe8f-f5fa.name: Aura of Fervour (Aura)
abl-a3b2-4a68-fe8f-f5fa.text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit

abl-9c8e-d8c0-5604-60f0.name: Miraculous Savior
abl-9c8e-d8c0-5604-60f0.text: (Once per battle, per army) At the end of your opponent's Charge phase (excluding the first battle round), you can select one enemy unit that made a charge move this phase. This unit can make an ingress move and must be set up engaged with that enemy unit.

abl-c994-11e8-ea71-2324.name: Leader
abl-c994-11e8-ea71-2324.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad with Jump Packs
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad with Jump packs
■ Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs

You can attach this model to one of the above units, even if one Captain, Chapter Master or Lieutenant model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-4a66-2580-e1a0-b4c2.name: Leader
abl-4a66-2580-e1a0-b4c2.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Bike Squad
■ Outrider Squad

abl-a4a8-f68b-1cd2-e2e7.name: Leader
abl-a4a8-f68b-1cd2-e2e7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Company Heroes
■ Tactical Squad

abl-d95d-9ac9-252e-b1fa.name: Leader
abl-d95d-9ac9-252e-b1fa.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Death Company Marines
■ Death Company Marines with Bolt Rifles

abl-064b-d740-a982-6678.name: Forlorn Hero
abl-064b-d740-a982-6678.text: While this model is leading a unit, unless that unit starts the battle embarked within a Transport, models in that unit have the Scouts 6" ability

abl-b276-0bcd-8baf-3c14.name: Death Vision of Sanguinius
abl-b276-0bcd-8baf-3c14.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, you can roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the attacking unit contains the enemy Warlord. On a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6+ that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-2569-0de4-1748-b6da.name: Lost to Fury
abl-2569-0de4-1748-b6da.text: When this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability

abl-38fc-ca21-107e-ed79.name: Leader
abl-38fc-ca21-107e-ed79.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Death Company Marines with Jump Packs

abl-8a7a-18df-3d39-6e3d.name: Attached Unit
abl-8a7a-18df-3d39-6e3d.text: If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Intercessor Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-b668-08f5-afe4-8611.name: Visions of Heresy
abl-b668-08f5-afe4-8611.text:
• This unit can re-roll charge rolls.
▪ When you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch/Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is -1 CP.

abl-2c20-3899-13f8-e9c5.name: Attached Unit
abl-2c20-3899-13f8-e9c5.text: If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessor Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-973b-a866-fedb-54d7.name: Driven by Fury
abl-973b-a866-fedb-54d7.text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this model lost a wound as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+2

abl-1d96-649b-fed0-e796.name: Beserk Fury
abl-1d96-649b-fed0-e796.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit

abl-8c1b-2833-573d-bae7.name: Attached Leader
abl-8c1b-2833-573d-bae7.text:
If a Chaplain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to Assault Intercessors with Jump Packs or an Assault Squad with Jump Packs, it can be attached to this unit instead.


If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Death Company Marines with Jump Packs unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-419d-1edd-9c5d-dff7.name: Supreme Grand Master
abl-419d-1edd-9c5d-dff7.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-5cab-d147-af7c-b68c.name: Masterful Tactician
abl-5cab-d147-af7c-b68c.text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abl-3bab-46d5-38a4-e70f.name: The Lion Helm
abl-3bab-46d5-38a4-e70f.text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save. In addition, once per battle, in any phase, the bearer can summon a Watcher in the Dark. When it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abl-c42f-33c4-62d9-93d9.name: Leader
abl-c42f-33c4-62d9-93d9.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad
■ Hellblaster Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Inner Circle Companions
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Tactical Squad

abl-5c8e-e7f9-5ded-2a58.name: Grand Master of the Deathwing
abl-5c8e-e7f9-5ded-2a58.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if a Critical Hit is scored, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

abl-1f47-7e55-2cae-535c.name: Strikes of Retribution
abl-1f47-7e55-2cae-535c.text: Each time a melee attack is allocated to this model, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-ea5f-a72d-372f-69f.name: Leader
abl-ea5f-a72d-372f-69f.text:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
■ Deathwing Knights
■ Deathwing Terminator Squad
■ Terminator Assault Squad
■ Terminator Squad

abl-cb53-58b7-a95a-b21c.name: Leader
abl-cb53-58b7-a95a-b21c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Outrider Squad
■ Ravenwing Black Knights

abl-8858-35c5-7be5-9f0a.name: Grand Master of the Ravenwing
abl-8858-35c5-7be5-9f0a.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If that unit is already eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit instead.

abl-226-2678-90ed-5d5.name: Cut Off Their Escape
abl-226-2678-90ed-5d5.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of this model’s unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle-shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abl-bdcd-bf0d-9e45-7127.name: Master of the Ravenwing
abl-bdcd-bf0d-9e45-7127.text: **^^Ravenwing^^** model only. This model's unit can declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, and you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-f048-48f8-8dc0-3001.name: Engulfing Fear [Psychic]
