abl-f048-48f8-8dc0-3001.text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-b91e-a6de-9238-9ee1.name: Book of Salvation
abl-b91e-a6de-9238-9ee1.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit. When this model is destroyed, each friendly Adeptus Astartes unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-cf97-b93c-c35-1e55.name: Leader
abl-cf97-b93c-c35-1e55.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad
■ Hellblaster Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Inner Circle Companions
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veterans Squad
■ Tactical Squad

abl-cb36-69d9-6027-34d7.name: Exemplar of Hate
abl-cb36-69d9-6027-34d7.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-4483-333d-1b7-1499.name: Feared Interrogator
abl-4483-333d-1b7-1499.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy Character unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test when they do. In addition, each time this model destroys an enemy Character model with a melee attack, you gain 1CP.

abl-d7-26f-1f5c-5d7b.name: Primarch of the First Legion
abl-d7-26f-1f5c-5d7b.text: At the start of your Command phase, select two Primarch of the First Legion abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.

abl-525f-c5d8-d135-e7a1.name: The Emperor's Shield
abl-525f-c5d8-d135-e7a1.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-330c-47ba-cddb-1910.name: Dark Angels Bodyguard
abl-330c-47ba-cddb-1910.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Adeptus Astartes Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-d624-cd8c-e5fa-4603.name: Intractable Will
abl-d624-cd8c-e5fa-4603.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-c2a8-5405-6d21-f044.name: The Spiritshield Helm
abl-c2a8-5405-6d21-f044.text: This model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abl-a74d-6e5a-52a3-8a29.name: Leader
abl-a74d-6e5a-52a3-8a29.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Inner Circle Companions
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Tactical Squad

abl-8639-6848-43d7-63e7.name: Lightning-fast Manoeuvres
abl-8639-6848-43d7-63e7.text: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that attack was made by a model that can Fly, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

abl-2cff-f9b1-965c-5e8d.name: Damaged: 1-3 Wounds Remaining
abl-2cff-f9b1-965c-5e8d.text: While this model has 1-3 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-4821-326d-103b-a38c.name: Stasis Bomb
abl-4821-326d-103b-a38c.text: Once per battle, one model from your army with this ability can use it after it ends a Normal move. If it does, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Aircraft) that model moved over this phase. That unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and you must roll one D6: on a 1-3, that unit cannot Advance or Fall Back in your opponent’s next Movement phase; on a 4-6, that unit must Remain Stationary in your opponent’s next Movement phase. Each model can only use this ability once per battle.

abl-63a-27da-15f5-31d0.name: Storm of Vengeance
abl-63a-27da-15f5-31d0.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when another friendly Adeptus Astartes unit within 6" of this model is destroyed, one model with this ability can use it. If it does, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abl-a79a-fb98-5a0b-66ca.name: Icon of Old Caliban (Aura)
abl-a79a-fb98-5a0b-66ca.text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets that unit, that unit has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-9aa9-7a1a-e930-a53b.name: Knights of Caliban
abl-9aa9-7a1a-e930-a53b.text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ANTI-MONSTER 4+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] abilities.

abl-d659-103f-7990-1d94.name: Attached Unit
abl-d659-103f-7990-1d94.text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an Outrider Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-d06d-eddc-33f1-f9cc.name: Leader
abl-d06d-eddc-33f1-f9cc.text:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
■ Outrider Squad
■ Ravenwing Black Knights

abl-db8f-9d86-59e8-b9eb.name: Narthecium
abl-db8f-9d86-59e8-b9eb.text: While this unit contains a Ravenwing Apothecary, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character and Invader ATV models) to this unit.

abl-1d4c-173b-98d2-9ffd.name: Astartes Banner
abl-1d4c-173b-98d2-9ffd.text: While this unit contains a Ravenwing Ancient, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit.

abl-7ec7-12bc-d4f1-8221.name: Honour or Death
abl-7ec7-12bc-d4f1-8221.text: While this unit contains a Ravenwing Champion, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit and you can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abl-eae2-b4fb-2b33-c0e2.name: Inner Circle
abl-eae2-b4fb-2b33-c0e2.text: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-2227-baf0-132f-549f.name: Attached Unit
abl-2227-baf0-132f-549f.text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Terminator Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-fdbb-e7fe-2049-9899.name: Watcher in the Dark
abl-fdbb-e7fe-2049-9899.text: Once per battle, in any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an Adeptus Astartes model in this unit, this unit can summon a Watcher in the Dark. When it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abl-f2cb-8211-7899-158a.name: Deathwing
abl-f2cb-8211-7899-158a.text:
Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or to the Hit roll.
In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target (see Codex: Space Marines), add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-8d97-2572-c781-4135.name: Attached Unit
abl-8d97-2572-c781-4135.text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Sternguard Veteran Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-7a96-3999-3c95-cfa8.name: Braziers of Judgement
abl-7a96-3999-3c95-cfa8.text: While a Character model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-884d-4284-89ea-32d5.name: Emnity for the Unworthy
abl-884d-4284-89ea-32d5.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Character unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-9b3-3b90-f48c-380e.name: Talonmaster
abl-9b3-3b90-f48c-380e.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly Adeptus Astartes Mounted or Adeptus Astartes Fly Vehicle units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-e40d-a580-8e1f-cd2a.name: Nowhere To Hide
abl-e40d-a580-8e1f-cd2a.text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes Mounted or Adeptus Astartes Fly Vehicle unit is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-fdde-d4a-774c-9306.name: Master of Manoeuvre
abl-fdde-d4a-774c-9306.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this model can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abl-8b71-718c-ef18-4939.name: Leader
abl-8b71-718c-ef18-4939.text:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
■ Deathwing Command Squad
■ Deathwing Terminator Squad

■ Relic Terminator Squad
■ Terminator Assault Squad
■ Terminator Squad

abl-7f5f-f0c0-a920-3b8.name: Tactical Precision
abl-7f5f-f0c0-a920-3b8.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-7634-2d39-6144-eece.name: Vanquish the Foe
abl-7634-2d39-6144-eece.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-ee22-6e5c-3330-8c9e.name: Storm Shield
abl-ee22-6e5c-3330-8c9e.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 6.

abl-3aaa-cca1-0253-cf09.name: Astartes Banner
abl-3aaa-cca1-0253-cf09.text: While this unit contains an Ancient, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of its models.

abl-6e99-dde5-9838-f044.name: Narthecium
abl-6e99-dde5-9838-f044.text: While this unit contains an Apothecary, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding Character models) to this unit.

abl-4bab-cba8-e78d-0883.name: Honour or Death
abl-4bab-cba8-e78d-0883.text: While this unit contains a Company Champion, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit and you can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

abl-3fd6-f123-4dd9-18d3.name: Storm Shield
abl-3fd6-f123-4dd9-18d3.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

abl-17f1-675b-5c2b-d950.name: Invulnerable Save
abl-17f1-675b-5c2b-d950.text: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-d4de-4cfa-ee54-d422.name: Watch Master
abl-d4de-4cfa-ee54-d422.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-6240-ce76-8480-ccfe.name: Leader
abl-6240-ce76-8480-ccfe.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- DEATHWATCH VETERANS
- FORTIS KILL TEAM

abl-8863-f9da-9fe5-8262.name: Leader
abl-8863-f9da-9fe5-8262.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
- DEATHWATCH VETERANS
- FORTIS KILL TEAM

abl-4d9c-b69c-4685-27b7.name: Transport
abl-4d9c-b69c-4685-27b7.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or KILL TEAM models. Each JUMP PACK, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-c729-b51b-629d-5df9.name: Terminatus Assault
abl-c729-b51b-629d-5df9.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that enemy unit does not have the IMPERIUM or CHAOS keywords, subtract 1 from that test.

abl-72d-cf90-8721-2810.name: Teleport Homer
abl-72d-cf90-8721-2810.text: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" of that token and not within 9" of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

abl-f1f4-4cb5-6192-b88b.name: Invulnerable Save
abl-f1f4-4cb5-6192-b88b.text: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-79ca-a242-bf33-a426.name: Attached Unit
abl-79ca-a242-bf33-a426.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a TERMINATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-cd92-208e-7559-9c9b.name: Fortis Doctrines
abl-cd92-208e-7559-9c9b.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

abl-a226-1a6e-44f-6113.name: Attached Unit
abl-a226-1a6e-44f-6113.text: If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-f8b6-3181-7e49-fb57.name: Indomitor Doctrines
abl-f8b6-3181-7e49-fb57.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, or makes a melee attack in a turn in which it made a Charge move, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 2.

abl-b8a4-e32-bbbb-4e78.name: Attached Unit
abl-b8a4-e32-bbbb-4e78.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army can be attached to a HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-e966-dcf9-893d-a8f8.name: Attached Unit
abl-e966-dcf9-893d-a8f8.text:
If a CHARACTER from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an INFILTRATOR SQUAD, it can be attached to this unit instead. 
If this unit has a Leader unit attached to it during the Declare Battle Formations step, that Leader unit gains the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" abilities.

abl-afc0-1ac-ce23-3a4f.name: Spectrus Doctrines
abl-afc0-1ac-ce23-3a4f.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-c1da-c076-7de5-5ee6.name: Instigator Bolt Carbine
abl-c1da-c076-7de5-5ee6.text: In your Shooting phase, after the bearer’s unit has shot, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, the bearer’s unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-088e-3c36-f4e3-6140.name: Talonstrike Doctrines
abl-088e-3c36-f4e3-6140.text:
Each time this unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn:
- Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1. 
- Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abl-de67-fb7c-d2b3-c29d.name: Attached Unit
abl-de67-fb7c-d2b3-c29d.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an ASSAULT INTERCESSORS WITH JUMP PACKS unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-e1f9-80b5-6bc7-21f3.name: Leader
abl-e1f9-80b5-6bc7-21f3.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

abl-3f64-f896-c54f-7fea.name: Hammerhand (Psychic)
abl-3f64-f896-c54f-7fea.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability.

abl-53db-1bc6-da94-f8e9.name: Eye of Judgement (Psychic)
abl-53db-1bc6-da94-f8e9.text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-24f5-4ea1-bbc0-fc59.name: Exemplar of the Silvered Host
abl-24f5-4ea1-bbc0-fc59.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, on a Critical Wound, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

abl-186a-f980-321d-d883.name: Strands of Fate (Psychic)
abl-186a-f980-321d-d883.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abl-6201-69fa-9b1f-ef80.name: Leader
abl-6201-69fa-9b1f-ef80.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Purgation Squad
■ Strike Squad

abl-4020-4496-e5f3-62fd.name: Clarion of Haste (Psychic)
abl-4020-4496-e5f3-62fd.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-cc8f-6b40-8152-671f.name: Inspiring Exemplar
abl-cc8f-6b40-8152-671f.text: Each time this model destroys a Character model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and, until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

abl-82-db07-19c0-1f1b.name: Zealous Path
abl-82-db07-19c0-1f1b.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-970f-7243-ee6c-17e2.name: Haloed in Soulfire (Psychic)
abl-970f-7243-ee6c-17e2.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

abl-3dec-ee8c-120d-4010.name: Leader
abl-3dec-ee8c-120d-4010.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Brotherhood Terminator Squad^^**
- **^^Paladin Squad^^**

abl-9d41-eb97-8f61-fb85.name: Sanctic Hood
abl-9d41-eb97-8f61-fb85.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abl-a0a4-1a94-df1f-ef4f.name: Leader
abl-a0a4-1a94-df1f-ef4f.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Strike Squad
■ Purgation Squad
■ Purifier Squad

abl-877c-7676-7032-ecd3.name: Guardians of the Machine
abl-877c-7676-7032-ecd3.text:
Each time an enemy unit ends a **charge move engaged** with one or more friendly **GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE** units and within 6" of this unit, you can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:
- That use is -1 CP.
- That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.

abl-f298-3658-77a2-5851.name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
abl-f298-3658-77a2-5851.text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that ^^**Vehicle^^** model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abl-7750-f512-8316-e851.name: Techmarine
abl-7750-f512-8316-e851.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Grey Knights Vehicle**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-3cd-1880-37fe-4cfc.name: Champion of the Order of Purifiers (Psychic)
abl-3cd-1880-37fe-4cfc.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Purifying Flame weapons equipped by that unit.

abl-7414-1762-a008-9828.name: Foesight (Psychic)
abl-7414-1762-a008-9828.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-722a-9e45-fe18-94aa.name: Leader
abl-722a-9e45-fe18-94aa.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Purifier Squad

abl-f271-762e-61ae-367f.name: Might of Titan (Psychic)
abl-f271-762e-61ae-367f.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abl-1ee5-63a2-6c01-e628.name: Surge of Wrath (Psychic)
abl-1ee5-63a2-6c01-e628.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abl-b513-f80c-9d48-db05.name: Sanctuary (Psychic)
abl-b513-f80c-9d48-db05.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-bf8c-be10-e632-646d.name: Hammer Aflame (Psychic)
abl-bf8c-be10-e632-646d.text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-c1d5-950b-12b6-7201.name: Assault Ramp
abl-c1d5-950b-12b6-7201.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abl-b9fd-80d9-a165-1812.name: Fire Focus
abl-b9fd-80d9-a165-1812.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this ^^**Transport^^** this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abl-3355-18b8-ee22-87f9.name: Truesilver Aegis (Psychic)
abl-3355-18b8-ee22-87f9.text: While a friendly ^^**Grey Knights^^** unit is wholly within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

abl-f531-b188-9179-2f5a.name: Interceptor
abl-f531-b188-9179-2f5a.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-c534-53bb-4d73-23d2.name: Armoured Resilience
abl-c534-53bb-4d73-23d2.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-133a-43b1-cad3-95d6.name: Strafing Run
abl-133a-43b1-cad3-95d6.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll

abl-9b3c-49ee-2ca0-7bcf.name: Guidance of the Ancients (Psychic)
abl-9b3c-49ee-2ca0-7bcf.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a ^^**Grey Knights^^** model from your army makes an attack which targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-8d05-c69c-2572-99ba.name: Personal Teleporters
abl-8d05-c69c-2572-99ba.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-cf12-2ea5-6834-5031.name: Untouchable Purity
abl-cf12-2ea5-6834-5031.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds

abl-c3e8-c9b9-519a-6552.name: One With the Warp (Psychic)
abl-c3e8-c9b9-519a-6552.text: Once per battle, when this model’s unit declares a charge in the same turn it was set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike or Teleport Assault ability, add 3 to the Charge roll.

abl-a802-75b0-2e06-2487.name: Supreme Commander
abl-a802-75b0-2e06-2487.text: If this model is in your army, it must be your WARLORD.

abl-c53f-7fdc-438d-5dcd.name: Indomitable Spirit (Psychic)
abl-c53f-7fdc-438d-5dcd.text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abl-6515-217f-6031-85ce.name: Righteous Persecution
abl-6515-217f-6031-85ce.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** or ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks; until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abl-f2c4-c894-81d4-d126.name: Sanctity of Purpose
abl-f2c4-c894-81d4-d126.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-e301-c532-9ade-1060.name: Sanctifying Ritual (Psychic)
abl-e301-c532-9ade-1060.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker that you control, that objective marker remains under you control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abl-dae-a965-1e6d-d79a.name: Damaged: 1-10 Wounds Remaining
abl-dae-a965-1e6d-d79a.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-86b2-1076-cbe6-c46b.name: Aerial Assault
abl-86b2-1076-cbe6-c46b.text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abl-66fc-3811-9adc-d285.name: Thunderhawk cluster bombs
abl-66fc-3811-9adc-d285.text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-ddd3-a2ef-d91d-d153.name: Wisdom of the Ancients (Aura)
abl-ddd3-a2ef-d91d-d153.text: While a friendly **^^Grey Knights Infantry^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-8a33-f995-5228-9577.name: Fire Support
abl-8a33-f995-5228-9577.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-07ba-0c62-37d2-2042.name: Might of Titan
abl-07ba-0c62-37d2-2042.text: Once per battle, at the start of a phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model.

abl-2f76-c5d1-e844-864c.name: Leader
abl-2f76-c5d1-e844-864c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Purgation Squad^^**
- **^^Strike Squad^^**

abl-97ba-f037-a93d-caf4.name: Guidance of the Ancients
abl-97ba-f037-a93d-caf4.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a **^^Grey Knights^^** model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-fddf-8b8c-8f65-e59b.name: Surge of Wrath
abl-fddf-8b8c-8f65-e59b.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abl-8283-b27a-ec85-6670.name: Damaged: 1-4 Wounds Remaining
abl-8283-b27a-ec85-6670.text: When Damaged, subtract 1 from Hit rolls when it makes attacks.

abl-fd8a-2e51-e8c6-b34d.name: Icon of Obstinacy
abl-fd8a-2e51-e8c6-b34d.text: Each time an attack targets this model's unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-d463-8c1e-f1ef-ce55.name: Rampart
abl-d463-8c1e-f1ef-ce55.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 2+ invulnerable save.

abl-e9c8-e6ff-83d4-afee.name: Leader
abl-e9c8-e6ff-83d4-afee.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD
■ TERMINATOR SQUAD

abl-f384-d8fa-760e-cc30.name: Inspiring Commander
abl-f384-d8fa-760e-cc30.text: ‘If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Terminator Assault Squad and Terminator Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abl-dee6-67e8-9a8b-f5cd.name: Signum Array
abl-dee6-67e8-9a8b-f5cd.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-653d-148d-7c06-2436.name: Siege Captain
abl-653d-148d-7c06-2436.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster, Vehicle, or Fortification unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2.

abl-60a-b484-e0d7-43b7.name: Leader
abl-60a-b484-e0d7-43b7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ AGGRESSOR SQUAD
■ ERADICATOR SQUAD
■ HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD

abl-5324-763c-61f5-9e4b.name: Oath of Rynn
abl-5324-763c-61f5-9e4b.text: Once per battle, at the start of either player’s Command phase, this model can use this ability. When it does, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit.

abl-b20-ca96-c186-27dc.name: To the Last
abl-b20-ca96-c186-27dc.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-39c9-ff24-66c5-c3aa.name: Leader
abl-39c9-ff24-66c5-c3aa.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ COMPANY HEROES
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ TACTICAL SQUAD

abl-1544-468d-6b7c-a26b.name: Inspiring Commander
abl-1544-468d-6b7c-a26b.text:
If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Sternguard
Veteran Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abl-219d-340d-6681-ab1.name: Rites of Tempering
abl-219d-340d-6681-ab1.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability

abl-2095-1be1-e5cc-1cee.name: Iron Father
abl-2095-1be1-e5cc-1cee.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle units, it has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-c393-649d-7810-bcae.name: Master of the Forge
abl-c393-649d-7810-bcae.text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to 3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. You cannot select a unit for this ability that has already been selected for the Blessing of the Omnissiah ability this phase, and vice versa.

abl-1d65-986b-9266-a544.name: Inspiring Commander
abl-1d65-986b-9266-a544.text:
If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Heavy
Intercessor Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 3 while they are
not Battle-shocked.

abl-10ac-79f8-b15d-f71e.name: Cold and Calculating
abl-10ac-79f8-b15d-f71e.text:
Each time a model in this model’s unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, that
attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time a model in this model’s unit makes an attack that targets any other unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-1799-5ca3-1b00-be16.name: Cerebrex Logic Engine
abl-1799-5ca3-1b00-be16.text:
■ At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select one Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army. Until the end of the battle, that unit gains the Scouts 6" ability.


■ After both players have deployed their armies, you can select one Adeptus Astartes unit from your army and redeploy it. When doing so, you can set that unit up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-02a1-6815-f043-2fd8.name: Leader
abl-02a1-6815-f043-2fd8.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 


■ TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD
■ TERMINATOR SQUAD

abl-f688-b597-c9de-b5ac.name: Trifold Path of Shadow
abl-f688-b597-c9de-b5ac.text: While this model is leading a unit, models  in this unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 12".

abl-b769-af88-7e44-e386.name: Echo of the Ravenspire
abl-b769-af88-7e44-e386.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-babb-fe84-e1d4-1012.name: Leader
abl-babb-fe84-e1d4-1012.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ASSAULT INTERCESSORS WITH JUMP PACKS
■ VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS

abl-ed25-707a-ee0b-6b2f.name: Inspiring Commander
abl-ed25-707a-ee0b-6b2f.text:
If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Assault
Intercessors with Jump Packs units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abl-f9e2-1180-e33c-e82c.name: Chapter Master of the Raven Guard
abl-f9e2-1180-e33c-e82c.text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, if your army includes Aethon Shaan and Kayvaan
Shrike, until the end of the battle, your Kayvaan Shrike unit loses its Lone Operative ability and it
replaces its Chapter Master keyword with Captain.

abl-5dbe-abfc-6ac6-2061.name: Master of Shadows
abl-5dbe-abfc-6ac6-2061.text: In your Command phase, you can select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army declares a charge while it is within 12" of that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Charge roll, but it must declare that enemy unit as a target of that charge (if possible).

abl-1384-de6c-2c62-4f26.name: Blackwing Mantle
abl-1384-de6c-2c62-4f26.text:
You can target this model’s unit with the Rapid Ingress and Heroic Intervention Stratagems for 0CP,
even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abl-5a40-93b3-6c2a-f7cb.name: Unto the Anvil
abl-5a40-93b3-6c2a-f7cb.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-68e4-3da0-f6ab-8624.name: Lord of the Pyroclasts
abl-68e4-3da0-f6ab-8624.text: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this model, halve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit

abl-f678-23f8-a491-c7d2.name: Leader
abl-f678-23f8-a491-c7d2.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ COMPANY HEROES
■ INFERNUS SQUAD
■ INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ TACTICAL SQUAD

abl-b423-2ef4-b87c-b65d.name: Forgefather
abl-b423-2ef4-b87c-b65d.text: In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Adeptus Astartes model makes a ranged attack with a Torrent or Melta weapon that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll

abl-22fa-126d-31e4-6a5a.name: Seeker of the Unfound
abl-22fa-126d-31e4-6a5a.text: The first time this model is set up on the battlefield, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While this model is within range of that objective marker, it has an Objective Control characteristic of 10, a Leadership characteristic of 5+ and the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-56bf-fb53-c81d-ff4a.name: Leader
abl-56bf-fb53-c81d-ff4a.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ COMPANY HEROES
■ INFERNUS SQUAD
■ TACTICAL SQUAD

abl-e0e5-8c3a-3455-4d30.name: Inspiring Commander
abl-e0e5-8c3a-3455-4d30.text: If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Infernus Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 2 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abl-2863-a693-5033-2e7b.name: Refuse to Yield
abl-2863-a693-5033-2e7b.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, halve the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-65ac-314e-ef32-fc12.name: Leader
abl-65ac-314e-ef32-fc12.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ AGGRESSOR SQUAD
■ ERADICATOR SQUAD
■ HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ INDOMITOR KILL TEAM

abl-2d39-4b7-eecd-9111.name: Master of Deceit
abl-2d39-4b7-eecd-9111.text: After both players have deployed their armies, if your army includes one or more models with this ability, you can select up to three friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY units and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-707b-cbab-54ac-96eb.name: Leader
abl-707b-cbab-54ac-96eb.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ELIMINATOR SQUAD
■ INCURSOR SQUAD
■ INFILTRATOR SQUAD
■ REIVER SQUAD
■ SCOUT SQUAD
■ SPECTRUS KILL TEAM

abl-c0ec-c5a8-757a-a31c.name: Leader
abl-c0ec-c5a8-757a-a31c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ DEATHWATCH TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ DEATHWING KNIGHTS
■ DEATHWING TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD
■ TERMINATOR SQUAD

abl-131c-1105-d301-f6f9.name: Unstoppable Valour
abl-131c-1105-d301-f6f9.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this model’s unit.

abl-b7b7-62a5-211-3f1c.name: Angel's Wrath
abl-b7b7-62a5-211-3f1c.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee  weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abl-7bc3-a914-c28c-84d5.name: Leader
abl-7bc3-a914-c28c-84d5.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ASSAULT INTERCESSORS WITH JUMP PACKS
■ SANGUINARY GUARD
■ TALONSTRIKE KILL TEAM
■ VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS

abl-d54c-ae42-9d78-71df.name: Relic Shield
abl-d54c-ae42-9d78-71df.text: Add 1 to the bearer's Wounds characteristic.

abl-1164-3aff-c9a6-718d.name: Objective Secured
abl-1164-3aff-c9a6-718d.text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-4207-56a0-b930-84bd.name: Target Elimination
abl-4207-56a0-b930-84bd.text: Each time this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of bolt rifles equipped by models in this unit and you can only select one enemy unit as the target of all of this unit's attacks

abl-b3c7-e6c3-c500-616a.name: Purge the Foe
abl-b3c7-e6c3-c500-616a.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, you can select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a pyreblaster. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

abl-f80a-70bd-e9d-3452.name: Shock Assault
abl-f80a-70bd-e9d-3452.text: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-a59e-1577-d519-dcc2.name: Unyielding in the Face of the Foe
abl-a59e-1577-d519-dcc2.text:
While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, each time an attack with a Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a model in 
this unit, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

abl-bdf4-e126-138d-d0e5.name: Omni-scramblers
abl-bdf4-e126-138d-d0e5.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.

abl-214b-5fbd-3d7-670.name: Infiltrator Comms Array
abl-214b-5fbd-3d7-670.text: Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP

abl-19f7-84bb-8aca-b2de.name: Multi-spectrum Array
abl-19f7-84bb-8aca-b2de.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more attacks made by this unit this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-4f32-49a9-f45b-3eb9.name: Haywire Mine
abl-4f32-49a9-f45b-3eb9.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit within 3" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a Vehicle unit.

abl-8fc-8ef9-6b6f-25d9.name: Combat Squads
abl-8fc-8ef9-6b6f-25d9.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, before any units have been set up, this unit can be split into two units, each containing five models

abl-2e18-73a0-a8ca-130d.name: Guerrilla Tactics
abl-2e18-73a0-a8ca-130d.text:
At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy models, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into
Strategic Reserves.

abl-563a-ee5-af1a-990c.name: Concealed Positions
abl-563a-ee5-af1a-990c.text: This unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

abl-13f1-27da-509b-815f.name: Bladeguard
abl-13f1-27da-509b-815f.text:
At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one of the following abilities to apply to models in this unit until the end of the phase:

■ Swords of the Imperium: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Shields of the Imperium: Each time an invulnerable saving throw is made for a model in this unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

abl-d6a5-7f38-ea6f-5043.name: Vanguard Assault
abl-d6a5-7f38-ea6f-5043.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-339c-cd8-dc87-ad2b.name: Storm Shield
abl-339c-cd8-dc87-ad2b.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save

abl-d611-357d-2b19-b189.name: Vanguard Assault
abl-d611-357d-2b19-b189.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-f7ef-79f2-60c-8568.name: Sternguard Focus
abl-f7ef-79f2-60c-8568.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment Target, you can re-roll the wound roll

abl-2a6f-de17-6e0-6a6e.name: Fearsome Assault
abl-2a6f-de17-6e0-6a6e.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test subtracting 1 from that test

abl-234b-7f36-5b91-8b49.name: Terror Troops
abl-234b-7f36-5b91-8b49.text: While an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) is within 3" of one or more units with this ability, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

abl-85a4-4177-8c1b-e355.name: Grapnel Launchers
abl-85a4-4177-8c1b-e355.text:
Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance the
bearer can be moved during that move

abl-d035-b128-7039-4b37.name: Reiver Grav-chute
abl-d035-b128-7039-4b37.text: The bearer has the Deep Strike ability.

abl-f948-3939-520a-6b26.name: Close-quarters Firepower
abl-f948-3939-520a-6b26.text:
Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack
by 1.

abl-a277-c32c-c86d-654a.name: Terminatus Assault
abl-a277-c32c-c86d-654a.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit must take a Battle-Shock test.

abl-fe56-a10f-5d2-2e1a.name: Fury of the First
abl-fe56-a10f-5d2-2e1a.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-875d-2faf-5c2e-4b9.name: Fury of the First
abl-875d-2faf-5c2e-4b9.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic and/or to the Hit roll. In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit you selected for the Oath of Moment ability this turn, add 1 to the Hit roll

abl-ff3d-86cd-2b45-9e2b.name: Grenade Harness
abl-ff3d-86cd-2b45-9e2b.text: The bearer has the Grenades keyword

abl-dc57-888c-d72a-da1.name: Annihilator Protocols
abl-dc57-888c-d72a-da1.text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability when targeting Monster, Vehicle or Fortification units

abl-8f13-1a35-b240-3db9.name: Centurion Assault Launchers
abl-8f13-1a35-b240-3db9.text: The bearer has the Grenades keyword.

abl-4f61-91c6-eae4-94fa.name: Decimator Protocols
abl-4f61-91c6-eae4-94fa.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-e58e-7a39-e2bd-a58b.name: Combat Support
abl-e58e-7a39-e2bd-a58b.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly Adeptus Astartes Phobos Infantry unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, this model can use this ability. If it does, after that enemy model’s unit has finished making its attacks, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abl-53dd-b506-8f4b-26b2.name: Wisdom of the Ancients [Aura]
abl-53dd-b506-8f4b-26b2.text: While a friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-3bfc-c8c2-7d75-f058.name: Siege-breaker Protocols
abl-3bfc-c8c2-7d75-f058.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Vehicle or Fortification unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll

abl-431b-bb61-f40f-6c10.name: Ironclad Assault Launchers
abl-431b-bb61-f40f-6c10.text: The bearer has the Grenades keyword.

abl-3f75-88b1-db9c-63cd.name: Duty Eternal
abl-3f75-88b1-db9c-63cd.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack

abl-167c-25a9-9fed-9d96.name: Ballistus Strike
abl-167c-25a9-9fed-9d96.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-dbd0-636-26e-2482.name: Brutalis Charge
abl-dbd0-636-26e-2482.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds

abl-e865-1963-3fc1-1d05.name: Chainsword Doctrines
abl-e865-1963-3fc1-1d05.text:
Each time this unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to all Astartes chainswords equipped by models in this unit until the end of the phase: 

■ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
■ [LETHAL HITS]
■ [LANCE]

abl-6cd4-7f02-68da-a69a.name: Hammer of Wrath
abl-6cd4-7f02-68da-a69a.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-e845-dd69-ee7c-5661.name: Outrider Escort
abl-e845-dd69-ee7c-5661.text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when another friendly ^^Adeptus Astartes Mounted^^ unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase , but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit [and only if it is an eligible target).

abl-b4bd-e247-b596-4db2.name: Thunderous Impact
abl-b4bd-e247-b596-4db2.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1

abl-6542-61e5-432c-b5bf.name: Outrider Escort
abl-6542-61e5-432c-b5bf.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly ^^Adeptus Astartes Mounted^^ unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, this model can use this ability. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abl-adc4-9ea6-9780-7adc.name: Turbo Boost
abl-adc4-9ea6-9780-7adc.text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit

abl-f2ab-ba1c-96d6-9878.name: Outflank
abl-f2ab-ba1c-96d6-9878.text: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

abl-221-7d8c-a074-f7a8.name: Suppression Fire
abl-221-7d8c-a074-f7a8.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an accelerator autocannon. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-93be-2ff0-7890-946b.name: Meteoric Descent
abl-93be-2ff0-7890-946b.text: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform a meteoric descent. If it does, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-723f-1b4e-455d-839a.name: Hailstrike
abl-723f-1b4e-455d-839a.text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS or VEHICLES) that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

abl-5221-477f-fa83-f13f.name: Thunderstrike
abl-5221-477f-fa83-f13f.text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-3477-d6b3-fc9-9761.name: Hammerstrike
abl-3477-d6b3-fc9-9761.text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-930b-b532-25ef-9718.name: Fire and Redeploy
abl-930b-b532-25ef-9718.text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-7392-d65a-71c6-5e05.name: Strafing Enfilade
abl-7392-d65a-71c6-5e05.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) that it moved over during that move, then roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound

abl-3b11-6884-cf0b-a5bf.name: For the Chapter!
abl-3b11-6884-cf0b-a5bf.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can shoot after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play. When resolving these attacks, any Hazardous tests taken for that attack are automatically passed.

abl-d2ad-d0a2-4079-f902.name: Reposition Under Covering Fire
abl-d2ad-d0a2-4079-f902.text:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it contains an Eliminator Sergeant equipped with an instigator bolt carbine, this unit can make a
Normal move. If it does so, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-bda1-520a-6fd7-c422.name: Mark the Target
abl-bda1-520a-6fd7-c422.text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-4d12-6568-2ca8-dbf7.name: Total Obliteration
abl-4d12-6568-2ca8-dbf7.text: Each time a ranged attack made by a model in this unit targets a Monster or Vehicle model, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abl-cca-bd2e-137e-9ae0.name: Signum
abl-cca-bd2e-137e-9ae0.text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-f7bb-7761-411b-1eed.name: Armorium Cherub
abl-f7bb-7761-411b-1eed.text: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll for a model in this unit, you can change that roll to an unmodified 6.

abl-8aa0-92d7-7749-461d.name: Targeter Optics
abl-8aa0-92d7-7749-461d.text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next Movement phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the  [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-db5d-5858-6f5b-fe73.name: Tremor Shells
abl-db5d-5858-6f5b-fe73.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy Infantry unit was hit by one or more attacks made by this unit’s thunderfire cannon this  phase, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-2602-4d92-d83-46a8.name: Crewed Artillery
abl-2602-4d92-d83-46a8.text: If one model in this unit is destroyed, the remaining model in this unit is also destroyed

abl-1989-6f58-9d94-8045.name: Sentinel Protocols
abl-1989-6f58-9d94-8045.text: Each time you select this unit for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abl-a856-9b1d-a0a7-471c.name: Hunter Missile Targeting
abl-a856-9b1d-a0a7-471c.text: Each time this model makes an attack with its skyspear missile launcher that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack scores a hit on an unmodified Hit roll of 2+.

abl-c8ca-55cb-cdbc-fd1.name: Skyfire Protocols
abl-c8ca-55cb-cdbc-fd1.text: Each time you target this model with the Overwatch Stratagem just after an enemy unit that can Fly starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, when resolving that Stratagem, in addition to shooting that enemy unit, you can select up to three additional enemy units within 24" of this model that can Fly; this model can also shoot at each of those units with its Icarus stormcannons (provided each one is an eligible target), but when doing so, an unmodified Hit roll of 6 is required to score a hit.

abl-d421-3784-532e-2834.name: Pinning Bombardment
abl-d421-3784-532e-2834.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Whirlwind vengeance launcher scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-4bba-93e6-ebe2-381c.name: Destructor
abl-4bba-93e6-ebe2-381c.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an Infantry unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-93ac-8dc6-ee19-be18.name: Annihilator
abl-93ac-8dc6-ee19-be18.text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, you can re‑roll the Damage roll

abl-5cd2-7b68-d2cb-e7e4.name: Aqullon Optics
abl-5cd2-7b68-d2cb-e7e4.text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks

abl-b564-7fc-6ab2-a9c.name: Siege Shield
abl-b564-7fc-6ab2-a9c.text: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abl-311f-69c4-af58-77c8.name: Transport
abl-311f-69c4-af58-77c8.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-f48a-d2c-24e3-b957.name: Transport
abl-f48a-d2c-24e3-b957.text: This model has a transport capacity of 14 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-e922-59ba-baa0-655c.name: Transport
abl-e922-59ba-baa0-655c.text: This model has a transport capacity of 14 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-be1c-1cd0-5306-55d7.name: Emergency Combat Embarkation
abl-be1c-1cd0-5306-55d7.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move, you can select one Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge. Provided that unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units and every model in that unit is within 3" of this Transport, it can embark within this Transport. The charging unit can then select new targets for its charge.

abl-7908-889b-da96-715d.name: Executioner
abl-7908-889b-da96-715d.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-3e49-3cf5-3c78-1850.name: Self Repair
abl-3e49-3cf5-3c78-1850.text: At the end of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abl-2972-5c28-2bce-827.name: Transport
abl-2972-5c28-2bce-827.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK, WULFEN, PHOBOS, GRAVIS, CENTURION, TERMINATOR or TACTICUS models (excluding TACTICUS CHARACTER models that began the battle attached to a non-TACTICUS unit)

abl-21e-428-eea2-55e0.name: Fire Support
abl-21e-428-eea2-55e0.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has  shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-218-97c0-d456-35ed.name: Transport
abl-218-97c0-d456-35ed.text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models.  It cannot transport JUMP PACK, WULFEN, PHOBOS, GRAVIS, CENTURION, TERMINATOR or TACTICUS models (excluding TACTICUS CHARACTER models that began the battle attached to a non-TACTICUS unit)

abl-2f23-8c83-540c-fa07.name: Drop Pod Assault
abl-2f23-8c83-540c-fa07.text: This model must start the battle in Reserves and can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 8" away from all enemy models.

abl-a232-6e38-a6ef-b5f4.name: Transport
abl-a232-6e38-a6ef-b5f4.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis, Centurion or Terminator models.

abl-07a4-673e-7ec8-2fb5.name: Combat Disembarkation
abl-07a4-673e-7ec8-2fb5.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has been set up on the battlefield, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn

abl-4d36-b9ac-2aa9-b06f.name: Deployment Complete
abl-4d36-b9ac-2aa9-b06f.text: Once this unit is set up on the battlefield and all units within it have disembarked, until the end of the battle, units cannot embark within this TRANSPORT

abl-17e3-d6b7-9d53-95c5.name: Storm Assault
abl-17e3-d6b7-9d53-95c5.text: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abl-43ab-45be-5467-de53.name: Transport
abl-43ab-45be-5467-de53.text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 models. It can only transport Scout Squad, Scout Sniper Squad and Sergeant Telion models.

abl-1de1-8f78-4ad3-92ad.name: Interceptor
abl-1de1-8f78-4ad3-92ad.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll

abl-af3-a64b-b015-d55e.name: Strafing Run
abl-af3-a64b-b015-d55e.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-50f4-83f2-50d-8a3.name: Transport
abl-50f4-83f2-50d-8a3.text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models and 1 Dreadnought model. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models and each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models.

abl-4f66-cea2-404b-2c52.name: Fortification
abl-4f66-cea2-404b-2c52.text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
■ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

abl-324a-c2ac-7ff8-df8.name: Ceramite Cover
abl-324a-c2ac-7ff8-df8.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-5135-64df-1bca-487a.name: Defensive Array
abl-5135-64df-1bca-487a.text: You can target this Fortification with the Fire Overwatch Strategem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted another unit with that Stratagem this turn. This Fortification can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.

abl-ba72-8a45-4bf0-d10c.name: Support
abl-ba72-8a45-4bf0-d10c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ TACTICAL SQUAD

You can attach this model to a unit it can lead even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-fbda-ce4d-4c1-da22.name: Deadly Terror
abl-fbda-ce4d-4c1-da22.text: While this model is leading a unit, increase the range of that unit’s Terror Troops ability by 3".

abl-eec8-a500-c73f-95d7.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, it can make a Normal move of up to  6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.’

abl-b1c1-d1fc-c3b8-e455.text:
Each time this model’s unit is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, ranged
weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability when targeting that enemy unit.

abl-e4df-4a6e-1e6-3eb3.text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-40d5-dc4a-5c0a-fe2e.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle units, this model has the Lone Operative ability

abl-b4c1-7511-e999-2538.name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
abl-b4c1-7511-e999-2538.text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abl-6bc9-9c39-2271-1f1e.name: Vengeance of the Omnissiah
abl-6bc9-9c39-2271-1f1e.text:
If a friendly Adeptus Astartes Vehicle model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Omnissian power axe has an
Attacks characteristic of 7.

abl-237c-15f3-c241-2ae1.name: Leader
abl-237c-15f3-c241-2ae1.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

abl-70c9-5565-956-5984.name: Mindlock
abl-70c9-5565-956-5984.text: While a Techmarine model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by  Astartes Servitor models in this unit by 1.

abl-fc8b-f27a-abcb-b24d.name: Servitor Retinue
abl-fc8b-f27a-abcb-b24d.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a Techmarine. If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abl-2288-75ee-5b84-2775.name: Priority Objective Identified
abl-2288-75ee-5b84-2775.text: At the start of the first battle round, if your army includes one or more models with this ability, you can select one objective marker on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle, while one or more models with this ability are on the battlefield, each time a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within range of that objective marker, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-6c2b-dfc3-89ab-e9ff.name: Evade and Survive
abl-6c2b-dfc3-89ab-e9ff.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move

abl-83b0-5817-564d-d92b.name: Lone Survivor
abl-83b0-5817-564d-d92b.text: This model cannot be selected to be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abl-c13d-1672-b49b-371d.name: Honour or Death
abl-c13d-1672-b49b-371d.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit and you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention  stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abl-6e30-67a0-e97d-3512.name: Martial Superiority
abl-6e30-67a0-e97d-3512.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll

abl-1826-b313-9e4f-57c.text: When this model’s Bodyguard unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 2+, you gain 1CP.

abl-b05-d2dc-4dd4-81ee.name: Suppression Fire
abl-b05-d2dc-4dd4-81ee.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks made with its twin macro-accelerator cannon this phase. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-9622-e60b-c2fe-dd8f.name: *Invulnerable Save
