abl-97bc-6c05-ad18-24ec.name: Aerial Assault
abl-97bc-6c05-ad18-24ec.text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

abl-e9ff-4f89-cec1-93b0.name: Damaged: 1-10 wounds remaining
abl-e9ff-4f89-cec1-93b0.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-e6d0-236e-d693-9bb7.name: Thunderhawk Cluster Bombs
abl-e6d0-236e-d693-9bb7.text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-85b6-dc61-b59d-2e99.name: Mortis Strike
abl-85b6-dc61-b59d-2e99.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-f7df-e297-d554-8c37.name: Armoured Spearhead
abl-f7df-e297-d554-8c37.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-ae6f-18f-928c-3862.name: Isolate and Destroy
abl-ae6f-18f-928c-3862.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-531c-aeb5-cc4e-10af.name: Death-hold
abl-531c-aeb5-cc4e-10af.text: When making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

abl-58cc-7fec-e711-e00d.name: Into the Foe
abl-58cc-7fec-e711-e00d.text: If a unit disembarks from this Transport before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-b3e8-3ffa-5e58-9409.name: Transport
abl-b3e8-3ffa-5e58-9409.text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack, Wulfen, Phobos, Gravis, Centurion, Terminator or Tacticus models (except for Tacticus Character models that begin the battle attached to a non-Tacticus unit).

abl-893c-22fb-ecd5-1968.name: Leader
abl-893c-22fb-ecd5-1968.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad
■ Command Squad
■ Tactical Squad
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad
■ Devastator Squad

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Character model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-2ce6-800-5168-f130.name: Transport
abl-2ce6-800-5168-f130.text: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Adeptus Astartes Infantry models. It cannot transport Jump Pack, Wulfen, Tacticus, Phobos, Gravis, Centurion or Terminator models.

abl-35b7-41e1-1488-6df9.name: Mental Fortress
abl-35b7-41e1-1488-6df9.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-b6ef-f95b-5e81-4cac.name: Transport
abl-b6ef-f95b-5e81-4cac.text: This model has a transport capacity of 15 Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted models. Each Jump Pack, Wulfen, Gravis or Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models. Each Centurion model takes up the space of 3 models. Each Mounted model takes up the space of 4 models. This model can also transport up to 2 Adeptus Astartes Vehicle models (excluding Aircraft and Titanic models). Models embarked within Transport Vehicles that are themselves being transported by this model do not count towards the transport capacity of this model.

abl-a516-5f1f-4d3e-3e3c.name: Aerial Deployment
abl-a516-5f1f-4d3e-3e3c.text: If this model starts the game in Hover mode and in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abl-cc0f-6f78-2f0b-1002.name: Sentry Programming
abl-cc0f-6f78-2f0b-1002.text:
You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.  This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once
per turn.

abl-1df-b883-26cb-3084.name: Hammer of Wrath
abl-1df-b883-26cb-3084.text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-9ced-4a20-1c04-203d.name: Ancient Banner
abl-9ced-4a20-1c04-203d.text: While this unit contains an Ancient, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit

abl-cb97-8ee0-1cbf-e38f.name: Command Squad
abl-cb97-8ee0-1cbf-e38f.text: While a Character model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-8a9-4b06-b80-76df.name: Company Heroes
abl-8a9-4b06-b80-76df.text: You must attach one Captain or Chapter Master model to this unit. If this is not possible, this unit does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

abl-1ac6-dae7-e792-f5ab.name: Leader
abl-1ac6-dae7-e792-f5ab.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad
■ Company Heroes
■ Hellblaster Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Tactical Squad

abl-6083-9867-cacf-eb8a.name: Master of Rites
abl-6083-9867-cacf-eb8a.text:
In your Command phase, select one of the following to apply to this model’s unit until the end of the turn: 


■ This model’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.


■ This model’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in it which it Advanced.


■ This model’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-53b4-562f-b888-7e28.name: Unrelenting and Uncompromising
abl-53b4-562f-b888-7e28.text:
While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or all modifiers to
the Hit roll.

abl-7cb2-5e51-6a7a-a8e8.name: Exemplar Warrior
abl-7cb2-5e51-6a7a-a8e8.text: Once per turn, when this model's unit is selected to shoot or fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound Roll.

abl-f765-5335-b701-5af3.name: Leader
abl-f765-5335-b701-5af3.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Tacticus^^** (Excluding ^^**Character^^** and **^^Fly**^^)
- **^^Tactical Squad^^**

abl-d60e-18e8-35b8-4464.name: Veil of Time (Psychic)
abl-d60e-18e8-35b8-4464.text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [Sustained Hits 1] ability

abl-58a3-0194-214d-47da.name: Wisdom of the Ancients [Aura]
abl-58a3-0194-214d-47da.text: When a friendly ^^**Adeptus Astartes Infantry**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1

abl-d807-18e3-a046-aca5.name: Overlapping Detonations
abl-d807-18e3-a046-aca5.text: In your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot you can select one non-**MONSTER/VEHICLE** enemy unit visible to it. While making attacks, this unit’s heavy bolters that targeted that selected unit have **[BLAST 1]**.

abl-43f6-53b2-e1d0-f8f7.name: Purgation Run
abl-43f6-53b2-e1d0-f8f7.text:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a normal move of up to D6". If it does,
until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-c68e-2835-c396-39af.name: Vanguard Assault
abl-c68e-2835-c396-39af.text: Vanguard Assault: In a turn in which this unit made a charge move, this unit’s melee weapons have [LETHAL HITS]

abl-a4fa-4c44-e872-45e4.name: Leader
abl-a4fa-4c44-e872-45e4.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Wolf Guard Terminators

abl-d440-cfb4-0569-b40f.name: High King of Fenris
abl-d440-cfb4-0569-b40f.text: Once per battle round, in your Movement phase, you can select one friendly Space Wolves unit that is in Reserves. If you do, until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

abl-da55-1594-5d76-2ada.name: Guile of the Wolf (Aura)
abl-da55-1594-5d76-2ada.text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP P (this is not cumulative with any other rules that increase the CP cost of that Stratagem)

abl-f707-93b3-60bb-5d7a.name: Embarking within Transports
abl-f707-93b3-60bb-5d7a.text: This model can embark within friendly Adeptus Astartes Transport models that can transport Terminator models. When doing, it takes up the space of 4 Infantry models

abl-bac4-1b4c-7726-15d3.name: Leader
abl-bac4-1b4c-7726-15d3.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Thunderwolf Cavalry

abl-4637-2fb1-ef9a-7704.name: Logan Grimnar
abl-4637-2fb1-ef9a-7704.text: Your army cannot contain both Logan Grimnar and Logan Grimnar on Stormrider

abl-ca3b-fa42-d47f-d218.name: Leader
abl-ca3b-fa42-d47f-d218.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Blood Claws
■ Grey Hunters
■ Wolf Guard Headtakers

abl-7c09-4906-3ef8-5839.name: Wind Walker (Psychic)
abl-7c09-4906-3ef8-5839.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability and each time that unit advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit

abl-4f53-4232-cc6a-b8e3.name: Tempest's Wrath (Psychic)
abl-4f53-4232-cc6a-b8e3.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy unit, (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model's Living Lightning weapon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy is stormwracked. While a unit is stormwracked, subtract 6" from the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit (to a minimum of 12")

abl-1ecf-416a-6465-156c.name: Legendary Tenacity
abl-1ecf-416a-6465-156c.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model's Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-64d9-5889-14e6-77a1.name: Ancient Tactician
abl-64d9-5889-14e6-77a1.text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1 CP

abl-6d1-52cc-8cb0-740c.name: Anvil of Endurance
abl-6d1-52cc-8cb0-740c.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and then is removed from play

abl-d65d-22ee-7d91-448a.name: Champion of the Kingsguard
abl-d65d-22ee-7d91-448a.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-d3d3-265a-32cd-99af.name: Slayer’s Oath
abl-d3d3-265a-32cd-99af.text: At the start of the battle, select one of the following keywords to be this model's Slayer's Oath: CHARACTER, VEHICLE or MONSTER. The first time this model's unit destroys a unit with this model's Slayer's Oath keyword, if your Detachment has a Saga, until the end of the battle, this model's unit receives the benefits of that Detachment rule as if that Saga had been completed.

abl-1ccb-ca03-9256-bd5e.name: Oathbound
abl-1ccb-ca03-9256-bd5e.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that has this model's Slayer's Oath keyword (see above), add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abl-dab2-efea-8c98-814e.name: Leader
abl-dab2-efea-8c98-814e.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Blood Claws
■ Wolf Guard Headtakers

abl-489d-fafc-e8fa-ffd1.name: War Howl
abl-489d-fafc-e8fa-ffd1.text: While this model is leading a BLOOD CLAWS unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll. While this model is leading a WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS UNIT, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-acf6-28b1-da63-60be.name: Battle-lust
abl-acf6-28b1-da63-60be.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Attacks characteristics of this model’s Frostfang.

abl-8839-87e-19fe-cc1a.name: Leader
abl-8839-87e-19fe-cc1a.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Blood Claws
■ Grey Hunters
■ Wolf Guard

abl-88f4-7da8-b865-265b.name: Refuse to Accept Defeat
abl-88f4-7da8-b865-265b.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Below Half-strength.

abl-6826-5564-30f4-5ea2.name: The Fierce Eye
abl-6826-5564-30f4-5ea2.text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy INFANTRY unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-a794-a4ad-dc6c-4619.name: Leader
abl-a794-a4ad-dc6c-4619.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Thunderwolf Cavalry

abl-2734-7402-ba72-8244.name: Lord of the Wolfkin
abl-2734-7402-ba72-8244.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, crushing teeth and claws equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-15ef-da73-e7e6-b4b7.name: Mantle of the Troll King
abl-15ef-da73-e7e6-b4b7.text: Once per phase, when resolving an attack made against this model, after you make a saving throw for this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

abl-9114-c4e8-32b1-dfe7.name: Leader
abl-9114-c4e8-32b1-dfe7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Fenrisian Wolves
■ Thunderwolf Cavalry

abl-2d38-b835-fadf-bfe9.name: Born of Wolves
abl-2d38-b835-fadf-bfe9.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-a9f0-ef79-2a9f-908f.name: Alpha Predator
abl-a9f0-ef79-2a9f-908f.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy units suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-229d-f484-6f53-9c8d.name: Leader
abl-229d-f484-6f53-9c8d.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Relic Terminator Squad
■ Terminator Assault Squad
■ Terminator Squad
■ Wolf Guard Terminators

You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-516c-bfe5-2102-d03c.name: Huskarl to the Jarl
abl-516c-bfe5-2102-d03c.text: While this model is attached to a unit that contains another CHARACTER model, all CHARACTER models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-2a1c-db3a-5bef-c228.name: Relic shield
abl-2a1c-db3a-5bef-c228.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 6.

abl-e1b9-7f5e-ff83-99ed.name: Speed of the Hunter
abl-e1b9-7f5e-ff83-99ed.text: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this model’s unit.

abl-b353-4e29-8a55-5c96.name: Relic shield
abl-b353-4e29-8a55-5c96.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 7.

abl-696c-4eb7-fa98-8ba7.name: Leader
abl-696c-4eb7-fa98-8ba7.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Thunderwolf Cavalry

You can attach this model to the above unit even if one Captain or Chapter Master model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-99f6-269c-8ded-17a.name: Aggressive Hunter
abl-99f6-269c-8ded-17a.text: Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, after an enemy unit has finished making its attacks, if this model’s unit was targeted by one or more of those attacks, this model’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", but must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, models in this model’s unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

abl-81f4-f16c-6712-c872.name: Storm Shield
abl-81f4-f16c-6712-c872.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-55f7-b6c3-54a2-5266.name: Berserk Charge
abl-55f7-b6c3-54a2-5266.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced

abl-879f-7a62-1926-b2c5.name: Cunning Hunters
abl-879f-7a62-1926-b2c5.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-782f-6fe4-1d53-90a9.name: Chosen Companions
abl-782f-6fe4-1d53-90a9.text: While a CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-f7a8-7ed7-e053-8d59.name: Attached Unit
abl-f7a8-7ed7-e053-8d59.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abl-cc0-5e68-661b-905a.name: Pelt of the Doppelgangrel:
abl-cc0-5e68-661b-905a.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-d9a-e19c-eb4f-cd41.name: Last Laugh
abl-d9a-e19c-eb4f-cd41.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6: on a 4+, the attacking unit suffers D6 mortal wounds and is Battle-shocked.

abl-330b-4b59-189d-aea6.name: Leader
abl-330b-4b59-189d-aea6.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Blood Claws

abl-5f00-3946-dd5c-b9b5.name: Master of Mischief
abl-5f00-3946-dd5c-b9b5.text: This model cannot be your WARLORD.

abl-b2ea-319f-b86-ab13.name: Rugged Resilience
abl-b2ea-319f-b86-ab13.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-1036-9395-903e-6420.name: Morkai’s Howl
abl-1036-9395-903e-6420.text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit (if a LIEUTENANT IN REIVER ARMOUR is leading this unit, you can select one enemy unit within 18" instead). That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a PSYKER unit. If that test is failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that unit is Stunned until the start of your next Shooting phase. While a unit is Stunned, each time a model in that unit makes a Psychic Attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-4857-fa29-6537-4d5d.name: Invulnerable Save
abl-4857-fa29-6537-4d5d.text: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save. This invulnerable save is improved to 4+ against Psychic Attacks.

abl-ade8-4dc6-a974-5ce8.name: Attached Unit
abl-ade8-4dc6-a974-5ce8.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a REIVER SQUAD, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abl-487d-4818-82ae-5a13.name: Savage Frenzy
abl-487d-4818-82ae-5a13.text: Each time an enemy unit, (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all that models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from those tests.

abl-a661-be27-a2d2-caa7.name: Death Totem
abl-a661-be27-a2d2-caa7.text: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, re-roll a hit roll of 1.

abl-efc2-686b-6a7a-4f29.name: Bestial Rage
abl-efc2-686b-6a7a-4f29.text: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this model can make a Bestial Rage move. To do so, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result: this model can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit(excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, this model can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Each model can only make one Bestial Rage move per phase.

abl-0caf-212e-b669-1738.name: Violent Fury
abl-0caf-212e-b669-1738.text: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons, those weapon profiles have the TWIN-LINKED ability.

abl-40ee-97e4-6842-5262.name: Blizzard shield
abl-40ee-97e4-6842-5262.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-d7a4-e72d-26fd-4361.name: Murder-maker [Aura]
abl-d7a4-e72d-26fd-4361.text: In the Fight phase, each time an attack targets a friendly WULFEN unit within 6" of this model, if a model in that unit is destroyed as a result of that attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-9d2a-82a5-7426-f6b1.name: Force of Untamed Destruction
abl-9d2a-82a5-7426-f6b1.text: This model cannot be your WARLORD.

abl-d32e-f3c3-5ae5-2ea0.name: Beastial Fury
abl-d32e-f3c3-5ae5-2ea0.text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

abl-7ff6-fefc-51c-4818.name: Thunderous Charge
abl-7ff6-fefc-51c-4818.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack with its Wolf Guard weapon, if it made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack

abl-4dd7-8d35-4e76-11d8.name: Predatory Instinct
abl-4dd7-8d35-4e76-11d8.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, it can make a Normal move of up to D6"

abl-2b92-25f9-4952-213b.name: Hunting Hounds
abl-2b92-25f9-4952-213b.text: While this unit is within 6" of one or more SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER models (excluding WULFEN models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1

abl-7d00-f80f-c11-4992.name: Headstrong
abl-7d00-f80f-c11-4992.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Each time this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-42db-86ef-1683-f75b.name: Attached Unit
abl-42db-86ef-1683-f75b.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to an ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS or ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abl-61db-fb59-d539-6ed7.name: Fire Discipline
abl-61db-fb59-d539-6ed7.text: Each time this unit Remains Stationary, if it includes a Long Fang Pack Leader, you can select one enemy unit that is visible to that model. Until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-b880-fd34-9780-c4e2.name: Attached Unit
abl-b880-fd34-9780-c4e2.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a DEVASTATOR SQUAD, it can instead be attached to this unit.

abl-3d17-e5-295-fcf0.name: Armorium Cherub
abl-3d17-e5-295-fcf0.text: Once per battle, after making a Hit roll for a model in this unit, you can change that roll to an unmodified 6.

abl-8bed-8c56-baf8-1bc6.name: Frozen Prey
abl-8bed-8c56-baf8-1bc6.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s helfrost destructor, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is Frozen. While a unit is Frozen, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and  subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-e493-6a08-ade-c36e.name: Into the Foe
abl-e493-6a08-ade-c36e.text: If a unit disembarks from this TRANSPORT before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-f624-39e9-4072-ebaf.name: Leader
abl-f624-39e9-4072-ebaf.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Blood Claws
■ Grey Hunters
■ Long Fangs

You must attach this model to one of the above units, and can do so even if one or more Character units have already been attached to that unit, but a unit can never include more than one Pack Leader model. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths. If it is not possible to attach this model to a unit, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

abl-e86c-2118-cc7e-4b23.name: Leader
abl-e86c-2118-cc7e-4b23.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Skyclaws

You must attach this model to the above unit, and can do so even if one or more Character units have already been attached to that unit, but a unit can never include more than one Pack Leader model. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths. If it is not possible to attach this model to a unit, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

abl-c945-4824-a8ed-3a20.name: Iron Priest
abl-c945-4824-a8ed-3a20.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE units, this model has the Lone Operative ability

abl-41bc-61e5-b4dc-1194.name: Gift of the Iron Wolf
abl-41bc-61e5-b4dc-1194.text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by that model to have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability or Blessing of the Omnissiah ability once per turn.

abl-32b3-ea87-484-39ec.name: Leader
abl-32b3-ea87-484-39ec.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Wolfguard Headtakers
■ Blood Claws
■ Grey Hunters

abl-0ab3-6430-d18f-c4c6.name: Judgement of the Omnissiah
abl-0ab3-6430-d18f-c4c6.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE units, you can re-roll the wound roll.

abl-a604-c6af-7cb8-ba38.name: Alpha Hunter
abl-a604-c6af-7cb8-ba38.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

abl-fa50-4758-2b95-c8ca.name: Close In for the Kill
abl-fa50-4758-2b95-c8ca.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-2e64-5e5d-4a-dc3d.name: Leader
abl-2e64-5e5d-4a-dc3d.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

■ Fenrisian Wolves

You must attach this model to the above unit, even if Canis Wolfborn has been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths. If it is not possible to attach this model to a unit, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

abl-cd1c-7a8-273b-a060.name: Wolfkin
abl-cd1c-7a8-273b-a060.text: This model cannot be your WARLORD and cannot be given Enhancements.

abl-b6f9-ad81-d699-ab36.name: Guerrilla Tactics
abl-b6f9-ad81-d699-ab36.text:
At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" away from all enemy models, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into
Strategic Reserves.

abl-979-e7d1-937c-d5f0.name: Fervour of the Ancients (Aura)
abl-979-e7d1-937c-d5f0.text: While a friendly SPACE WOLVES unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-29a1-b246-bd11-df46.name: Vengeance of the Omnissiah
abl-29a1-b246-bd11-df46.text: If a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model is destroyed within 12" of this model, until the end of the battle, this model’s Iron Priest hammer has an Attacks characteristic of 6.

abl-47d6-60fd-3fc0-91d8.name: Blessing of the Omnissiah
abl-47d6-60fd-3fc0-91d8.text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abl-0ae4-0afb-6938-59aa.name: Healing Balms
abl-0ae4-0afb-6938-59aa.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 model (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit.

abl-1a1b-79a9-bfe2-8a7c.name: Tempered Ferocity
abl-1a1b-79a9-bfe2-8a7c.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability and, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Hit roll of 1

abl-ea31-1e1d-d30f-3431.name: Heroic Last Stand
abl-ea31-1e1d-d30f-3431.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and then it is removed from play.

abl-9b50-59f8-a1dd-ca83.name: Storm Shield
abl-9b50-59f8-a1dd-ca83.text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 6

abl-a1a0-2e38-f93f-1381.name: Let Loose the Wolves
abl-a1a0-2e38-f93f-1381.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, split this unit into two units, one containing all of it's HEADTAKERS models and one containing all of its HUNTING WOLVES models, with new Starting Strengths accordingly.

abl-cb76-25b3-da1e-ebe7.name: Headhunters
abl-cb76-25b3-da1e-ebe7.text:
At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent's army to be this unit's quarry. Weapons equipped by HEADTAKERS models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [PRECISION] abilities while targeting it's quarry. Each time this unit's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this unit's quarry. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within
a Transport

abl-90e0-d8ee-abf5-5cab.name: Hunting Hounds
abl-90e0-d8ee-abf5-5cab.text: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER models (excluding WULFEN models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, HUNTING WOLVES models in it have an Objective Control characteristic of 1

abl-a630-3650-0461-51a2.name: Hammer Blow
abl-a630-3650-0461-51a2.text: In the Fight phase, after this unit has fought, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-64cb-9458-5e74-8b44.name: Hunting Hounds
abl-64cb-9458-5e74-8b44.text: While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly ^^**Space Wolves Character**^^ models (excluding ^^**Wulfen**^^ models), if this unit is not Battle-shocked, Hunting Wolves models in this unit have an Objective Control characteristic of 1.

abl-6352-6f0c-617d-2c1c.name: Deadly Stalkers
abl-6352-6f0c-617d-2c1c.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-4a1f-d0be-62cd-278f.name: Haywire Mine
abl-4a1f-d0be-62cd-278f.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit within 3" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a ^^**Vehicle**^^ unit.

abl-e4a5-bf61-572d-569b.name: Catechism of Death
abl-e4a5-bf61-572d-569b.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-d58e-1e52-6332-2f71.name: Inspired Retribution
abl-d58e-1e52-6332-2f71.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; that destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-e2c1-7cbf-bfcd-716a.name: Leader
abl-e2c1-7cbf-bfcd-716a.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Squad
■ Command Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad
■ Tactical Squad
■ Tyrannic War Veterans
■ Vanguard Veteran Squad

abl-6d80-d11e-231d-1014.name: Hood of Hellfire
abl-6d80-d11e-231d-1014.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.

abl-712b-2536-4360-4d74.name: Master of Prescience (Psychic)
abl-712b-2536-4360-4d74.text:
While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. In addition, once per battle round, you can target that unit with one of the following Stratagems for 0CP: Counter-offensive; Fire Overwatch; Go to Ground;
Heroic Intervention.

abl-af75-67b0-4fcb-d9e8.name: Leader
abl-af75-67b0-4fcb-d9e8.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ DESOLATION SQUAD
■ DEVASTATOR SQUAD
■ INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ TACTICAL SQUAD

abl-12af-5519-836-3ca5.name: Author of the Codex
abl-12af-5519-836-3ca5.text:
At the Start of your Command phase, select two Author of the Codex abilities (see left). Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.’

Primarch of the XIII (Aura): While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit.

Master of Battle: After you have selected an enemy unit using the Oath of Moment ability, select a second enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, if your Oath of Moment target is destroyed, that second enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until you select a new one.

Supreme Strategist: Once per battle round, you can target one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 12" of this model with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-7a88-482-fa96-f382.name: Ultramarines Bodyguard
abl-7a88-482-fa96-f382.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Adeptus Astartes Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability

abl-72ce-755f-7843-e428.name: Armour of Fate
abl-72ce-755f-7843-e428.text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase: on a 3+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy models, with 6 wounds remaining.

abl-ef49-87ed-43b1-1644.name: Supreme Commander
abl-ef49-87ed-43b1-1644.text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

abl-72c3-d3f3-5ba8-3c67.name: Tank Commander
abl-72c3-d3f3-5ba8-3c67.text:
While this model is commanding a Vehicle model (see reverse):

■ Ranged weapons equipped by that Vehicle model have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 2+.
■ Each time that Vehicle model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

If your army includes one or more of the Vehicle models listed below, Sergeant Chronus must start the battle embarked within one of those models as if it were a Transport. Sergeant Chronus can only disembark from that Vehicle if it is destroyed. While embarked in this way, Sergeant Chronus is said to be commanding that Vehicle.

■ Hunter
■ Land Raider
■ Land Raider Crusader
■ Land Raider Redeemer
■ Predator Annihilator
■ Predator Destructor
■ Stalker
■ Vindicator
■ Whirlwind

abl-bc23-bd70-e4d0-f355.name: Chronus
abl-bc23-bd70-e4d0-f355.text: When this model disembarks from a Vehicle model it was commanding, it has the Lone Operative ability until the end of the battle.

abl-ce2f-2282-d8d5-abb9.name: Voice of Experience
abl-ce2f-2282-d8d5-abb9.text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit by 1 and each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-eae6-c930-f4cc-34d1.name: Guiding Hand
abl-eae6-c930-f4cc-34d1.text:
While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to weapons equipped by models in that unit until the end of the phase:


■ [LETHAL HITS]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

abl-d0c4-765-4614-5b63.name: Leader
abl-d0c4-765-4614-5b63.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Scout Squad
■ Scout Sniper Squad

abl-fdcb-433f-b79f-1ec1.name: Tyrannic War Veterans
abl-fdcb-433f-b79f-1ec1.text: Weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability when targeting Tyranids units.

abl-fad2-9c1c-44ce-ad0e.name: Unorthodox Strategist [Aura]
abl-fad2-9c1c-44ce-ad0e.text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a  stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP (this is not cumulative with any other rules that would increase the CP cost of that Stratagem).

abl-4e8a-9ef1-43e4-9ab2.name: Master of the Fleet
abl-4e8a-9ef1-43e4-9ab2.text: During the Declare Battle Formations step, if your army includes this model, select one Phobos, Gravis, or Tacticus Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army.  That unit gains the Deep Strike ability.

abl-2ce2-dd82-241a-a38f.name: Leader
abl-2ce2-dd82-241a-a38f.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ COMPANY HEROES
■ INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ TACTICAL SQUAD

abl-e284-c8a4-7a2a-24c9.name: Press the Attack
abl-e284-c8a4-7a2a-24c9.text: : Weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-682e-f7df-8750-52e0.name: Honour of the Chapter
abl-682e-f7df-8750-52e0.text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-977d-26f6-d16a-83fd.name: Leader
abl-977d-26f6-d16a-83fd.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:

■ Assault Intercessor Squad
■ Bladeguard Veteran Squad
■ Hellblaster Squad
■ Infernus Squad
■ Intercessor Squad
■ Sternguard Veteran Squad

abl-7da9-2cda-4939-2957.name: Inspiring Leader
abl-7da9-2cda-4939-2957.text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abl-0362-19d9-c371-10a4.name: Master Tactician
abl-0362-19d9-c371-10a4.text: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit’s Marneus Calgar model is your ^^**Warlord**^^ and is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abl-5bc3-8b43-1671-83d7.name: Leader
abl-5bc3-8b43-1671-83d7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:


■ AGGRESSOR SQUAD
■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ COMPANY HEROES
■ ERADICATOR SQUAD
■ HEAVY INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ INFERNUS SQUAD
■ INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ TACTICAL SQUAD
■ TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD
■ TERMINATOR SQUAD
■ VICTRIX HONOUR GUARD

abl-1826-c5e3-0789-3e47.name: Knight Champion of Macragge
abl-1826-c5e3-0789-3e47.text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this model’s unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abl-b7f6-25ea-33f0-655f.name: Honour or Death
abl-b7f6-25ea-33f0-655f.text:
You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used
that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abl-41c1-b2e0-571b-12ae.name: Support
abl-41c1-b2e0-571b-12ae.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 


■ VICTRIX HONOUR GUARD


You can attach this model to the above unit even if a Marneus Calgar unit has already been attached
to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate
units, with their original Starting Strengths

abl-dac0-5dcc-dca5-b00a.name: Ultramarines Honour Guard
abl-dac0-5dcc-dca5-b00a.text: While a Captain or Chapter Master model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll

abl-f114-0598-c696-6d57.name: Glory of Ultramar
abl-f114-0598-c696-6d57.text:
In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit
were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in this unit move a number of inches up to the result, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding Aircraft). When doing so, those models can be
moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle‑shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Surge move per phase.

abl-7c79-5f28-18a4-7f75.name: Attached Unit
abl-7c79-5f28-18a4-7f75.text:
If a Captain or Chapter Master unit from your army can be attached to a Company Heroes unit, it can
be attached to this unit instead.

abl-9b12-3d8f-7b51-eb52.name: Banner of Macragge
abl-9b12-3d8f-7b51-eb52.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

abl-5403-758b-7dcc-6733.name: Press the Attack
abl-5403-758b-7dcc-6733.text: Weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability

abl-881c-c896-6d69-b2b9.name: Honour of Ultramar
abl-881c-c896-6d69-b2b9.text:
If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+,
do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, this model regains D3 lost wounds and is not destroyed; otherwise, it is removed from play.

abl-446d-a792-b36b-0a21.name: Leader
abl-446d-a792-b36b-0a21.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 


■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ COMPANY HEROES
■ HELLBLASTER SQUAD
■ INFERNUS SQUAD
■ INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ VICTRIX HONOUR GUARD
■ WARDENS OF ULTRAMAR

abl-061c-2a25-4596-64bf.name: Second Company Banner
abl-061c-2a25-4596-64bf.text: While this unit contains Ancient Gadriel, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit. While this unit contains Ancient Gadriel and Captain Titus, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in this unit by 1 as well.

abl-4925-3113-252d-675c.name: Strategium Command
abl-4925-3113-252d-675c.text:
After both players have deployed their armies, if this unit is on the battlefield (or any Transport it
is embarked within is on the battlefield), select up to three Adeptus Astartes units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-e761-9683-7201-bbe0.name: Heroes of Ultramar
abl-e761-9683-7201-bbe0.text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one of the following units. This
unit then counts as part of that unit for the rest of the battle, and that unit’s Starting Strength is
increased accordingly.


■ ASSAULT INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD
■ INTERCESSOR SQUAD
■ STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD


This unit cannot join an Attached unit, and only Captain Titus can join a unit this unit has joined.

abl-ee15-87bc-e1ef-c8be.name: Storm Shield
abl-ee15-87bc-e1ef-c8be.text: The bearer has a 4+ Invulnerable save.

abl-2df7-0cd3-224f-2269.name: Refractor Field
abl-2df7-0cd3-224f-2269.text: The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-143-1a21-8afb-16c4.name: For the Khan!
abl-143-1a21-8afb-16c4.text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abl-bbb5-617e-a254-8463.name: Trophy Taker
abl-bbb5-617e-a254-8463.text: Each time this model destroys an enemy Character model, you gain 1CP

abl-8ecf-92ea-ef03-4b0b.name: Inspiring Commander
abl-8ecf-92ea-ef03-4b0b.text: If you include this model in your army, until the end of the battle, non-Character models in Outrider Squad units from your army have an Objective Control characteristic of 3 while they are not Battle-shocked.

abl-1336-8c9c-a513-990d.name: Spear of Chogoris
abl-1336-8c9c-a513-990d.text: This model’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If that unit is already eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit instead.

abl-886d-0aad-f792-2794.name: Skilled Riders
abl-886d-0aad-f792-2794.text: Each time a model in this model’s unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

abl-fe8b-e1ef-ef3c-cced.name: Leader
abl-fe8b-e1ef-ef3c-cced.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 


OUTRIDER SQUAD

abl-a768-f399-5214-dfff.name: Ancestral Fortune
abl-a768-f399-5214-dfff.text: Once per turn, you can spend 1YP to change one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

abl-e940-64a8-ba9a-42bc.name: Leader
abl-e940-64a8-ba9a-42bc.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- Einhyr Hearthguard
- Hearthkyn Warriors

abl-d3b8-a9b6-d4ff-013e.name: Grim Efficiency
abl-d3b8-a9b6-d4ff-013e.text: Once per battle round, when a friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann**^^ unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-73c5-c517-7aa5-96fc.name: Rampart crest
abl-73c5-c517-7aa5-96fc.text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-183b-a8a1-b9eb-2dd5.name: Luck Has, Need Keeps, Toil Earns
abl-183b-a8a1-b9eb-2dd5.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, until your opponent's Level of Control over that is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

abl-f1c3-6cf4-2e6e-c3c3.name: Pan-spectral Scanning
abl-f1c3-6cf4-2e6e-c3c3.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-1fa8-d8d6-7361-c235.name: Weavefield crest
abl-1fa8-d8d6-7361-c235.text: Models in the bearer's unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-2769-d6d8-29c8-7689.text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-b182-3f2c-3c8d-0b91.text: Once per phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit destroys an enemy unit. If it does, gain 1YP.

abl-e7c8-1681-268e-e824.text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

This model can be attached to the following unit:
- EINHYR HEARTHGUARD

abl-cce9-1dea-2bfb-0600.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-666a-1075-30da-e3d6.name: Mass Driver Accelerators
abl-666a-1075-30da-e3d6.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-7869-a23a-8332-6df1.name: Weavefield crest
abl-7869-a23a-8332-6df1.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-63d6-d6ef-a1e8-b3ac.name: Leader
abl-63d6-d6ef-a1e8-b3ac.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS

abl-467f-6b90-9fac-e6bc.name: Fortify (Psychic)
abl-467f-6b90-9fac-e6bc.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-fed0-9336-a1da-52b5.name: Grimnyr's Regard
abl-fed0-9336-a1da-52b5.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann**^^ unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this unit's ^^**Grimnyr**^^ model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-3ad6-e5e5-dd75-ba65.name: Unit Composition
abl-3ad6-e5e5-dd75-ba65.text: If this unit’s Grimnyr model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining CORV models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each CORV model takes up the space of 0 models.’

abl-0b60-64ba-dab2-aba2.name: Multi-spectral visor
abl-0b60-64ba-dab2-aba2.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-5313-7669-e6a9-5577.name: Brôkhyr Guild Support
abl-5313-7669-e6a9-5577.text: While this unit is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle**^^ or ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks**^^ units, if this unit is not an attached unit, it has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-7d15-f4e4-387a-f14d.name: Leader
abl-7d15-f4e4-387a-f14d.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- HEARTHKYN WARRIORS
- BRÔKHYR THUNDERKYN

abl-6f57-e143-7449-1760.name: Unit Composition
abl-6f57-e143-7449-1760.text: If this unit’s Brôkhyr Iron‑master model is ever destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining E‑COG models are also destroyed. While embarking within a ^^**Transport^^** and while embarked within a ^^**Transport^^**, each E‑COG model takes up the space of 0 models.

abl-ce7a-e6ed-4d44-a5df.name: Forgewrought Expertise
abl-ce7a-e6ed-4d44-a5df.text: At the end of your Movement phase, this model can repair one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Vehicle, Exoframe^^** or ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks^^** unit within 3" of it. One model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if this unit contains an Ironkin Assistant model. Each unit can only be repaired once per turn.

abl-91da-72d3-657b-ee7c.name: Decisive Destruction
abl-91da-72d3-657b-ee7c.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-80e8-8ec7-90b9-1310.name: Teleport crest
abl-80e8-8ec7-90b9-1310.text: Models in the bearer's unit have the Deep Strike ability.

abl-668c-fdea-d78d-76da.name: Cyberstimms
abl-668c-fdea-d78d-76da.text: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding one to the result if units from your army have Fortify Takeover: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-6b1b-5b1b-e5de-f7c2.name: Subterranean Explosives
abl-6b1b-5b1b-e5de-f7c2.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and ^^**Vehicles^^**) that was hit by one or more of those attacks made with a mole grenade launcher. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem.

abl-0a56-b381-c3ac-12bd.name: Outflanking Mag-Riders
abl-0a56-b381-c3ac-12bd.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-5594-0175-2fab-78d0.name: Comms array
abl-5594-0175-2fab-78d0.text: Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-2687-9d88-fa31-78e4.name: Pan-spectral scanner
abl-2687-9d88-fa31-78e4.text: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-d4a7-4825-c105-69da.name: Rollbar searchlight
abl-d4a7-4825-c105-69da.text: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abl-1cd2-5315-3e03-56d2.name: Blistering Advance
abl-1cd2-5315-3e03-56d2.text: Units can disembark from this ^^**Transport^^** after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

abl-a40d-50a1-cd02-32c0.name: Breaching Fire
abl-a40d-50a1-cd02-32c0.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-caa1-a6c2-f241-ef7a.name: MultiCOG Targeting
abl-caa1-a6c2-f241-ef7a.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic, the Hit roll.

abl-ebd6-d270-d7ee-bd1d.name: Pan spectral scanner
abl-ebd6-d270-d7ee-bd1d.text: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-9b20-7d92-1649-148f.name: Pragmatic Hunters
abl-9b20-7d92-1649-148f.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8” of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6”.'

abl-e5f1-165b-ee7e-ce92.name: Grudge-fuelled Fortitude
abl-e5f1-165b-ee7e-ce92.text: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abl-d632-0763-8aee-ce98.name: Unhinged Vengeance
abl-d632-0763-8aee-ce98.text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6+2".

abl-83a2-efc4-1e59-b3ea.name: Computational Mastermind
abl-83a2-efc4-1e59-b3ea.text: At the end of your Command phase, before you determine if units from your army have Hostile Acquisition or Fortify Takeover, for each objective marker you control that has one or more models with this ability in range of it, you can spend 1YP or gain 1YP.

abl-455d-1e24-c53e-c789.name: Predictive Guidance
abl-455d-1e24-c53e-c789.text: Once per battle round, when you target this unit with the **Fire Overwatch/Heroic Intervention** stratagem, you can use this ability. If you do, that use of that stratagem is ‑1 CP.

abl-8aae-1b2c-3dc5-e526.name: Leader
abl-8aae-1b2c-3dc5-e526.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators^^**, ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Melee Weapons^^**

abl-a4aa-1f9d-f411-5e68.name: Science Guild Support
abl-a4aa-1f9d-f411-5e68.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann Infantry**^^ units (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability), this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-ee59-d825-22fa-51b8.name: Resource Transmutation
abl-ee59-d825-22fa-51b8.text: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, one model with this ability can choose to use it when it is selected to shoot. If it does, you must spend 1YP and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by that model have the [^^**Sustained Hits 1**^^] ability and, after that model has shot this phase, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, you can gain up to 2YP.

abl-e89d-42e8-03cf-8bda.name: Opportunistic Manoeuvre
abl-e89d-42e8-03cf-8bda.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal Move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-087c-930f-dd21-38d9.name: Scanner Uplinks
abl-087c-930f-dd21-38d9.text: In your shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-e33f-e148-ccf4-d41a.name: Purge Response
abl-e33f-e148-ccf4-d41a.text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem. If units from your army have Fortify Takeover, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ while resolving that Stratagem instead.

abl-c085-b752-358a-e7e9.name: Preymark crest
abl-c085-b752-358a-e7e9.text: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of one or more objective markers, on a Critical Wound, that attack has the [Precision] ability.

abl-f407-03ed-dc32-44b4.name: Merciless Eradication
abl-f407-03ed-dc32-44b4.text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) that is within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abl-a0e2-31bc-54e1-e3ac.name: Geomantic Hunters
abl-a0e2-31bc-54e1-e3ac.text: Up to twice per battle, in your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack with its breacher ordnance, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-ff77-7827-2e0b-4e6b.name: Destabilising Quakes
abl-ff77-7827-2e0b-4e6b.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its tremor shells. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

abl-40b4-dea3-50c6-e0b8.name: Leader
abl-40b4-dea3-50c6-e0b8.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Hearthkyn Warriors**^^

abl-5e18-5281-9f05-cb56.name: Grimnyr's Regard
abl-5e18-5281-9f05-cb56.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly ^^**Leagues of Votann**^^ unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-3a37-f96f-9670-eda9.name: Leader
abl-3a37-f96f-9670-eda9.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Einhyr Hearthguard, Hearthkyn Warriors**^^

abl-d4dd-d725-6ceb-8232.name: Seized Opportunity
abl-d4dd-d725-6ceb-8232.text: Once per phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit destroys an enemy unit. If it does, you gain 1YP.

abl-02c0-035e-ae35-1e0d.name: Leader
abl-02c0-035e-ae35-1e0d.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Ironkin Steeljacks with Heavy Volkanite Disintegrators, Ironkin Steeljacks with Melee Weapons**^^

abl-d0c5-b33a-4a60-fc94.name: Forgewrought Skill
abl-d0c5-b33a-4a60-fc94.text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-bde3-2380-e35d-4b9f.name: Break the Foe
abl-bde3-2380-e35d-4b9f.text: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Sustained Hits 1^^] ability.

abl-90bf-038f-b323-01d7.name: Relentless Avalanche
abl-90bf-038f-b323-01d7.text: You can target this model's unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abl-afcf-70e3-6e45-b361.name: Leader
abl-afcf-70e3-6e45-b361.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Cthonian Beserks**^^

abl-4c02-411-e9be-6773.name: Master Chronomancer
abl-4c02-411-e9be-6773.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-7003-283b-1b84-c602.name: The Stars Are Right
abl-7003-283b-1b84-c602.text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, triple the Attacks and Strength characteristics of this model’s Staff of Tomorrow and every successful Wound roll made for this model’s attacks scores a Critical Wound.

abl-b567-98ec-597b-f8c9.name: Support
abl-b567-98ec-597b-f8c9.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ NECRON WARRIORS
You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one ROYAL WARDEN or NOBLE model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-1ac3-6f6-b9a4-2496.name: Leader
abl-1ac3-6f6-b9a4-2496.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ LYCHGUARD
■ NECRON WARRIORS

abl-2547-8479-5963-9153.name: Grand Strategist
abl-2547-8479-5963-9153.text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

abl-608f-b219-23b8-5568.name: Lord of the Storm
abl-608f-b219-23b8-5568.text: Once per battle, at the end of your Command phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12" of this model: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-99f0-b4b4-4c25-a7a8.name: Leader
abl-99f0-b4b4-4c25-a7a8.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS

abl-6809-73fc-986d-8110.name: Lord of the Pyrrhian Eternals
abl-6809-73fc-986d-8110.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-db0b-31e9-f3d7-bc67.name: Mind in the Machine
abl-db0b-31e9-f3d7-bc67.text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

abl-6c1-e306-7422-f026.name: Leader
abl-6c1-e306-7422-f026.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ LYCHGUARD
■ NECRON WARRIORS
You can attach this model to one of the above units even if NEMESOR ZAHNDREKH has already been attached to it. If it is, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-d6ff-586b-5829-295b.name: Ghostwalk Mantle
abl-d6ff-586b-5829-295b.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

abl-bcff-d655-2af7-c51a.name: The Vargard’s Duty
abl-bcff-d655-2af7-c51a.text: While this model is in the same unit as NEMESOR ZAHNDREKH, CHARACTER models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-9eba-43aa-5b0b-38e7.name: Illuminor
abl-9eba-43aa-5b0b-38e7.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly NECRONS units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-42e3-ad7-3b46-8fa8.name: Mechanical Augmentation (Aura)
abl-42e3-ad7-3b46-8fa8.text: While a friendly NECRONS BATTLELINE unit is within 3" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and each time an attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-4164-8dc9-421-f281.name: Atomic Energy Manipulator
abl-4164-8dc9-421-f281.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model destroyed one or more models this phase, until the end of the battle, add 3" to the range of its Mechanical Augmentation ability (to a maximum of 12").

abl-62a8-d797-4bb6-c406.name: Transient Madness
abl-62a8-d797-4bb6-c406.text:
While this model is leading a unit, at the start of your Command phase, roll one D6: until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit gain the ability below that corresponds with that roll:
■ 1-2: [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
■ 3-4: [LETHAL HITS]
■ 5-6: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]

abl-42fd-7e9a-3a34-ab24.name: Counter-tactics
abl-42fd-7e9a-3a34-ab24.text: Once per battle, after your opponent uses a Stratagem, if this model is on the battlefield, it can use this ability If it does, until the end of the battle, the CP cost your opponent must pay to use that Stratagem again is increased by 1CP.

abl-2c95-7ec0-b887-a2ec.name: Ancient Collector
abl-2c95-7ec0-b887-a2ec.text: While this model is leading a unit, at the end of your Command phase, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at start or end of any turn.

abl-4bc-1a26-267-ad58.name: Surrogate Hosts
abl-4bc-1a26-267-ad58.text:
At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one other friendly NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model on the battlefield (excluding SKORPEKH LORD or EPIC HERO models). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and this model is put
in its place, with all of its wounds remaining (if the selected model was leading a unit, this model now attaches to that unit as its Leader).

abl-5fcf-6a9e-f8d1-6d6f.name: Leader
abl-5fcf-6a9e-f8d1-6d6f.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ IMMORTALS
■ NECRON WARRIORS

abl-9e6-fefc-3bb1-80ba.name: Adaptive Strategy
abl-9e6-fefc-3bb1-80ba.text: This model's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-154b-abc2-af76-a8dc.name: Engrammatic Logic
abl-154b-abc2-af76-a8dc.text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly NECRONS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abl-5b79-8-18b5-51d0.name: Leader
abl-5b79-8-18b5-51d0.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ SKORPEKH DESTROYERS

abl-34b3-af3e-2476-eaae.name: United In Destruction
abl-34b3-af3e-2476-eaae.text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abl-cf05-2e44-6e86-f2e3.name: Crimson Harvest
abl-cf05-2e44-6e86-f2e3.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-e7ff-8e68-9766-247f.name: Leader
abl-e7ff-8e68-9766-247f.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ LOKHUST DESTROYERS
■ LOKHUST HEAVY DESTROYERS

abl-9b1c-a931-479e-7222.name: Destroyer Cult
abl-9b1c-a931-479e-7222.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodifed Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abl-dab3-3e69-8bde-aed6.name: Driven by Hatred
abl-dab3-3e69-8bde-aed6.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-df4c-f512-dc01-b78a.name: Nanoscarab amulet
abl-df4c-f512-dc01-b78a.text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-c20d-dbc0-c38d-f255.name: Resurrection orb
abl-c20d-dbc0-c38d-f255.text: Once per battle, while the bearer is leading a unit, at the end of any phase, it can resurrect that unit if it is on the battlefield. When you do, that unit’s Reanimation Protocols are activated reanimating D6 wounds instead of D3 when doing so. You cannot resurrect more than one unit per turn.

abl-3999-26f9-630-9c4a.name: Relentless March
abl-3999-26f9-630-9c4a.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-5ebc-3ae5-e0ea-b8ac.name: The Lord’s Will
abl-5ebc-3ae5-e0ea-b8ac.text: While this model is leading a unit, you can target that unit with Stratagems even when it is Battle-shocked.

abl-23f9-a017-6911-33d3.name: Carrier Wave (Aura)
abl-23f9-a017-6911-33d3.text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-8024-526b-d055-1551.name: Advanced Quantum Shielding
abl-8024-526b-d055-1551.text: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-50db-a36b-f520-5afa.name: Resurrection orb
abl-50db-a36b-f520-5afa.text: Once per battle, at the end of any phase, select one friendly NECRONS INFANTRY or NECRONS MOUNTED unit within 6" of the bearer and resurrect that unit. When you do, that unit’s Reanimation Protocols are activated reanimating D6 wounds instead of D3 when doing so. You cannot resurrect more than one unit per turn.

abl-7eaa-f4a5-901d-2420.name: Implacable Resilience
abl-7eaa-f4a5-901d-2420.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from that attack’s Damage characteristic.

abl-df30-5340-9681-8ed5.name: Support
abl-df30-5340-9681-8ed5.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ CANOPTEK WRAITHS
■ IMMORTALS
■ NECRON WARRIORS
You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one ROYAL WARDEN or NOBLE model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-ff0b-8063-e5bc-1646.name: Rites of Reanimation
abl-ff0b-8063-e5bc-1646.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-760c-f4f5-c2b9-7ebc.name: Technomancer
abl-760c-f4f5-c2b9-7ebc.text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one friendly NECRONS model within 6" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abl-b1f0-60f5-c9a0-aeae.name: Nightmare Shroud (Aura)
abl-b1f0-60f5-c9a0-aeae.text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 6" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the roll when it does so.

abl-88bf-1fe6-205b-272e.name: Harbinger of Despair
abl-88bf-1fe6-205b-272e.text: Once per turn, at the start of your Command, Movement, Shooting, Charge or Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of this model. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the roll when it does so.

abl-5d95-fc94-f268-c2ac.name: Timesplinter Mantle
abl-5d95-fc94-f268-c2ac.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-eb1e-dd99-1745-54b2.name: Chronometron
abl-eb1e-dd99-1745-54b2.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 5". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-b56-d882-46c2-f3f1.name: Harbinger of Destruction
abl-b56-d882-46c2-f3f1.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodifed Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abl-b23c-448a-ac40-33f6.name: Living Lightning
abl-b23c-448a-ac40-33f6.text: In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this model) and roll four D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-a7f5-b25d-40f2-e927.name: Their Number is Legion
abl-a7f5-b25d-40f2-e927.text: Each time this unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, you can re-roll the dice to see how many wounds are regenerated.

abl-a1de-4afc-f922-ff9f.name: Implacable Eradication
abl-a1de-4afc-f922-ff9f.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-20e1-eb82-bf57-db38.name: Nanoscarab Reanimation Beam (Aura)
abl-20e1-eb82-bf57-db38.text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 3" of this model, each time that unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate, that unit reanimates an additional D3 wounds.

abl-3ba1-9027-f91a-8436.name: Inescapable Death
abl-3ba1-9027-f91a-8436.text: Once per turn, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase. In addition, each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 2+.

abl-5fb0-75f-103d-6ab9.name: Multi-threat Eliminator
abl-5fb0-75f-103d-6ab9.text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly NECRONS unit within 3" of a model with this ability, after that enemy has shot, one model with this ability that is within 3" of that target can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

abl-e0c6-979e-6276-84d3.name: Guardian Protocols
abl-e0c6-979e-6276-84d3.text: While a NOBLE model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-3154-b43-deb7-ce47.name: Dispersion Shield
abl-3154-b43-deb7-ce47.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-ae04-1c6f-bc7b-fe8.name: Hyperspace Hunters
abl-ae04-1c6f-bc7b-fe8.text: Once per turn, in the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves within 18" of and visible to this unit, this unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must only target that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

abl-bd6a-144a-e94-92ae.name: Flesh Hunger
abl-bd6a-144a-e94-92ae.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength, a successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

abl-fed9-4f4c-13cd-6663.name: Bound Creation
abl-fed9-4f4c-13cd-6663.text: While this unit is in the same unit as a CRYPTEK model, that CRYPTEK model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abl-7d1b-80ba-7c17-e8a7.name: Systematic Vigour
abl-7d1b-80ba-7c17-e8a7.text: Each time a CRYPTOTHRALL model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and it is then removed from play.

abl-af59-a206-8db4-f4eb.name: Cryptek Retinue
abl-af59-a206-8db4-f4eb.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a CRYPTEK model (a unit cannot have more than one CRYPTOTHRALLS unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that  Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abl-ba2f-e69c-95b4-cc4d.name: Whirling Onslaught
abl-ba2f-e69c-95b4-cc4d.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If this unit made a Charge move this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-890e-3ea5-7d83-e665.name: Plasmacyte
abl-890e-3ea5-7d83-e665.text: Once per battle for each Plasmacyte this unit has, when this unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. If you do, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-7b32-dc36-258c-1b9c.name: Targeting Relay
abl-7b32-dc36-258c-1b9c.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-eb12-6f85-4791-9a9e.name: Grand Illusion
abl-eb12-6f85-4791-9a9e.text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ^^**NECRONS^^** units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-dfac-c392-eb70-34b8.name: Drain Life
abl-dfac-c392-eb70-34b8.text: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-2d35-82e1-a1b4-850b.name: Matter Absorption
abl-2d35-82e1-a1b4-850b.text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy ^^**VEHICLE^^** unit within 12" of this model and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and this model regains up to that many lost wounds.

abl-e55c-f2ef-d3d0-a41a.name: Transdimensional Displacement
abl-e55c-f2ef-d3d0-a41a.text: Each time this model is selected to Advance, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abl-e3b7-d666-dd22-7d60.name: C'tan Shard
abl-e3b7-d666-dd22-7d60.text: This model cannot be given Enhancements.

abl-1dff-4e6e-f50a-4a18.name: Canoptek Swarm
abl-1dff-4e6e-f50a-4a18.text: In your Command phase, select one friendly CANOPTEK SCARAB SWARM unit within 6" of this unit. One destroyed model is returned to that CANOPTEK SCARAB SWARM unit for each SPYDER model in this unit.

abl-486c-f4fd-5ec1-38e3.name: Fabricator Claw Array (Aura)
abl-486c-f4fd-5ec1-38e3.text: While a friendly NECRONS VEHICLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abl-9320-4c37-14b9-d6e3.name: Gloom Prism (Aura)
abl-9320-4c37-14b9-d6e3.text: While a friendly **^^Necrons^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abl-cd1b-54d7-820c-cd0b.name: Self-destruction
abl-cd1b-54d7-820c-cd0b.text: At the start of the Fight phase, if this unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can select one model in this unit to destroy. If you do, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of that model and roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is a VEHICLE. On a 2-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-91c6-fc89-f3ab-c7e2.name: Chittering Swarm
abl-91c6-fc89-f3ab-c7e2.text: While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of this unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control  characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).
