While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly CRYPTEK models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

abl-94fa-32fb-d0d5-fc8d.name: Tunnelling Horrors
abl-94fa-32fb-d0d5-fc8d.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abl-6659-892-f296-90ef.name: Evasion Engrams
abl-6659-892-f296-90ef.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, it can make a Normal Move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

abl-d6d-bb49-bf4c-d1d.name: Shieldvanes
abl-d6d-bb49-bf4c-d1d.text: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+ and a Move characteristic of 8".

abl-3816-f555-728b-9a3b.name: Shadowloom
abl-3816-f555-728b-9a3b.text: The bearer has the Stealth ability.

abl-32c-463b-ec70-ebc2.name: Nebuloscope
abl-32c-463b-ec70-ebc2.text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abl-c070-2782-440f-5647.name: Relentless Combatants
abl-c070-2782-440f-5647.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit, and this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-b3e0-9cd2-735c-91f1.name: Wraith Form
abl-b3e0-9cd2-735c-91f1.text: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-af48-1639-cfd1-b199.name: Malevolent Arcing
abl-af48-1639-cfd1-b199.text: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s twin tesla destructor, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit. On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by arcing energies; after resolving all of this model’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by arcing energies suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-7237-d974-c99b-df40.name: Damaged: 1-5 wounds remaining
abl-7237-d974-c99b-df40.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-8e12-af7c-5f2c-50d5.name: Overwhelming Obliteration
abl-8e12-af7c-5f2c-50d5.text: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, its doomsday cannon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abl-1c5f-64ca-b1cf-d514.name: Hard-wired for Destruction
abl-1c5f-64ca-b1cf-d514.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker your opponent controls, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-627-120b-3ae8-df3b.name: Optimised for Slaughter
abl-627-120b-3ae8-df3b.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with an enmitic exterminator that targets a unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a gauss destructor against a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-79a5-8e09-eeae-e5b2.name: Damaged: 1-4 wounds remaining
abl-79a5-8e09-eeae-e5b2.text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-7ed5-5030-b90e-4626.name: Sentinel Construct
abl-7ed5-5030-b90e-4626.text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

abl-76a2-8b8e-dc0a-889c.name: Repair Barge
abl-76a2-8b8e-dc0a-889c.text: Once per turn, just after an enemy unit finishes making its attacks, if one or more friendly NECRON WARRIORS units within 3" of this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this model can use this ability. If it does, select one of those NECRON WARRIORS units; that unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate. The same NECRON WARRIORS unit cannot be selected for this ability more than once per turn.

abl-7d3b-c221-6f25-e32a.name: Invasion Beams
abl-7d3b-c221-6f25-e32a.text: At the end of the Fight phase, if there are no models currently embarked within this TRANSPORT, you can select one friendly NECRONS INFANTRY unit wholly within 6" of this TRANSPORT. Unless that unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can embark within this TRANSPORT. That unit can embark within this TRANSPORT in a turn it disembarked from this TRANSPORT.

abl-1111-a91-fad5-a9ab.name: Quantum Invader
abl-1111-a91-fad5-a9ab.text: This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abl-cbe7-5f04-88ae-4900.name: Atavistic Instigation
abl-cbe7-5f04-88ae-4900.text:
Each time this model targets an enemy unit with its heavy death ray, your opponent must declare if that unit will stand firm or duck for cover:
■ If it stands firm, when resolving attacks against that unit this phase, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.
■ If it ducks for cover, until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-2ec0-29f0-9fb3-dfc3.name: Damaged: 1-8 wounds remaining
abl-2ec0-29f0-9fb3-dfc3.text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-4997-7da8-34d2-6efa.name: Gravitic Pulse
abl-4997-7da8-34d2-6efa.text: At the start of your opponent’s Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the turn, halve the Move characteristic of models in that unit and halve Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit. In addition, if that unit can FLY, until the start of your next Movement phase, roll one D6 each time that unit ends any type of move: on a 4+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-fb71-ce0a-b73c-cd9d.name: Damaged: 1-8 wounds remaining
abl-fb71-ce0a-b73c-cd9d.text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and you can only select one of the C'tan Powers weapons in your Shooting phase, instead of two.

abl-e526-90ef-5531-526f.name: Powers of the C’tan
abl-e526-90ef-5531-526f.text: In your Shooting phase, when this model is selected to shoot, first select up to 2 different C’tan Powers weapons. Until the end of the phase, this model is equipped with those weapons in addition to its other weapons (this model cannot make attacks with any other C’tan Powers weapon you did not select in this way this phase).

abl-6dd8-33d2-6527-401e.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abl-6dd8-33d2-6527-401e.text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from its Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-35bb-28ec-497-5cff.name: Eternity Gate
abl-35bb-28ec-497-5cff.text: In your movement phase (excluding the first battle round), you can select one friendly NECRONS INFANTRY unit that is either in strategic reserves or on the battlefield (if you select a unit on the battlefield, remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into strategic reserves). That unit can make an ingress move, and must be set up wholly within 6" of this unit and not engaged with any enemy units. That unit cannot make a charge move this turn.

abl-ba94-15fe-27b1-fe9.name: Damaged: 1-6 wounds remaining
abl-ba94-15fe-27b1-fe9.text: While this unit’s Szarekh model has 1-6 wounds remaining, halve the Attacks characteristic of that model’s weapons, and each time this unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-2be5-77b0-af86-2bd0.name: Voice of the Triarch
abl-2be5-77b0-af86-2bd0.text: At the start of the battle round, select one Triarch ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this unit has that ability.

abl-a7b-b3f0-3fa3-85a.name: The Silent King (Aura)
abl-a7b-b3f0-3fa3-85a.text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this unit's Szarekh model, improve that unit's Leadership characteristic by 1.

abl-426d-33c9-9649-f01e.name: Triarchal Menhirs
abl-426d-33c9-9649-f01e.text: If this unit’s Szarekh model is destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining Triarchal Menhir models are also destroyed.

abl-e1-9726-a4fc-c9ae.name: Reanimation Nodes (Aura)
abl-e1-9726-a4fc-c9ae.text: While a friendly NECRONS INFANTRY unit is within 6” of this FORTIFICATION, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

abl-e969-204a-7adb-7aa9.name: Ancient Cover
abl-e969-204a-7adb-7aa9.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-729d-b06e-ad2b-f6ff.name: Deployment
abl-729d-b06e-ad2b-f6ff.text: When this unit is first set up on the battlefield, its models do not have to be set up in Unit Coherency. Instead, each model must be set up wholly within 12" of one other model from its unit. From that point on, each model in this unit is treated as a separate unit.

abl-40eb-6985-aac6-1086.name: Snaking Ambush
abl-40eb-6985-aac6-1086.text: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abl-6e01-88f9-87f0-d595.name: Gloom Prism (Aura)
abl-6e01-88f9-87f0-d595.text: While a friendly **^^Necrons^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

abl-9379-cb84-2ddf-7e47.name: Aggressor Guardian
abl-9379-cb84-2ddf-7e47.text: Each time an attack targets this model, if this model is within range of an objective marker, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. In addition, each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-2e26-ee50-c66b-6b0e.name: Damaged Armour
abl-2e26-ee50-c66b-6b0e.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly NECRONS model makes an attack that targets that unit, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-ab0a-e989-4fab-f66c.name: Gravitational Field
abl-ab0a-e989-4fab-f66c.text: Each time an enemy unit selects this model as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other reductions to that Charge roll).

abl-ff7-5985-34db-4f48.name: Terrifying Monstrosity
abl-ff7-5985-34db-4f48.text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-e496-2e4a-e286-ab98.name: Damaged: 1-9 wounds remaining
abl-e496-2e4a-e286-ab98.text: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-c6d3-ff20-7a9f-7fa9.name: Phase Shift Generator (Aura)
abl-c6d3-ff20-7a9f-7fa9.text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 3" of this Fortification, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abl-d441-6f10-fc92-80f3.name: Phase-shifted Cover
abl-d441-6f10-fc92-80f3.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-a375-dc94-e838-aa.name: Damaged: 1-7 wounds remaining
abl-a375-dc94-e838-aa.text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-5646-8d87-8186-7872.name: Teleportation Matrix
abl-5646-8d87-8186-7872.text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this FORTIFICATION is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this FORTIFICATION is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

abl-d167-8f2e-101f-f228.name: Phase-shifted Cover
abl-d167-8f2e-101f-f228.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-5e4e-69ab-3c9e-f953.name: Death Sphere Bombardment
abl-5e4e-69ab-3c9e-f953.text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-3131-c5e7-912d-7c9b.name: Translocation Shroud
abl-3131-c5e7-912d-7c9b.text: Each time this model's unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until that move is finished, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features (it cannot finish a move on top of another model or its base).

abl-7931-826c-80c8-67c9.name: Harassment Swarm (Aura)
abl-7931-826c-80c8-67c9.text: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) is within 3" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-6997-d7ed-c23b-90dc.name: Nanoscarab Projector
abl-6997-d7ed-c23b-90dc.text: Once per battle round, when a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit within 3" of the bearer activates its Reanimation Protocols, the bearer can use this ability. If it does, that unit reanimates 1 additional wound.

abl-acca-1ed4-d8d2-99d8.name: Accelerator Mandible
abl-acca-1ed4-d8d2-99d8.text: At the start of the Fight phase, select one friendly ^^**Canoptek^^** unit within 3" of the bearer’s unit. Until the end of the phase, improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

abl-48b5-f665-e088-07e4.name: Weapon Sentinels
abl-48b5-f665-e088-07e4.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll.

abl-742b-cba2-db95-2bed.name: Canoptek Retinue
abl-742b-cba2-db95-2bed.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a ^^**Cryptek^^** model (a unit cannot have more than one ^^**Tomb Crawlers^^** unit joined to it and cannot have both a ^^**Tomb Crawlers^^** and a ^^**Cryptothralls^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abl-775c-fc7c-2f20-deff.name: Tectonic Reverberations
abl-775c-fc7c-2f20-deff.text: In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

abl-a2ff-7525-af56-38b2.name: Obelisk Node Control
abl-a2ff-7525-af56-38b2.text: While this model is within range of an objective marker you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abl-97b2-3a6c-79b6-181c.name: Support
abl-97b2-3a6c-79b6-181c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Canoptek Macrocytes, Immortals, Necron Warriors^^**. 

*You can attach this model to one of the above units even if one ^^**Royal Warden^^** or ^^**Noble^^** model has already been attached to it. If you do, and that Bodyguard unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units, with their original Starting Strengths.*

abl-a6e1-4d25-d946-d610.name: Protective Disciples
abl-a6e1-4d25-d946-d610.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-aa95-5ab8-9b69-cbb1.name: Infectious Murder‑madness (Aura)
abl-aa95-5ab8-9b69-cbb1.text: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit (excluding ^^**Monster**^^ and ^^**Titanic^^** units) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if that model has the ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** keyword or that enemy unit is the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-37ff-73af-59de-5b7a.name: Prophet of Destruction
abl-37ff-73af-59de-5b7a.text: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, select one other friendly ^^**Destroyer Cult^^** unit within 9" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-1b37-0a10-61d8-0eeb.name: Nullstone Field Generator (Aura)
abl-1b37-0a10-61d8-0eeb.text: While a friendly ^^**Necrons^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abl-77e0-261c-9497-4ae1.name: Leader
abl-77e0-261c-9497-4ae1.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Immortals, Lychguard, Necron Warriors**^^

abl-d4b0-322e-1e4e-7df9.name: Implacable Resistance
abl-d4b0-322e-1e4e-7df9.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abl-be72-ef07-3eff-352c.name: Leader
abl-be72-ef07-3eff-352c.text: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Immortals, Necron Warriors**^^

abl-82fd-0d82-9969-531f.name: Targeting Relay
abl-82fd-0d82-9969-531f.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abl-90fa-608f-ebdb-3c7c.name: Ziggurat Dock
abl-90fa-608f-ebdb-3c7c.text: One friendly **^^Monolith, Obelisk, Tesseract Vault**^^ or **^^Sentry Pylon**^^ model can start the battle on top of this Fortification’s ziggurat platform. While such a model is on this platform, that model's ranged weapons have the [HEAVY] ability. Any friendly model can be set up or end any type of move on the ramps or platform sections of this **^^Fortification**^^.

abl-2162-94df-78ff-8f83.name: Phased Cover
abl-2162-94df-78ff-8f83.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this ^^**Fortification^^**, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-2d15-df8c-b6bc-1bf0.name: Damaged: 1-15 wounds remaining
abl-2d15-df8c-b6bc-1bf0.text: While this model has 1‑15 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-b13b-8579-e74d-5e09.name: Ramshackle but Rugged
abl-b13b-8579-e74d-5e09.text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-7e12-567b-67e5-90be.name: ’Ard Case
abl-7e12-567b-67e5-90be.text: Add 2 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic, but it no longer has the Firing Deck ability.

abl-f91e-4d2d-c977-fab9.name: Monster Hunters
abl-f91e-4d2d-c977-fab9.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-785b-cdef-c15a-63bf.name: Beastboss
abl-785b-cdef-c15a-63bf.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-7990-644c-a395-eea5.name: Ferocious Rage
abl-7990-644c-a395-eea5.text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons it is equipped with have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abl-962-8c04-c7ce-7ffc.name: Leader
abl-962-8c04-c7ce-7ffc.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Beast Snagga Boyz^^**

abl-b699-6fb9-ab3-c02f.name: Thundering Stampede
abl-b699-6fb9-ab3-c02f.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-23df-4fe3-d093-1c55.name: Single-minded Predator
abl-23df-4fe3-d093-1c55.text:
You can target this unit with the **Heroic Intervention stratagem**, regardless of any other uses of that **stratagem** this phase. If you do:
▪ That use is ‑1 CP.
▪ That use does not prevent any uses of that **stratagem** on other units this phase.

abl-4c4-6591-d937-ac05.name: More Dakka
abl-4c4-6591-d937-ac05.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-73aa-1756-23b1-2a0f.name: Fix Dat Armour Up
abl-73aa-1756-23b1-2a0f.text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

abl-dcac-c0cc-f1e8-2430.name: Kustom Force Field
abl-dcac-c0cc-f1e8-2430.text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

abl-fb02-3ea1-3880-64b9.name: Grot Oiler
abl-fb02-3ea1-3880-64b9.text:
Once per battle, at the end of your Movement phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains D3 lost wounds.
Designer’s Note: Place a Grot Oiler token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.

abl-19cd-d38c-a56b-efde.name: Kustom Force Field
abl-19cd-d38c-a56b-efde.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can overcharge its kustom force field. If it does, until the end of the phase, this invulnerable save is improved to 4+.

abl-15e0-12f9-1f61-fad9.name: Leader
abl-15e0-12f9-1f61-fad9.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **BURNA BOYZ**
- **LOOTAS**
- **NOBZ**
- **TANKBUSTAS**

abl-edc1-b615-e14b-3a40.name: Grot Helper
abl-edc1-b615-e14b-3a40.text:
Once per battle, the bearer can overcharge its kustom force field one additional time.
Designer’s Note: Place a Grot Helper token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.

abl-9464-ed84-cc39-5ccd.name: Deranged Snotling Assault
abl-9464-ed84-cc39-5ccd.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-2207-d598-7b99-c019.name: Leader
abl-2207-d598-7b99-c019.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**
- **LOOTAS**
- **MEK GUNZ**
- **NOBZ**
- **TANKBUSTAS**

abl-1c71-23b1-1e66-c495.name: Grot Assistant
abl-1c71-23b1-1e66-c495.text:
Once per battle, after rolling to determine how many attacks the bearer’s shokk attack gun makes, you can re-roll that dice.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Grot Assistant token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.*

abl-d8d6-4ad6-398a-e67d.name: Ramshackle Cover
abl-d8d6-4ad6-398a-e67d.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-69a-6435-91dc-1.name: Shoutin’ Pole (Aura)
abl-69a-6435-91dc-1.text: While a friendly ORKS unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

abl-32e5-eff7-7e3b-37bf.name: Boom Bomb
abl-32e5-eff7-7e3b-37bf.text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, select one visible enemy unit (excluding Lone Operative units) within 24" of this unit, and roll one D6 for that unit: On a 4+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abl-ef32-1d3d-3a37-1a76.name: Billowing Fumes (Aura)
abl-ef32-1d3d-3a37-1a76.text: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-a847-cc84-74b0-f71.name: Red Skull Kommandos
abl-a847-cc84-74b0-f71.text: This unit has +1 **Sv** against ranged attacks.

abl-fb46-3ac9-17af-a7d7.name: Kunnin’ Infiltrator (Once per battle, per army)
abl-fb46-3ac9-17af-a7d7.text:
In your Movement phase, if this unit is unengaged, you can use this ability. If you do:
- Place this unit in strategic reserves.
- This unit has Deep Strike until the end of the phase.

abl-6bbd-9900-2b83-159d.name: Drill Boss
abl-6bbd-9900-2b83-159d.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-8358-2e19-d1c2-6b96.name: Plummeting Descent
abl-8358-2e19-d1c2-6b96.text: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this model’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield from Reserves.

abl-5a4c-e343-11be-cf37.name: Leader
abl-5a4c-e343-11be-cf37.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Stormboyz^^**

abl-ab60-c8c9-453a-2345.name: Get Da Good Bitz
abl-ab60-c8c9-453a-2345.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-4e0-4f2f-eacc-24a0.name: Bodyguard
abl-4e0-4f2f-eacc-24a0.text: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one (but only if one of those is a **WARBOSS** unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-b006-d9ab-238f-fbe5.name: Pyromaniaks
abl-b006-d9ab-238f-fbe5.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a burna that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-413e-e03b-21b0-63e1.name: Burna Bomb
abl-413e-e03b-21b0-63e1.text:
At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, you can select one **visible** enemy unit (excluding **Lone Operative** units) within 24" of this unit:
- Friendly **ORKS** units' ranged attacks that target that enemy unit have **[IGNORES COVER]** until the end of your next turn.
- Roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit:
-- For each 6, that enemy unit suffers 1 **mortal wound**.

abl-276f-2632-2303-3c9a.name: Dakkastorm
abl-276f-2632-2303-3c9a.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, every successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

abl-6ae-e6e3-8715-618f.name: Piston-driven Brutality
abl-6ae-e6e3-8715-618f.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

abl-84d7-7bf4-8f5f-a79c.name: Speedboss
abl-84d7-7bf4-8f5f-a79c.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-12ca-1686-2634-663b.name: Fuel-mixa Grot
abl-12ca-1686-2634-663b.text: Each time this model’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-227e-96e0-dab4-f521.name: Leader
abl-227e-96e0-dab4-f521.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **NOBZ ON WARBIKES**
- **SKORCHAS**
- **WARBIKERS**
- **WARBUGGIES**

abl-cbc1-7e63-1279-b1e7.name: Gun-crazy Show-offs
abl-cbc1-7e63-1279-b1e7.text: Each time a model in this unit targets the closest eligible target with its snazzgun, until the end of the phase, that weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 4.

abl-da59-d330-1cc8-b079.name: Ammo Runt
abl-da59-d330-1cc8-b079.text:
Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place an Ammo Runt token next to the unit, removing it after this ability has been used.*

abl-2f00-e987-7aef-ca5d.name: Supreme Commander
abl-2f00-e987-7aef-ca5d.text: If this unit is in your army, its Ghazghkull Thraka model must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

abl-1f74-9a0a-cff7-fc6e.name: Prophet of Da Great Waaagh!
abl-1f74-9a0a-cff7-fc6e.text: While this unit is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll and if the Waaagh! is active for your army, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

abl-931a-8c1c-92fc-cba.name: Ghazghkull’s Waaagh! Banner (Aura)
abl-931a-8c1c-92fc-cba.text: While a friendly **ORKS** unit is within 12" of Makari, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

abl-da6a-e2b0-b8db-f3b3.name: Leader
abl-da6a-e2b0-b8db-f3b3.text:
This unit can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**
- **MEGANOBZ**
- **NOBZ**

abl-4f84-fb39-6ffe-dc16.name: Invulnerable Save (2+*)
abl-4f84-fb39-6ffe-dc16.text: You cannot re-roll invulnerable saving throws made for this model.

abl-6cf6-66e7-fc11-a281.name: Clankin’ Forward
abl-6cf6-66e7-fc11-a281.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over enemy models (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abl-3e60-2c1f-8812-9a1.name: Big an’ Stompy
abl-3e60-2c1f-8812-9a1.text: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-f3d8-79ce-af0a-4cec.name: On Da Hunt
abl-f3d8-79ce-af0a-4cec.text: For each model embarked within this TRANSPORT, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s butcha boyz weapon (to a maximum of +6).

abl-36de-d363-3e1b-7731.name: Flashiest Gitz
abl-36de-d363-3e1b-7731.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-137-51eb-8d89-8823.name: Ded Glowy Ammo (Aura)
abl-137-51eb-8d89-8823.text: While an enemy INFANTRY unit is within 6" of this model, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-77d1-d5b5-85bf-4a33.name: Leader
abl-77d1-d5b5-85bf-4a33.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Flash Gitz^^**

abl-9af1-58d9-2635-cc15.name: Sneaky Gitz
abl-9af1-58d9-2635-cc15.text: Enemy units cannot target this unit with **snap shooting** attacks.

abl-2202-5092-3d23-fc9f.name: Patrol Squad
abl-2202-5092-3d23-fc9f.text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step this unit can be split into two units, each containing five models. (when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that is equipped with 1 bomb squig and/or 1 distraction grot, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be).

abl-bb23-950b-6308-511d.name: Distraction Grot
abl-bb23-950b-6308-511d.text:
Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, before making a saving throw for a model in this unit, it can deploy the distraction grot. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Distraction Grot token next to the unit, removing it when this unit uses this ability.*

abl-3fff-8293-123a-10a2.name: Rivetin’ Dakka
abl-3fff-8293-123a-10a2.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a rivet kannon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-6ddb-b84a-eb3f-f119.name: Dat’s Our Loot!
abl-6ddb-b84a-eb3f-f119.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-44e8-17f8-5400-f2a.name: Mad Dok
abl-44e8-17f8-5400-f2a.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-2839-444f-cf5a-93cd.name: One Scalpel Short of a Medpack
abl-2839-444f-cf5a-93cd.text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-977f-8808-a448-68b2.name: Leader
abl-977f-8808-a448-68b2.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Boyz^^**
- **^^Burna Boyz^^**
- **^^Tankbustas^^**
- **^^Lootas^^**
- **^^Nobz^^**

abl-19eb-919d-254f-18e1.name: Krumpin’ Time
abl-19eb-919d-254f-18e1.text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-78a6-74f6-a23-6ae.name: Drill Through
abl-78a6-74f6-a23-6ae.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-7353-c371-3a7e-bb6.name: Know-wotz
abl-7353-c371-3a7e-bb6.text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ORKS VEHICLE units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abl-1e6c-5c2-76b4-bb89.name: Mekaniak
abl-1e6c-5c2-76b4-bb89.text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly ORKS VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That VEHICLE model regains up to D3 lost wounds, and, until the start of your next Movement phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abl-ada4-e5f7-2f1-c37c.name: Leader
abl-ada4-e5f7-2f1-c37c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **LOOTAS**
- **MEK GUNZ**
- **NOBZ**
- **TANKBUSTAS**

abl-486b-a9a7-402c-ab9d.name: Big an’ Shooty
abl-486b-a9a7-402c-ab9d.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-2c6f-ba8c-f678-9517.name: Da Bigger Dey Iz…
abl-2c6f-ba8c-f678-9517.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Titanic^^** unit, add 2 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

abl-21eb-cf3f-382-aae9.name: One Last Kill
abl-21eb-cf3f-382-aae9.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll on D6; on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abl-8079-307c-ffc7-7824.name: Leader
abl-8079-307c-ffc7-7824.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Squighog Boyz^^**

abl-78af-6f75-6e3c-843e.name: Waaagh! Banner
abl-78af-6f75-6e3c-843e.text:
- This unit has a 5+ InSv.
- While the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this unit has +1 T.

abl-dfe1-4fa7-c2bc-bad7.name: Leader
abl-dfe1-4fa7-c2bc-bad7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**
- **BURNA BOYZ**
- **FLASH GITZ**
- **LOOTAS**
- **NOBZ**
- **TANKBUSTAS**

abl-c44-b390-e18d-9712.name: Da Boss’ Ladz
abl-c44-b390-e18d-9712.text: While a WARBOSS model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-749e-e3c3-40ec-bb46.name: Ammo Runt
abl-749e-e3c3-40ec-bb46.text:
Once per battle for each ammo runt this unit has, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.
Designer’s Note: Place the relevant number of Ammo Runt tokens next to the unit, removing one each time the unit uses this ability.

abl-ca5b-4050-c32a-7fa.name: Dok’s Toolz
abl-ca5b-4050-c32a-7fa.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-5af7-1b55-1bcf-a1be.name: Sawbonez
abl-5af7-1b55-1bcf-a1be.text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one friendly BEAST SNAGGA CHARACTER model within 3" of this model. That model is healed and regains up to 3 lost wounds. Each model can only be healed once per turn

abl-aa0b-de90-58e2-2e41.name: Grot Orderly
abl-aa0b-de90-58e2-2e41.text:
Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer is leading a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Grot Orderly token next to the unit, removing it once this ability has been used.*

abl-1012-69d1-7946-2312.name: Hold Still and Say ‘Aargh!’
abl-1012-69d1-7946-2312.text: Each time an attack made by this model with its ’urty syringe scores a Critical Wound against a unit (excluding VEHICLE units), that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abl-9be1-2f2a-2976-8eb3.name: Leader
abl-9be1-2f2a-2976-8eb3.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**
- **BURNA BOYZ**
- **LOOTAS**
- **NOBZ**
- **TANKBUSTAS**

abl-515a-c30f-e933-25f0.name: Buzzer Squigs
abl-515a-c30f-e933-25f0.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks made with squig-launchas and roll one D6; on a 4+, until the end of your opponent's next turn, that enemy unit is hindered. While a unit is hindered, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abl-e39a-81fc-953-c1fa.name: Squig Mine
abl-e39a-81fc-953-c1fa.text:
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, select one enemy unit within 3" of this model and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.
Designer’s Note: Place a Squig Mine token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

abl-c1f3-4279-7d28-7ee8.name: Shokk Tunnel
abl-c1f3-4279-7d28-7ee8.text: Each time this model is selected to Advance, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models instead of making an Advance move (this model is still considered to have Advanced this turn).

abl-abeb-b240-7c93-549c.name: Damaged: 1-10 Wounds Remaining
abl-abeb-b240-7c93-549c.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-fce0-ad1a-4c02-dbd5.name: Waaagh! Effigy (Aura)
abl-fce0-ad1a-4c02-dbd5.text: While a friendly ORKS unit is within 12" of this model, each time you take a Battle-shock test for that unit, add 1 to that test.

abl-98e3-6215-2597-aa86.name: Stompin’ Forward
abl-98e3-6215-2597-aa86.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding **^^Titanic^^** models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abl-3ddd-d93d-d7af-ddb7.name: Full Throttle
abl-3ddd-d93d-d7af-ddb7.text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abl-3cc7-9354-9886-729.name: Tank Hunters
abl-3cc7-9354-9886-729.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-1ea4-3804-49fa-3c0a.name: Attached Unit
abl-1ea4-3804-49fa-3c0a.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a LOOTAS unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-472c-75e6-8261-3b82.name: Pulsa Rokkit
abl-472c-75e6-8261-3b82.text: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use its pulsa rokkit. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

abl-5fdb-9e2f-88df-12cf.name: Grot Riggers
abl-5fdb-9e2f-88df-12cf.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

abl-97fb-dd9a-9db6-c77f.name: Drive-by Dakka
abl-97fb-dd9a-9db6-c77f.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-b69d-41f0-d640-64.name: Might is Right
abl-b69d-41f0-d640-64.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-a22d-294f-6401-5dfe.name: Da Biggest and da Best
abl-a22d-294f-6401-5dfe.text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 4 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s melee weapons.

abl-165e-4c2e-d8a0-5d5d.name: Leader
abl-165e-4c2e-d8a0-5d5d.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**
- **NOBZ**

abl-b423-a011-7b47-5afa.name: Dead Brutal
abl-b423-a011-7b47-5afa.text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, this model’s ’uge choppa has a Damage characteristic of 3.

abl-a0b4-23f-590-9d6a.name: Leader
abl-a0b4-23f-590-9d6a.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Meganobz^^**

abl-4a2d-2388-d446-e087.name: Blastajet Attack Run
abl-4a2d-2388-d446-e087.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-3ccc-f1d4-394c-dbb8.name: Blastajet Force Field
abl-3ccc-f1d4-394c-dbb8.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save, but it loses the **^^Grenades^^** keyword.

abl-868c-1a68-5e06-694f.name: Da Jump (Psychic)
abl-868c-1a68-5e06-694f.text: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one WEIRDBOY from your army can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that WEIRDBOY’s unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 2+, remove this WEIRDBOY’s unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally away from all enemy models.

abl-3d7-ae1b-665a-9b15.name: Waaagh! Energy
abl-3d7-ae1b-665a-9b15.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of this model’s ’Eadbanger weapon for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down), but while that unit contains 10 or more models, that weapon has the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability.

abl-b454-678a-aab4-1b51.name: Leader
abl-b454-678a-aab4-1b51.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**

abl-be60-8268-2c46-1fa7.name: Roar of Mork (Psychic)
abl-be60-8268-2c46-1fa7.text: In your opponent’s Command phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this **^^Psyker^^** and roll one D6: on a 1, this **^^Psyker^^**’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, that enemy unit is confrazzled. While a unit is confrazzled, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for it, subtract 2 from that test.

abl-d08e-383-ae7b-834.name: Unstable Oracle
abl-d08e-383-ae7b-834.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Eyez of Mork weapon for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down), but while that unit contains 10 or more models, that weapon has the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

abl-950a-82f7-79fd-342a.name: Super Runts
abl-950a-82f7-79fd-342a.text:
While this model is leading a unit:
- Models in that unit have the Scouts 9" ability.
- Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
- Each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-d247-c00f-3a26-192e.name: Special Dose
abl-d247-c00f-3a26-192e.text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this model’s unit.

abl-8c02-8-da90-38b4.name: Leader
abl-8c02-8-da90-38b4.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Gretchin^^**

abl-5bfe-a9ae-5367-d280.name: Workshop
abl-5bfe-a9ae-5367-d280.text: When this FORTIFICATION is set up, all parts of it must be set up within 1” of another part. At the end of your Movement phase, each friendly ORKS VEHICLE model within 12” of this FORTIFICATION can regain up to D3 lost wounds (roll separately for each model). Each model can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

abl-3f2f-8aa8-cb41-6815.name: Bizarrely Resilient
abl-3f2f-8aa8-cb41-6815.text: Each time an attack targets this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-9735-57a-e72-acff.name: Trample
abl-9735-57a-e72-acff.text: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-3299-bec9-9729-5206.name: Gargantuan
abl-3299-bec9-9729-5206.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abl-323f-f6d9-36e5-e4c1.name: Walking Bastion
abl-323f-f6d9-36e5-e4c1.text: This model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for making ranged attacks while enemy units are within Engagement Range of it.

abl-5df2-5fa-8e61-4fa3.name: Wall of Dakka
abl-5df2-5fa-8e61-4fa3.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within half range, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-6fe5-a229-7392-3f0b.name: Damaged: 1-8 Wounds Remaining
abl-6fe5-a229-7392-3f0b.text: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-688-8033-f928-61c8.name: Mega Carnage
abl-688-8033-f928-61c8.text: Each time this model is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if this model made a Charge move this turn: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-5108-c16c-3fdf-721f.name: Dead Rippy
abl-5108-c16c-3fdf-721f.text: If this model is equipped with 2 dread killsaws, those weapons have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability. If this model is equipped with 2 dread rippa klaws, those weapons have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability.

abl-7281-7a2c-fc7f-9fba.name: Spiked Ram
abl-7281-7a2c-fc7f-9fba.text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

abl-5723-30ca-5b9-72b3.name: High-octane Fuel
abl-5723-30ca-5b9-72b3.text: Each time this model’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this model’s unit.

abl-a0df-21d3-d4e4-1d9d.name: Leader
abl-a0df-21d3-d4e4-1d9d.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **NOBZ ON WARBIKES**
- **SKORCHAS**
- **WARBIKERS**
- **WARBUGGIES**

abl-3112-76c1-845c-1ba3.name: Drive-by Krumpin'
abl-3112-76c1-845c-1ba3.text: Each time this unit Consolidates, each model in this unit can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

abl-f62a-7ca9-979b-b682.name: Speed Freeks Mob
abl-f62a-7ca9-979b-b682.text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **^^Warbikers^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-b63b-a285-f582-8e56.name: Big Booms
abl-b63b-a285-f582-8e56.text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s supa-kannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave this phase suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abl-f9a0-fb2-4a65-2c65.name: Da Revolushun!
abl-f9a0-fb2-4a65-2c65.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-fc7b-712e-f69d-921f.name: Has Yoo Been a Good Little Grot This Year?
abl-fc7b-712e-f69d-921f.text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, you can target this model’s unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abl-2a40-ae68-4663-172f.name: Pyromaniaks
abl-2a40-ae68-4663-172f.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a Torrent weapon that targets an enemy unit within 6", re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abl-1bd1-1e2e-2783-15b4.name: Indiscriminate Detonations
abl-1bd1-1e2e-2783-15b4.text: In your Shooting phase, when this unit has resolved its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit is **suppressed** until the start of your next Command phase. (While a unit is **suppressed**, it has ‑1 to **hit rolls**.)

abl-f565-2e00-6a76-8e8b.name: Da Biggest Booms
abl-f565-2e00-6a76-8e8b.text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s krusha kannon, the target unit and every other enemy INFANTRY unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-f414-25ce-9e41-dac3.name: Rolling Fortress
abl-f414-25ce-9e41-dac3.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an ORKS model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this DEFF ROLLA BATTLE FORTRESS model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-f560-f58f-6ce7-ae62.name: Aerial Deployment
abl-f560-f58f-6ce7-ae62.text: If this model starts the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

abl-4ab2-1073-4e5a-5390.name: Big Bomms
abl-4ab2-1073-4e5a-5390.text: Once per battle, after the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-e6ec-28d1-9e8a-add4.name: Strafing Run
abl-e6ec-28d1-9e8a-add4.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-c4f1-dadb-84a3-fc10.name: Small Bomms
abl-c4f1-dadb-84a3-fc10.text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll three D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-abf1-339a-bac5-4830.name: Interceptor
abl-abf1-339a-bac5-4830.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-19df-72b6-2de2-8aa0.name: Da Bigger Dey Are, da Better Dey Drop
abl-19df-72b6-2de2-8aa0.text: Each time an attack made with this model’s lifta-droppa destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

abl-b223-4cb5-4d51-5d4.name: Furious Barrage
abl-b223-4cb5-4d51-5d4.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that contains five or more models, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-73ec-a237-8d5e-3e77.name: Bludgeoning Cheer
abl-73ec-a237-8d5e-3e77.text: Each time this model ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, select one enemy unit within 3" of this model and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. That enemy unit must then take a Battle-shock test.

abl-ce15-99ef-2c9b-b09f.name: Gifts for All! (Aura)
abl-ce15-99ef-2c9b-b09f.text: While a GRETCHIN unit is within 6" of this model, that unit’s Thievin’ Scavengers ability is successful on D6 rolls of 2+, instead of rolls of 4+.

abl-7880-82a4-46a5-e81.name: Tellyporta Tech
abl-7880-82a4-46a5-e81.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

abl-fd0b-c139-173f-26c4.name: Gargantsmasha
abl-fd0b-c139-173f-26c4.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Titanic^^* unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-bb91-defa-169f-f79b.name: Leader
abl-bb91-defa-169f-f79b.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BOYZ**
- **NOBZ**

abl-d0dc-7a95-8fc9-1855.name: Shokk-boosta
abl-d0dc-7a95-8fc9-1855.text: You can re‑roll Advance rolls made for this model’s unit. In addition, each time this model’s unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, they can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

abl-dde3-1a77-2153-e9d6.name: Attached Unit
abl-dde3-1a77-2153-e9d6.text: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a BOYZ unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-2d3e-dffa-7531-6f58.name: Trophy Hunters
abl-2d3e-dffa-7531-6f58.text: Each time this unit declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

abl-e41d-a685-ccb8-2d24.name: Explosive Snowballs
abl-e41d-a685-ccb8-2d24.text: Once in each of your Shooting phases, you can target this unit with the Grenades stratagem for 0CP. After resolving this stratagem, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abl-7eb7-313e-8a1b-5596.name: A-bomb-inable Snowman
abl-7eb7-313e-8a1b-5596.text: When this model is destroyed, its Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6.

abl-cc3a-9ca0-5100-cd0c.name: Redistributin' da Gifts
abl-cc3a-9ca0-5100-cd0c.text: Once in each of your Shooting phases, you can target this unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abl-9a3d-e430-3623-76eb.name: More Lads, More Swagger
abl-9a3d-e430-3623-76eb.text: Improve this model's Leadership characteristic by 1 for every 5 models in this unit.

abl-ca03-f66a-7387-f527.name: Leader
abl-ca03-f66a-7387-f527.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Boyz^^**
- **^^Nobz^^**

abl-2053-cbc3-5fe2-9c02.name: Channellin' da Waaagh!
abl-2053-cbc3-5fe2-9c02.text: Each time this model attacks with a Psychic weapon, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of that weapon by 1 for every 5 models in this unit. While this unit contains 10 or more models, those weapons have the **[HAZARDOUS]** ability.

abl-ef32-c8a1-0d2e-d98c.name: Leader
abl-ef32-c8a1-0d2e-d98c.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Boyz^^**
- **^^Nobz^^**
- **^^Gretchin^^**

abl-cb32-d9d2-24b9-1e1c.name: Skulkin' Grot
abl-cb32-d9d2-24b9-1e1c.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities.

abl-32ef-e56c-e9e2-e065.name: Leader
abl-32ef-e56c-e9e2-e065.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Gretchin^^**

abl-6651-b7f6-221f-a9f8.name: Fixit da Grot
abl-6651-b7f6-221f-a9f8.text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abl-39c0-6a34-247c-6f18.name: Waaagh! Wazdakka
abl-39c0-6a34-247c-6f18.text: If this model is your **^^Warlord^^**, **^^Warbiker^^** units from your army have the **^^Battleline^^** keyword.

abl-e967-bc48-102d-f106.name: Throttlerokkit Shokka Engine
abl-e967-bc48-102d-f106.text: In your Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Throttlerokkit Shokka Engine section. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has that ability.

abl-93c8-303f-59ec-a700.name: Leader
abl-93c8-303f-59ec-a700.text:
This model can be attached to the following units: 
- **BOYZ**
- **BREAKA BOYZ**
- **NOBZ**

abl-6840-37a0-2ff4-fbf8.name: Breakin’ Heads
abl-6840-37a0-2ff4-fbf8.text: This unit’s melee weapons have **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]**.

abl-892e-e88e-18bb-e77b.name: Dakkablitz
abl-892e-e88e-18bb-e77b.text: In your Shooting phase, while making attacks with this unit, if its blitzkannon targeted a non‑**MONSTER/VEHICLE** unit, that weapon has +6 **A**.

abl-4334-876d-2f7d-19b2.name: Might is Right
abl-4334-876d-2f7d-19b2.text: This unit's melee weapons have +1 to **hit rolls**.

abl-4c1b-3e46-e465-850d.name: Da Biggest and da Best
abl-4c1b-3e46-e465-850d.text: While the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this model's melee weapons have +4 **A**.

abl-e9b9-9d94-dd8c-e73d.name: Get Da Good Bitz
abl-e9b9-9d94-dd8c-e73d.text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit controls an **objective**, that **objective** is **secured** by your army.

abl-79c3-f1c9-8372-de8b.name: Agile Combatant
abl-79c3-f1c9-8372-de8b.text: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-b13-dc2f-2104-2ba2.name: Hero of the Empire (Aura)
abl-b13-dc2f-2104-2ba2.text: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-d1d-2e4f-db3d-b3c4.name: Advanced Guardian Drone
abl-d1d-2e4f-db3d-b3c4.text: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-8d40-9af2-d279-b0e2.name: Command-link Drone (Aura)
abl-8d40-9af2-d279-b0e2.text: While a friendly **^^T’au Empire^^** unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-b518-dfb4-ed41-6393.name: Way of the Short Blade
abl-b518-dfb4-ed41-6393.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-49a3-e55-9ec9-32fd.name: Puretide's Teachings
abl-49a3-e55-9ec9-32fd.text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abl-a15a-7948-3ddb-ebd4.name: Leader
abl-a15a-7948-3ddb-ebd4.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **CRISIS BATTLESUITS**
- **CRISIS FIREKNIFE BATTLESUITS**
- **CRISIS STARSCYTHE BATTLESUITS**
- **CRISIS SUNFORGE BATTLESUITS**

abl-1597-2952-693f-60f2.name: Crisis Commander
abl-1597-2952-693f-60f2.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-82af-7e9a-2d1a-5637.name: Shield Generator
abl-82af-7e9a-2d1a-5637.text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

abl-a2d3-2ad-5805-8a37.name: Enforcer Commander
abl-a2d3-2ad-5805-8a37.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-e09d-50a0-b1a2-f705.name: Coldstar Commander
abl-e09d-50a0-b1a2-f705.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 12" and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.

abl-5fe0-afe2-451c-38d2.name: Volley Fire
abl-5fe0-afe2-451c-38d2.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abl-7c91-fe45-cd-7abc.name: Crack Shot
abl-7c91-fe45-cd-7abc.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

abl-e084-9d6c-36d3-d635.name: Leader
abl-e084-9d6c-36d3-d635.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Breacher Team^^**
- **^^Strike Team^^**

abl-3a16-c8c-5d03-c1a1.name: Coordinated Leadership
abl-3a16-c8c-5d03-c1a1.text: In your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abl-77a0-3cc8-dacf-bbdf.name: Failure Is Not an Option
abl-77a0-3cc8-dacf-bbdf.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abl-a3bb-77b8-a18f-23e1.name: Hover Drone
abl-a3bb-77b8-a18f-23e1.text: The bearer can **^^Fly^^** and has a Move characteristic of 10".

abl-d75c-8807-c2d9-2fcc.name: Duality Shield
abl-d75c-8807-c2d9-2fcc.text: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 2+ invulnerable save.

abl-726c-8c32-9fa2-6c2e.name: Paradox of Duality
abl-726c-8c32-9fa2-6c2e.text: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-8f07-3db6-72e6-2d9c.name: Supreme Loyalty (Aura)
abl-8f07-3db6-72e6-2d9c.text: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abl-217c-55e6-54fd-2338.name: Inspirational Defiance
abl-217c-55e6-54fd-2338.text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abl-c601-4585-dfb8-bbf7.name: Leader
abl-c601-4585-dfb8-bbf7.text:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **BREACHER TEAM**
- **KROOT CARNIVORES**
- **KROOT FARSTALKERS**
- **STRIKE TEAM**

abl-1eb5-c753-c9ab-ed3a.name: Martial Warrior
abl-1eb5-c753-c9ab-ed3a.text:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to be active while resolving those attacks:
- Direct Grace: Fidelity has the [PRECISION] ability.
- Forceful Strike: Fidelity has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
- Whirling Stance: Fidelity has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead of [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

abl-2760-a977-5b19-6364.name: Structural Analyser
abl-2760-a977-5b19-6364.text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abl-784c-ed1d-8f6-7c7b.name: Jammer Array
abl-784c-ed1d-8f6-7c7b.text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abl-7872-ee2c-cffa-7dfb.name: Leader
abl-7872-ee2c-cffa-7dfb.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^Pathfinder Team^^**

abl-db46-1f35-2996-964f.name: Armour Hunter
abl-db46-1f35-2996-964f.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-62df-a9ee-3931-13d.name: Suppression Volley
abl-62df-a9ee-3931-13d.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-d2e6-f139-acad-1b30.name: DS8 Support Turret
abl-d2e6-f139-acad-1b30.text:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abl-3926-4865-e8c7-c5eb.name: Breach and Clear
abl-3926-4865-e8c7-c5eb.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-2d1d-ea81-7078-938b.name: Fieldcraft
abl-2d1d-ea81-7078-938b.text: At the end of the your Command phase, if this unit within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abl-d0e7-bbff-a4f8-1b2d.name: Bodyguard
abl-d0e7-bbff-a4f8-1b2d.text: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

abl-a0b-cde0-58da-af93.name: Kroot Packmates
abl-a0b-cde0-58da-af93.text: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abl-48d4-b938-de65-cd2.name: Turbo-jets
abl-48d4-b938-de65-cd2.text: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abl-ca95-3643-8ceb-8664.name: Crisis Bodyguard
abl-ca95-3643-8ceb-8664.text: If a **^^Character^^** unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **^^Crisis Fireknife Battlesuit^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abl-c5b0-2214-2987-d0de.name: Forward Observers
abl-c5b0-2214-2987-d0de.text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abl-1333-60c8-37d2-1a4d.name: Homing Beacon
abl-1333-60c8-37d2-1a4d.text:
Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and more than 8" away from all enemy units.
**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Homing Beacon token next to this unit, removing it once this ability is used.*

abl-ff15-6f06-1824-ea0b.name: Stealth Drones
abl-ff15-6f06-1824-ea0b.text:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

abl-5496-1077-da50-c494.name: Battlesuit Support System
abl-5496-1077-da50-c494.text: The bearer is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back but it loses the **^^Smoke^^** keyword.

abl-4050-a088-38c5-ab2a.name: Precise Targeting
abl-4050-a088-38c5-ab2a.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-85b7-6da7-e356-82e5.name: Target Uploaded
abl-85b7-6da7-e356-82e5.text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

abl-f75f-eefc-aff0-75cd.name: Grav-inhibitor Drone
abl-f75f-eefc-aff0-75cd.text: Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

abl-3ab8-c70d-b5d8-98b3.name: Pulse Accelerator Drone
abl-3ab8-c70d-b5d8-98b3.text: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of pulse carbines equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

abl-aaac-7647-9ecf-4fd1.name: Recon Drone
abl-aaac-7647-9ecf-4fd1.text: The bearer is equipped with 1 drone burst cannon and the bearer’s unit has the Infiltrators ability.

abl-9957-13e2-50a0-163c.name: Drone Harassment Tactics
abl-9957-13e2-50a0-163c.text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-86af-3f86-dca6-faff.name: Airborne Agility
abl-86af-3f86-dca6-faff.text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abl-f1f8-0162-549a-a464.name: Oversight Drone
abl-f1f8-0162-549a-a464.text:
Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Designer’s Note: Place an Oversight Drone token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.

abl-fb24-c625-8e6a-eeb0.name: Loping Pounce
abl-fb24-c625-8e6a-eeb0.text: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly KROOT INFANTRY units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abl-3cfd-4cf6-9b8c-874b.name: Hunting Hounds
abl-3cfd-4cf6-9b8c-874b.text: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT CHARACTER models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

abl-45a8-1aaa-cff6-938b.name: Advanced Armour
abl-45a8-1aaa-cff6-938b.text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abl-8fb6-aff7-75ac-f206.name: Nova Charge
abl-8fb6-aff7-75ac-f206.text: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by this model. Until the end of the phase, that weapon has the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability.

abl-89bb-91cf-2e76-ae69.name: Velocity Tracker
abl-89bb-91cf-2e76-ae69.text: Each time this model makes an attack with a ranged weapon that targets a unit that can FLY, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-6109-8d9d-d74-423f.name: Rapid Deployment
abl-6109-8d9d-d74-423f.text: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

abl-1ee8-8fac-5c19-3b78.name: Ground Strike Fighter
abl-1ee8-8fac-5c19-3b78.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abl-1a89-4e93-ec68-d5b6.name: Pulse Bombs
abl-1a89-4e93-ec68-d5b6.text: At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, select one visible enemy unit (excluding Lone Operative units) within 24" of this unit, and roll six D6 for that unit: For each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abl-6769-2de7-81ba-2a99.name: Tidewall Defence Platform
abl-6769-2de7-81ba-2a99.text: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

abl-81a0-c679-23bd-77e3.name: Droneport
abl-81a0-c679-23bd-77e3.text: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

abl-9b21-f9e4-2fe9-7895.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abl-9b21-f9e4-2fe9-7895.text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-d152-5323-f05c-bd84.name: Heavy Walker
abl-d152-5323-f05c-bd84.text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abl-d61e-c391-27c4-cec9.name: Support System
abl-d61e-c391-27c4-cec9.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abl-f200-bc51-2065-ca29.name: Titan-killer
abl-f200-bc51-2065-ca29.text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-3723-a2c0-a8e7-3f96.name: Nova Shielding
abl-3723-a2c0-a8e7-3f96.text: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abl-d278-f59-1761-7ecd.name: Nova Burst
abl-d278-f59-1761-7ecd.text: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

abl-b7b7-8ee8-ef19-eefd.name: High-intensity Markerlights
abl-b7b7-8ee8-ef19-eefd.text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a model in its Guided unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-49d-e53f-d6d7-83cd.name: Aerial Disengagement
abl-49d-e53f-d6d7-83cd.text: In your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abl-d6ef-b13d-f91a-ad20.name: Coordinated Strike
abl-d6ef-b13d-f91a-ad20.text: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abl-63c6-ed19-c7e5-638.name: Damaged: 1-10 Wounds Remaining
abl-63c6-ed19-c7e5-638.text: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-492b-cd7c-f5e5-4d76.name: Agile Dogfighter
abl-492b-cd7c-f5e5-4d76.text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-5a71-e391-7d55-904f.name: Strafing Run
abl-5a71-e391-7d55-904f.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abl-77ef-d268-6a82-a460.name: Transport bay
abl-77ef-d268-6a82-a460.text: The bearer has the TRANSPORT keyword and has a transport capacity of 12 TACTICAL DRONES models.

abl-b584-c327-fdf5-2b8b.name: Titan Hunter
abl-b584-c327-fdf5-2b8b.text: This model’s twin heavy rail cannon and seeker missiles have the [ANTI-TITANIC 3+] ability while targeting a unit within half range.

abl-5188-f8f-edfa-1f82.name: Aggressive Deployment
abl-5188-f8f-edfa-1f82.text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abl-3caf-102c-1f3c-d49.name: Air Caste Colossus
abl-3caf-102c-1f3c-d49.text: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abl-22fb-6e85-141e-589c.name: Damaged: 1-20 Wounds Remaining
abl-22fb-6e85-141e-589c.text: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-46c2-c2bc-f0bf-8229.name: Jet Pack Insertion
abl-46c2-c2bc-f0bf-8229.text: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this TRANSPORT can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

abl-47ad-d3d0-b44e-2b05.name: Damaged: 1-9 Wounds Remaining
abl-47ad-d3d0-b44e-2b05.text: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abl-3bab-3f92-4046-d303.name: Drone Escort
abl-3bab-3f92-4046-d303.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abl-7f50-eb0b-64e6-928f.name: Loping Stride
abl-7f50-eb0b-64e6-928f.text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abl-b14f-7290-da41-f865.name: Baggage Harness (Aura)
abl-b14f-7290-da41-f865.text: While a friendly KROOT unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abl-f119-114a-a83a-4d1c.name: Eclipse Field Generator
abl-f119-114a-a83a-4d1c.text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

abl-18a6-28f3-1242-fc24.name: Assassin
abl-18a6-28f3-1242-fc24.text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abl-1785-ba54-4bd2-e976.name: Leader
abl-1785-ba54-4bd2-e976.text:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- **^^XV9 Hazard Battlesuits^^**

abl-2698-5ab4-26f8-a0c.name: Blacklight Marker Drones
abl-2698-5ab4-26f8-a0c.text:
Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
**Designer’s Note:** *Place two Blacklight Marker Drone tokens next to this model, removing one each time this ability has been used.*

abl-7747-2828-a402-1b7d.name: Photon Casters
abl-7747-2828-a402-1b7d.text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abl-6bb3-5fb3-66ec-cd6d.name: Orbital Comms Array (Aura)
abl-6bb3-5fb3-66ec-cd6d.text: While a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abl-8e52-4874-7ed0-287d.name: Reinforced Cover
abl-8e52-4874-7ed0-287d.text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abl-725-b02-c08c-f668.name: Sentinel Protocols
abl-725-b02-c08c-f668.text: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abl-f3d6-87dc-9a02-a9eb.name: Fireknife
abl-f3d6-87dc-9a02-a9eb.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abl-69a4-3159-581f-40ff.name: Weapon Support System
abl-69a4-3159-581f-40ff.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abl-36a5-3ecd-bc4d-79f.name: Starscythe
abl-36a5-3ecd-bc4d-79f.text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack (excluding attacks that target MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abl-daca-db7f-18e9-0322.name: Battlesuit Support System
abl-daca-db7f-18e9-0322.text: The unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abl-606b-11ed-9b98-9307.name: Kroot Ambush
abl-606b-11ed-9b98-9307.text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly **KROOT** unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abl-9b9d-2689-7f39-fb51.name: Trail Finding
